name: Team Sherrod
subject: counting on your grassroots endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend, we're so grateful to have Sherrod fighting for our shared values in the U.S. Senate – from protecting reproductive rights to championing the Dignity of Work.

But here's the truth: Sherrod is in the fight of his life for reelection – and CNN just ranked this seat as one of the _most likely_ to flip red. **If we're going to prove the pundits wrong and win this race, we need every single member of this grassroots team behind us.**
**That's why we're calling on 5,000 supporters to officially endorse our reelection campaign by midnight tonight – including you, friend. [If you're committed to defending Ohio's Democratic seat and our Senate majority, will you personally endorse Sherrod Brown now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60471389/397244865/-752478304?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fbrown-endorsement&code=jtk38-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTA2NWUwNC03Y2M3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8CjoXp45Mty0MCT3bmCpk3FCx6F1sa-H1PX8FFlucRE=&emci=409abf61-eac4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9e065e04-7cc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60471390/397244867/-752478304?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fbrown-endorsement&code=jtk38-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTA2NWUwNC03Y2M3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8CjoXp45Mty0MCT3bmCpk3FCx6F1sa-H1PX8FFlucRE=&emci=409abf61-eac4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9e065e04-7cc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)
We know one signature might not sound like much, but it's not just you, friend. It's you alongside a steelworker in Lorain, a teacher in Columbus and a nurse in Cleveland, all signing on because you share Sherrod’s belief that when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.

* [Supporting our Veterans and Armed Forces](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=1077705833&e=c87c5d8d97)

name: Wisconsin Senate Update (via Tammy Baldwin for Senate)
subject: Republicans swarming to run for Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=67%2E35263%2E40ZSZa ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter — There have been several developments over the past few
weeks about potential challengers to Tammy Baldwin’s Senate seat, so we
wanted to break it down for you:

FIRST: Rumors started circulating that Paul Ryan — yes, former Speaker of
the House and Trump friend and foe — is considering a run for the U.S.
Senate. He’s on a book tour trying to rewrite his record and separate
himself from Donald Trump, but we all know what he really stands for.

THEN: We learned that former Sheriff David Clarke Jr. is strongly
considering running, too. In case you haven’t heard of him, here’s what
you need to know: he supported Steve Bannon’s scam to “build the wall,”
defended January 6 insurrectionists, and is so extreme that he was even
banned from Fox News! No way we can let this guy represent Wisconsin.

NOW: We are just a few days away from our first FEC fundraising deadline
of the year. We’re a bit behind where we need to be, and with all these
Republicans swarming to run for Senate, we can’t afford weak numbers in
our report. That’s why we’re asking:

[ http://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2173?t=1004&akid=67%2E35263%2E40ZSZa ]Can you chip in $10 or any amount today to keep our fundraising on
pace? With folks as MAGA-extreme as Paul Ryan and David Clarke thinking
about running for Senate, we need all the resources we can get to hold
onto this seat.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2174?t=1005&akid=67%2E35263%2E40ZSZa ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2175?t=1006&akid=67%2E35263%2E40ZSZa ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2178?t=1009&akid=67%2E35263%2E40ZSZa ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

clean_body: [ ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Peter — There have been several developments over the past few weeks about potential challengers to Tammy Baldwin’s Senate seat, so we wanted to break it down for you: FIRST: Rumors started circulating that Paul Ryan — yes, former Speaker of the House and Trump friend and foe — is considering a run for the U.S. Senate. He’s on a book tour trying to rewrite his record and separate himself from Donald Trump, but we all know what he really stands for. THEN: We learned that former Sheriff David Clarke Jr. is strongly considering running, too. In case you haven’t heard of him, here’s what you need to know: he supported Steve Bannon’s scam to “build the wall,” defended January 6 insurrectionists, and is so extreme that he was even banned from Fox News! No way we can let this guy represent Wisconsin. NOW: We are just a few days away from our first FEC fundraising deadline of the year. We’re a bit behind where we need to be, and with all these Republicans swarming to run for Senate, we can’t afford weak numbers in our report. That’s why we’re asking: [ ]Can you chip in $10 or any amount today to keep our fundraising on pace? With folks as MAGA-extreme as Paul Ryan and David Clarke thinking about running for Senate, we need all the resources we can get to hold onto this seat. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60483648/397273193/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTczY2Q3Yi04NmM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HwMx3fosdd0A-4EOvreMg4vtbgXbOKKF2dgEN25S7zs=)

| | Folks — I’ve always been a strong advocate for equality across race and gender. One of my personal heroes, Shirley Chisholm, represents both of these traits. It’s why I’m proud to be a co-sponsor of the Shirley Chisholm Congressional Gold Medal Act. I’m going to tell you a little bit more about what inspires me the most about Shirley Chisholm. But first, I need to know: [**Can I count on you to sign on and become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of the Shirley Chisholm Congressional Gold Medal Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60483649/397273194/1311882993?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTczY2Q3Yi04NmM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HwMx3fosdd0A-4EOvreMg4vtbgXbOKKF2dgEN25S7zs=&emci=3957f934-69c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9a73cd7b-86c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=10997957) | | | [Add your name >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60483650/397273195/1311882993?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTczY2Q3Yi04NmM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HwMx3fosdd0A-4EOvreMg4vtbgXbOKKF2dgEN25S7zs=&emci=3957f934-69c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9a73cd7b-86c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=10997957)
---
Shirley Chisholm is a perfect example of what it looks like to be a trailblazer in our country. She was the first Black woman to serve in Congress, and the first woman and Black individual to run for President of the United States in 1972.
The Shirley Chisholm Congressional Gold Medal Act would award her with the honor posthumously, in recognition of her work to make space for women and Black people everywhere.
Awarding the Congressional Gold Medal to Shirley Chisholm would go a long way in acknowledging her tireless work for historically marginalized communities across the country.
It’s long overdue that we recognize the leadership and courage that Shirley Chisholm exhibited throughout her time in public office. This legislation is a perfect way to do that.
[**Will you add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor in support of the Shirley Chisholm Congressional Gold Medal Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60483651/397273196/1311882993?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTczY2Q3Yi04NmM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HwMx3fosdd0A-4EOvreMg4vtbgXbOKKF2dgEN25S7zs=&emci=3957f934-69c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9a73cd7b-86c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=10997957)

clean_body: | = | | Folks — I’ve always been a strong advocate for equality across race and gender. One of my personal heroes, Shirley Chisholm, represents both of these traits. It’s why I’m proud to be a co-sponsor of the Shirley Chisholm Congressional Gold Medal Act. I’m going to tell you a little bit more about what inspires me the most about Shirley Chisholm. But first, I need to know: | | | Shirley Chisholm is a perfect example of what it looks like to be a trailblazer in our country. She was the first Black woman to serve in Congress, and the first woman and Black individual to run for President of the United States in 1972. The Shirley Chisholm Congressional Gold Medal Act would award her with the honor posthumously, in recognition of her work to make space for women and Black people everywhere. Awarding the Congressional Gold Medal to Shirley Chisholm would go a long way in acknowledging her tireless work for historically marginalized communities across the country. It’s long overdue that we recognize the leadership and courage that Shirley Chisholm exhibited throughout her time in public office. This legislation is a perfect way to do that. | | Thank you for adding your name. Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . subject: SB 5599 Public Hearing in the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
This radical bill completely tramples on parental rights and harms children! Make your voice heard in our legislative process, sign in CON before Wed.

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Lila Rose
subject: Alert: Pharmacies becoming abortion facilities
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [ ](http://trk.readactnews.-3Bwn_QD03G66ALv7w)
---
#
Friend of Life,

I have an urgent request.

As you may have heard, Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid have announced that they will start selling the lethal abortion pill with a prescription.

Despite outrage from thousands of customers and pro-life individuals who took action and made their voices heard, these pharmacies remain undeterred.

**Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid have committed to turn your local pharmacy into a neighborhood abortion facility, putting the lives of countless preborn children and their mothers at risk—and your action is needed today, before it’s too late.**

**[Please sign the petition to tell CVS, Walgreens, and Rite Aid to protect women and children by keeping the abortion pill out of their pharmacies.](http://trk.readactnews.)**

True health care heals; it does not kill. We must stop our pharmacies from turning into abortion businesses.

The abortion pill has killed 5.6 million preborn children since 2000, and the number of babies whose lives are ended by this lethal method is skyrocketing. Over 50% of abortions in America are now committed by the abortion pill.

The Biden administration FDA is working to eliminate regulations on the pills, paving the way for pharmacies to start dispensing this lethal drug in every city—even in pro-life states with stronger protections for preborn children.

This is the deadly new frontier of Big Abortion, and we must fight back.

You can add your name to the petition here:**[https://www.liveaction.org/wallgreens-cvs-petition/](http://trk.readactnews.)**

Thank you for standing up for our most vulnerable and for being their voice.

For Life,

Lila Rose
President and Founder

[](http://trk.readactnews.--DcuWcn56KEIi7puLigQ)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

name: Alan Keck
subject: I'll be candid.
body:
I was recently asked what pillar of the Keck Game Plan I thought was most important, and after some reflection I said family because I think everything else stems from that.
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-r/) _I 'll be candid. I was recently asked what pillar of the [_**Keck Game Plan**_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-j/) I thought was most important, and after some reflection,**I said family because I think everything else stems from that.** My latest video on family lays out the policy specifics you won't get from anyone else-[_**and if you have a minute, I want you to have the first look.**_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-t/)_ [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-i/) [WATCH MY VIDEO ON FAMILY](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-d/) _Families are the cornerstone of a strong, resilient Kentucky_ -and when you have that sense of belonging and that love at home, everything else changes. We will have a stronger economy and less crime because people will feel valued and loved at home, and then education will absolutely be easier and better because more kids will be better equipped when they go to school.As your next governor, it's my mission-my game plan-to support families like mine like no administration has before. _We can solve some of the greatest challenges here in the Commonwealth by doing just one thing:**supporting families.**_ [WATCH MY VIDEO ON FAMILY](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-h/) [__**The Keck Game Plan goes farther than anyone else in this race to do just that**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-k/) _**- helping parents raise the next generation by expanding maternity and paternity leave, lowering costs and making child care more accessible.** Take a look:_1️⃣ **Provide incentives for paid maternity or paternity leave.** Building pro-family workplaces will go a long way in combating the workforce crisis. We must ensure working mothers and fathers have the time and resources they need to care for themselves and their families after childbirth. We will work to create tax incentives for businesses that offer paid family leave benefits. [__**Read more here.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-u/) 2️⃣ **Hold parents accountable for financial obligations.** Personal responsibility plays a critical role in conservative governance, and pro-family policy is no exception. We will fight for more stringent consequences in the judicial system for parents who neglect child support responsibilities. [__**Read more here.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-o/) 3️⃣ **Ease the tax burden for families with two working parents.** Create a tiered structure that more quickly phases out the income tax as each additional child is added will support two-parent working families. [__**Read more here.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-b/) 4️⃣ **Eliminate sales tax on important necessities for young families.** In the same way groceries and prescription drugs are exempt from sales tax, so should essential childcare needs like diapers, infant wipes and formula. [__**Read more here.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-n/) 5️⃣ **Make adoption in Kentucky easier and more affordable.** We will evaluate tax credits to ease the financial burden for families who adopt, and find ways to utilize state resources to provide tools that expedite the adoption process. We will also empower family courts to quickly move foster children toward adoption when it is in the child's best interest, and look for ways to incentivize Kentucky families to open their doors as foster homes. [__**Read more here.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-p/)_**But that is just the start**_ , and I hope you'll allow me to continue updating you on our campaign-[__**because only with your support can we make Kentucky win again.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-x/) [WATCH MY VIDEO ON FAMILY](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-m/) God Bless. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-c/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-q/) Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-u-pouuht-dytiuyidkd-a/)
---

body:
American’s WILL be paying for the bank bailouts.

| | | Make no mistake about it... American’s WILL be paying for the bank bailouts. And if YOU have ANY money in a bank account...
---
| | **YOU WILL be paying for the bank bailouts too.**
---
| | Don’t believe Joe Biden, or mainstream media when they say it’s only the FDIC opening up their wallet... The numbers speak for themselves... The FDIC fund coughing up the money to bailout the banks has less than **$130 BILLION** in it. Meanwhile, Silicon Valley Bank alone had **$148 billion** of uninsured deposits... Pile on the extra **$79 billion** of uninsured deposits from Signature Bank... And you’re looking at **$227 BILLION** in UNINSURED DEPOSITS... That’s almost **$100 BILLION DOLLARS MORE** than the FDIC fund has... So where’s all that money going to come from??? Well, it’s likely that the FDIC itself is going to get a bailout... From the U.S. Treasury... And where does the Treasury get the money from? It’s either going to come from the taxes that you and I pay... Or it’s going to come from borrowed money... And if the Fed steps in to help by buying some of that new debt... Inflation is going to hit Americans even harder... In times like this, storing all your money in a bank may be very risky, as we have seen with recent events. name: Candace Owens, Chair of BLEXIT at TPUSA
subject: Why BLEXIT is joining Turning Point USA
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWOPBXdDNH

BLEXIT -- the nonprofit I founded to free minorities from the
Left's victimhood mentality, or "plantation of the mind" -- is
joining Turning Point USA

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWOPBXdDNH

Fellow
American,

Candace
Owens here - and I've got exciting news.

BLEXIT --
the nonprofit I founded to free minorities from the Left's
victimhood mentality, or "plantation of the mind" -- is joining
Turning Point USA!

Alongside
my friend Charlie Kirk, the Turning Point USA team, and
grassroots patriots like you, I am ready to:

Defeat
toxic and racist Leftist ideologies like Critical Race Theory -
getting them out of our kids' classrooms forever,

Free
black Americans and all minorities from the tyranny of the Left's
victimhood mentality and inspire them to pursue their American
Dreams, and

Win
against the radical Left as Turning Point USA goes toe-to-toe
with fake news media, toxic pop culture, biased "educators," Big
Tech, and more!

To
accomplish these massive - and important goals - I must raise
$100,000 as soon as possible. Can I count on your support of $25,
$50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now?

Stand
with Candace and Turning Point USA

When the
BLEXIT team and I decided that it was time for us to offer even
more life-changing programs … expose even more of the
Left's toxic and racist lies … and reach even more
minorities with our inspiring message about the American Dream, I
thought of my friend Charlie Kirk and Turning Point USA right
away.

That's
because, in the fight to save America from the Left, Turning
Point USA is the real deal - organizing 600,000+ student
activists to FIGHT and WIN today's Culture War.

But to
hit the ground running in this exciting new partnership, I must
raise $100,000 as soon as possible.

Will you
stand alongside me, my friend Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA,
and TPUSA's BLEXIT programs by making your gift of $25, $50, $75,
$100, $250, $500, or more right now?

Stand
with Candace and Turning Point USA

In 2018,
I founded BLEXIT to inspire Black Americans to turn away from the
victimhood mentality and to reject the Left's new "plantation" of
the mind.

Now, in
2023, I'm proud to have BLEXIT work alongside Turning Point USA
to expose even more of the Left's toxic and racist lies and reach
even more Americans with TPUSA's inspiring, pro-America message -
that teaches every American to love our country again, work hard,
and pursue their American Dream!

Today I'm
counting on your help to hit the ground running. Will you please
make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500,
or more today to help me reach our critical $100,000 goal?

Stand
with Candace and Turning Point USA

Working
together with Turning Point USA, BLEXIT will inspire MILLIONS
more young people from all backgrounds to escape the Left's

name: Mike Peppel
subject: President Biden and his incompetent Administration could not care less about...
body:
| | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62461842:6NKQenGJN:m:1:3391001263:9E73CCF3D043B2A9A647AF644E9940F2:r)
---
|
---
Peter, the news crews have left, and now it seems like the country has forgotten about the disaster my neighbors and I in Northeast Ohio lived through just over a month ago. Well, we're still living through it.
Just recently, a containment dam set up to mitigate the impact on the local water supply overflowed and once again spread toxic chemicals. We just can't catch a break.
| [ **SEND HELP** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62461842:6NKQenGJN:m:1:3391001263:9E73CCF3D043B2A9A647AF644E9940F2:r)
---
I'm Mike Peppel, a Columbiana County resident (right near East Palestine), who is taking action to help my friends and neighbors in need. I founded the Ohio Clean Water Project to provide direct aid to the impacted communities.
Right now I'm focused on providing as much clean drinking water as I can to families in need, which is why I'm emailing you today. If you can help out, please click the button below and send a case of water to a family in need.
| [ **SEND A CASE OF WATER** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62461842:6NKQenGJN:m:1:3391001263:9E73CCF3D043B2A9A647AF644E9940F2:r)
---
President Biden and his incompetent Administration could not care less about the people in rural Ohio, and that's why their response has been so lackluster.
That's why I'm asking for your help, because when our government fails us, Americans have a history of helping each other, and we are in need of your help.
[**If you're able, please send a donation and I'll do the rest in getting clean drinking water to the folks in East Palestine.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62461842:6NKQenGJN:m:1:3391001263:9E73CCF3D043B2A9A647AF644E9940F2:r)
Thank you,
Mike Peppel Founder, Ohio Clean Water Fund

name: Caitlin O'Dea
subject: ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER PENS OPEN LETTER IN SUPPORT OF LAW ENFORCEMENT
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_c708oB5XPWYuWvbTjMvUBy00uuhiguaTfw_r9EdRpGGV6authtgnhhxrRRj0Xee97XwTy0fNzejcThnyEuiOgXBi36G450XuRcfkzgieIXPksAr1wDClRgO6sWC1fCdc3jZpmCE5scQSLDm11PwHA==&c=HK0GijZA17MQfj4CWiFfKTEMewRiT6TqGhpJ60aqxtoZ6bk0Yjc7tA==&ch=woIyFm6KEtLILH9ptdVYlSbBBIQhD97SKWXsWAxnYP3yuiQqXgdrjg==)
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, MARCH 21 ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER PENS OPEN LETTER IN SUPPORT OF LAW ENFORCEMENT ATLANTA - In case you missed it, former U.S. Senator and businesswoman Kelly Loeffler was[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_c708oB5XPWYuWvbTjMvUBy00uuhiguaTfw_r9EdRpGGV6authtgnu-yjMq8tqEKunFfbLmWNhni0rbbaAr18Dq1ugYA-97FbjeUHU52bL8BWYUeAs6da-JE0yyqWGBcsQ68A0Lhp7EpmGblDA-AN0mlIZp89qyXGaczg0EEjiXP2YwrsMEmzPZcaKXu5FZjypAbYsISnP_3EPi6vU78xM7XxE2FHAfWRrvmMqG7W34_90J6b_jCzZdE4BuZZeNXJaVXjTXU6MM-HmhQ-q9sI-X2hvj_2sSDQ1jhZwKm2PM=&c=HK0GijZA17MQfj4CWiFfKTEMewRiT6TqGhpJ60aqxtoZ6bk0Yjc7tA==&ch=woIyFm6KEtLILH9ptdVYlSbBBIQhD97SKWXsWAxnYP3yuiQqXgdrjg==)[featured](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_c708oB5XPWYuWvbTjMvUBy00uuhiguaTfw_r9EdRpGGV6authtgnu-yjMq8tqEKunFfbLmWNhni0rbbaAr18Dq1ugYA-97FbjeUHU52bL8BWYUeAs6da-JE0yyqWGBcsQ68A0Lhp7EpmGblDA-AN0mlIZp89qyXGaczg0EEjiXP2YwrsMEmzPZcaKXu5FZjypAbYsISnP_3EPi6vU78xM7XxE2FHAfWRrvmMqG7W34_90J6b_jCzZdE4BuZZeNXJaVXjTXU6MM-HmhQ-q9sI-X2hvj_2sSDQ1jhZwKm2PM=&c=HK0GijZA17MQfj4CWiFfKTEMewRiT6TqGhpJ60aqxtoZ6bk0Yjc7tA==&ch=woIyFm6KEtLILH9ptdVYlSbBBIQhD97SKWXsWAxnYP3yuiQqXgdrjg==) in the Marietta Daily Journal with an open letter to the Georgia business community, in which she highlights new legislation in support of law enforcement foundations across the state. Specifically, she advocates for the Qualified Law Enforcement Foundation (QLEF) Donation Credit - a new tax incentive designed to support local policing efforts and help reduce crime.

Even before the recent violence at the Atlanta public safety training center, our great state is grappling with a significant crime problem. The Atlanta Police Department is currently[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_c708oB5XPWYuWvbTjMvUBy00uuhiguaTfw_r9EdRpGGV6authtgnu-yjMq8tqEK0h3VnwcO0yEA7QJ5QmhF_ukMcbm_6AHN6oSxd9VI33Q0qQpUEyWL6v7hNaybz9_q6vuELeiu3gv4JRNksgdMSTqE4HvBfeZ5pu8lLQuAeqmfmssDd3WSPc2oY6-yT5-Vh9ekVO-ELtZmoNcUh7MXWhkZUVohvhjBlGWaCpzNj_S276vzkK66t3VFHYxpWjt8ltrSR6rZ7M3PkAZk-n-TBFQcg3M6LjL39w_J2Qtvly3gftK6l7EwelbXuwZlkeh6SHjA1gbB85Wl0ozJPvuCNTymUlvuJJ5yYaiI8A5XtHahvL8JzuqfNqebM2MudfdEBL_x1w_PHJgSox1wFgPhNI1OHH1aSW94KnUFz320Xc5NzfiP6EBKDQlqDacYJ5BIfzVxcWsdU1whPjIo8Q1Y3udWQCuccmWmt2pKOQgQpM_xedjRrNhCQJ0SYDdbsQrPBjHTyexf3nKvPJzFMJz8Rvn0sT7_9rXqr2ZIBAPARqDvjEokcAZJIG_Qn9TH6wG_OolhZa36L_8=&c=HK0GijZA17MQfj4CWiFfKTEMewRiT6TqGhpJ60aqxtoZ6bk0Yjc7tA==&ch=woIyFm6KEtLILH9ptdVYlSbBBIQhD97SKWXsWAxnYP3yuiQqXgdrjg==)[understaffed by 450 officers](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_c708oB5XPWYuWvbTjMvUBy00uuhiguaTfw_r9EdRpGGV6authtgnu-yjMq8tqEK0h3VnwcO0yEA7QJ5QmhF_ukMcbm_6AHN6oSxd9VI33Q0qQpUEyWL6v7hNaybz9_q6vuELeiu3gv4JRNksgdMSTqE4HvBfeZ5pu8lLQuAeqmfmssDd3WSPc2oY6-yT5-Vh9ekVO-ELtZmoNcUh7MXWhkZUVohvhjBlGWaCpzNj_S276vzkK66t3VFHYxpWjt8ltrSR6rZ7M3PkAZk-n-TBFQcg3M6LjL39w_J2Qtvly3gftK6l7EwelbXuwZlkeh6SHjA1gbB85Wl0ozJPvuCNTymUlvuJJ5yYaiI8A5XtHahvL8JzuqfNqebM2MudfdEBL_x1w_PHJgSox1wFgPhNI1OHH1aSW94KnUFz320Xc5NzfiP6EBKDQlqDacYJ5BIfzVxcWsdU1whPjIo8Q1Y3udWQCuccmWmt2pKOQgQpM_xedjRrNhCQJ0SYDdbsQrPBjHTyexf3nKvPJzFMJz8Rvn0sT7_9rXqr2ZIBAPARqDvjEokcAZJIG_Qn9TH6wG_OolhZa36L_8=&c=HK0GijZA17MQfj4CWiFfKTEMewRiT6TqGhpJ60aqxtoZ6bk0Yjc7tA==&ch=woIyFm6KEtLILH9ptdVYlSbBBIQhD97SKWXsWAxnYP3yuiQqXgdrjg==), or 22%. This problem is not confined to big cities. The urgency of addressing crime permeates our state - endangering lives, destabilizing communities, and eroding educational and economic opportunity.
Faced with these moments historically, Georgia has successfully introduced tax credit programs to marshal immediate resources, including for school choice scholarships, to sustain our rural hospitals, and to support programs for foster children. The newest program is the[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_c708oB5XPWYuWvbTjMvUBy00uuhiguaTfw_r9EdRpGGV6authtgnu-yjMq8tqEKrheKyMr0Zep4VE2Rh4THB7J1noX6EvxElhVCWuXDzQ3ifyJyAVE-1zqGqnwlzz0TF2_u2YTbyMajBnoSR0gg_f7raHgp7VXKx5cBkFvWgrsP6uqLTPEUFZA7rsouafVjEJBRmnQC2hw=&c=HK0GijZA17MQfj4CWiFfKTEMewRiT6TqGhpJ60aqxtoZ6bk0Yjc7tA==&ch=woIyFm6KEtLILH9ptdVYlSbBBIQhD97SKWXsWAxnYP3yuiQqXgdrjg==)[Qualified Law Enforcement Foundation (QLEF) Donation Credit](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_c708oB5XPWYuWvbTjMvUBy00uuhiguaTfw_r9EdRpGGV6authtgnu-yjMq8tqEKrheKyMr0Zep4VE2Rh4THB7J1noX6EvxElhVCWuXDzQ3ifyJyAVE-1zqGqnwlzz0TF2_u2YTbyMajBnoSR0gg_f7raHgp7VXKx5cBkFvWgrsP6uqLTPEUFZA7rsouafVjEJBRmnQC2hw=&c=HK0GijZA17MQfj4CWiFfKTEMewRiT6TqGhpJ60aqxtoZ6bk0Yjc7tA==&ch=woIyFm6KEtLILH9ptdVYlSbBBIQhD97SKWXsWAxnYP3yuiQqXgdrjg==), which was[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_c708oB5XPWYuWvbTjMvUBy00uuhiguaTfw_r9EdRpGGV6authtgnu-yjMq8tqEK4B1aJdPyvqd3V8oueLRqklReEz5HxK1WRMKACndDLVesV8OnMiWLMQyuEm-5tQwg401xFE3oTOvD1JzvMHeFPHchDrU9-4f4eO5LzoAvYLgN1EWL9WDhxTPnxZ_XWzVhTaMM9BYQJfRt5oISxiyOYglsfy0XnYhoi5azol0WOKdJ25pn7AKQBzwuYdvi0q6_kMq5maeRsCmArxSYEdVs8ReLelU2puDF&c=HK0GijZA17MQfj4CWiFfKTEMewRiT6TqGhpJ60aqxtoZ6bk0Yjc7tA==&ch=woIyFm6KEtLILH9ptdVYlSbBBIQhD97SKWXsWAxnYP3yuiQqXgdrjg==)[passed into law](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_c708oB5XPWYuWvbTjMvUBy00uuhiguaTfw_r9EdRpGGV6authtgnu-yjMq8tqEK4B1aJdPyvqd3V8oueLRqklReEz5HxK1WRMKACndDLVesV8OnMiWLMQyuEm-5tQwg401xFE3oTOvD1JzvMHeFPHchDrU9-4f4eO5LzoAvYLgN1EWL9WDhxTPnxZ_XWzVhTaMM9BYQJfRt5oISxiyOYglsfy0XnYhoi5azol0WOKdJ25pn7AKQBzwuYdvi0q6_kMq5maeRsCmArxSYEdVs8ReLelU2puDF&c=HK0GijZA17MQfj4CWiFfKTEMewRiT6TqGhpJ60aqxtoZ6bk0Yjc7tA==&ch=woIyFm6KEtLILH9ptdVYlSbBBIQhD97SKWXsWAxnYP3yuiQqXgdrjg==) last year by Governor Kemp and our state legislature.
The QLEF program allows individuals and corporations to receive a tax credit for supporting local police foundations across our state, from Atlanta to Americus. Generally, these foundations operate like public-private partnerships that provide resources to train, recruit, and retain peace officers. For local police programs, the potential $75 million in funding that QLEF represents means substantial new resources to keep families safe. The tax credit allows for a contribution of any amount - up to 75 percent of a business's total state tax liability - so it helps the bottom line while preserving the thin blue line.
The importance of these programs is underscored by national news coverage of anti-police rioters at the training center site. Ultimately, our public safety depends on a shared commitment to resourcing, recruiting, training, retaining - and respecting - our brave men and women of law enforcement.
Public safety strengthens all community stakeholders - many of whom do not have the resources or voice of business leaders. Children deserve safe schools, families deserve secure neighborhoods, and law-abiding citizens deserve relief from the rising threat of violent crime. Personally, I am donating to the program as an individual with the hope that together we can make Georgia the number one state for public safety, just as the dedicated work of government and the private sector have made it the number one state for business.

name: Mike Peppel
subject: Containment Dam Update
body:
| | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62461812:J0Ji4nGN6:m:1:3365131770:5D44772F8AAE4F4404A02772CC8E0D8A:r)
---
|
---
Peter, the news crews have left, and now it seems like the country has forgotten about the disaster my neighbors and I in Northeast Ohio lived through just over a month ago. Well, we're still living through it.
Just recently, a containment dam set up to mitigate the impact on the local water supply overflowed and once again spread toxic chemicals. We just can't catch a break.
| [ **SEND HELP** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62461812:J0Ji4nGN6:m:1:3365131770:5D44772F8AAE4F4404A02772CC8E0D8A:r)
---
I'm Mike Peppel, a Columbiana County resident (right near East Palestine), who is taking action to help my friends and neighbors in need. I founded the Ohio Clean Water Project to provide direct aid to the impacted communities.
Right now I'm focused on providing as much clean drinking water as I can to families in need, which is why I'm emailing you today. If you can help out, please click the button below and send a case of water to a family in need.
| [ **SEND A CASE OF WATER** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62461812:J0Ji4nGN6:m:1:3365131770:5D44772F8AAE4F4404A02772CC8E0D8A:r)
---
President Biden and his incompetent Administration could not care less about the people in rural Ohio, and that's why their response has been so lackluster.
That's why I'm asking for your help, because when our government fails us, Americans have a history of helping each other, and we are in need of your help.
[**If you're able, please send a donation and I'll do the rest in getting clean drinking water to the folks in East Palestine.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62461812:J0Ji4nGN6:m:1:3365131770:5D44772F8AAE4F4404A02772CC8E0D8A:r)
Thank you,
Mike Peppel Founder, Ohio Clean Water Fund

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Politically motivated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462603:J3v_5nGNt:m:1:3331421248:AA5197DF1A206FE38BB26AD7C89C6CBB:r)
Peter,

We learned that the New York Manhattan District Attorney is likely to indict a former President of the United States who is running for office.

It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. Full stop.

The Manhattan DA explicitly _**campaigned**_ on investigating former President Trump. This is a textbook case of politicizing prosecutorial power.

The argument that Trump shouldn't be "above the law" is a **straw man** : the only reason the DA is even considering this case is _because_ it's Donald Trump.

I pray for our country that the DA does the right thing here and drops politically motivated, but it's going to take leaders to step up and demand action against this abuse of power.

**[Patriot, will you join me in denouncing politically motivated indictments?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462603:J3v_5nGNt:m:1:3331421248:AA5197DF1A206FE38BB26AD7C89C6CBB:r)**

| [** ADD YOUR NAME -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462603:J3v_5nGNt:m:1:3331421248:AA5197DF1A206FE38BB26AD7C89C6CBB:r)
---

The reason I'm doing this is because the rest of the Republican field has been deafeningly silent about an important issue in the country today.

This is about principle, not a person. This is about our country, not one man.

**So, I don't care whether you root for Trump or whether you don't: put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic.**

This will mark a dark moment in American history and will undermine public trust in our electoral system itself. **The silence from the other candidates is deafening. We need leaders, not lackeys.**

I call on the Manhattan District Attorney to reconsider this action and to put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic, **[and I hope you'll join me today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462603:J3v_5nGNt:m:1:3331421248:AA5197DF1A206FE38BB26AD7C89C6CBB:r)**

Thanks for standing on the side of principle over politics,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462603:J3v_5nGNt:m:1:3331421248:AA5197DF1A206FE38BB26AD7C89C6CBB:r)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. A Trump indictment would be a national disaster. It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. **I am calling on other presidential candidates Ron DeSantis and Nikki Haley to join me in calling on the Manhattan DA to abandon the political persecution through prosecution of the 45th president.[Add your name if you AGREE!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462603:J3v_5nGNt:m:1:3331421248:AA5197DF1A206FE38BB26AD7C89C6CBB:r)**

[** ADD YOUR NAME -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462603:J3v_5nGNt:m:1:3331421248:AA5197DF1A206FE38BB26AD7C89C6CBB:r)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462603:J3v_5nGNt:m:1:3331421248:AA5197DF1A206FE38BB26AD7C89C6CBB:r)

---

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462602:J3v_5nGNt:m:1:3331421248:AA5197DF1A206FE38BB26AD7C89C6CBB:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462601:J3v_5nGNt:m:1:3331421248:AA5197DF1A206FE38BB26AD7C89C6CBB:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462600:J3v_5nGNt:m:1:3331421248:AA5197DF1A206FE38BB26AD7C89C6CBB:r)

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00126yBihzOkuvGbWcCUFbKt5Ym6SYtYG1mYUJFOyZjiZ1T_ocCDFS9w-Ncyzg0b5BBKMMpTMb1RIfLzrnMWRu_sj7JnI5y-T3EIQsP34nh_wptqsXLGBnq-Fcj7I6yaFnNK5kPB1f8f7kswOHQA2WRM-oFY6HlONisII_7zqI-h80=&c=w8R55j_NETmhYUij3IKfhJ5YN9EY9tA4wM0CREQX8a_MRMzHHcOXnw==&ch=FkgHM-bBReQIu_YUG-B-TlYGOLoCFQvjUd4JNi4ioYl0beOtGlx8_A==)
---
| She was Born to Serve
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. Amanda and her husband Mike have been married over 30 years and have 4 grown children. Amanda and Mike both grew up in Bon Air and have lived most of their lives in Chesterfield County, since 1979.
Amanda has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA.
She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting innocent life, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans.
---
| MESSAGE FROM SENATOR CHASE
---
| | |
---
| Dear Greetings!
Who knew that when I left a career in management at the Federal Reserve Bank in Richmond to come home and raise our 4 kids that I would end up homeschooling for 8 years and coaching our neighborhood swim team? It was during that time that I rose to the occasion and joined my neighbors to save our sleepy little neighborhood. Who knew that that would end up jump starting my political involvement and a run for the Virginia State Senate years later?
It was during that season that I was asked to help start the Bayhill Pointe Torpedoes neighborhood swim team and coach about 150 kids, many of whom couldn't swim. I welcomed the challenge.
It was while I was coaching that a developer lobbied the Chesterfield Board of Supervisors to repurpose the main thoroughfare through our sleepy little neighborhood and turn it into a main cut through that was not conducive to kids safely riding their bikes to the pool for morning swim team practice.
I joined our neighbors of all political persuasions for one purpose; to fight to protect the safety and quality of life of the kids in our community. The case went on for years but ultimately, we won.
My desire to protect and defend my neighborhood launched my political activism to make sure we elected the right people who would protect the interests of real people and to protect their quality of life. Little did I know that this would turn into volunteering and working for many Republican candidates and eventually a run for the State Senate in 2015. In a competitive challenging 3 way Republican Primary that included a 27 year incumbent, I was not expected to win. But I did.
Now you know the rest of the story. It's been such an honor to serve you in the Virginia Senate for the past 8 years representing Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia. I'm so thankful and humbled that you've entrusted me with the huge responsibility of representing you and being your voice. I've committed myself to representing real people, protecting their quality of life and ensuring that the district I represented would be a great place to live, work and raise a family. I look forward to continuing to be that voice as I seek re-election in Senate District 12, representing most of Chesterfield and Colonial Heights.
As many of you know, I am no wall flower or shrinking violet. I made sure your voice was heard through the stealing of an election, through tyrannical Covid mandates and complete shutdowns of businesses, schools and life as we knew it.
I was a leader during the Covid crisis advocating that we protect Constitutional rights even during a health crisis. When Governor Northam inconsistently applied the shutdowns, closing down churches and schools yet kept the ABC stores open, I led the effort to push back with Reopen Virginia Rallies at the Capitol. You could actually hear our honking horns during Governor Northam's weekly press conferences.
I refused to wear a mask and they built a plexiglass wall around my desk on the floor of the Senate. The following year, I would cosponsor legislation with Senators Dunnavant and Petersen to reopen our schools and pass legislation that respects parental rights, allowing parents not school officials to determine whether their child would wear a mask to school. Children belong to parents and families, not the government.
I'm running for re-election in Senate District 12 to represent most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Today, I humbly ask for your support and your vote in the Republican Primary on Tuesday, June 20.
Thanks to redistricting, some of you will have the opportunity to vote for me for the first time and I look forward to earning your vote.
I'm super excited that I will now have the opportunity to represent Bon Air, where my husband and I grew up. I will also represent the Robious corridor, and much of North Chesterfield which is currently represented by Senator Hashmi, who defeated former state senator Glen Sturtevant in 2019. I look forward to earning your vote.
While many of you may have heard about me from the Fake Media over the past 8 years, please allow me the opportunity to tell you why I'm running and what makes me the best candidate to specifically represent Senate District 12.
For starters, I've spent almost my entire life living in Senate District 12. You're not just voters, you're my 8th grade government teacher, my neighbor growing up in Bon Air or my friends and neighbors. I care about you. To me, serving is a labor of love and serving others. So here's my story.
---
| About Senator Amanda Chase
---
|
---
| Senator Amanda Chase is not a politician. She's a mom who fights for everyone and has proven she can get things done for the people of Virginia! We can trust Amanda.
She's been married to Mike Chase her high school sweetheart for almost 31 years. She's a mother of her 4 now grown children and has served in the Virginia Senate for almost 8 years.
She will best represent the people of the new Senate District 12 because she has lived most of her life in the district and knows the people and history of the community.
Amanda and her husband Mike both grew up in Bon Air and were active members at Bon Air United Methodist Church. They grew up just blocks from each other in Bon Air, Virginia. They both attended Bon Air Elementary, Robious Middle School and graduated from Monacan High School. They met as teens working at the Chick Fil A at Cloverleaf Mall and spent summers at the Bon Air Community Association.
Six years later and after Amanda graduated from Virginia Tech, she married her high school sweetheart at Bon Air United Methodist Church, where both Mike's parents and his grandparents were married. They will celebrate 31 years of marriage this July 11.
Amanda graduated from Virginia Tech with a degree in Business, double majoring in Finance and Management in the top of her class. Her dream job was to work in management at the Federal Reserve Bank in Richmond, a dream she fulfilled in her early twenties. Amanda held various management positions in the banking and financial industry to include the Federal Reserve Bank, Signet Bankcard, First North American National Bank and the Virginia Student Assistance Authorities where she received an award in management for turning around a failing department. Amanda and her husband Mike have owned many successful businesses and currently have lawn and landscape business run by two of their grown sons Tim and Joe.
When their 4 children were young, Senator Chase homeschooled under religious exemption for 8 years. Later they transitioned to a private Christian school, and then public school for high school because the boys wanted to play varsity football for Manchester High School.
All are grown, successful independent children living on their own. Melanie is a Physicians Assistant at Wake Forest Medical Center, Joe and Tim run a thriving lawn care business and Daniel is finishing up at Liberty University with a degree in Financial Planning. School choice has been a priority for Senator Chase. She understands the importance of a good education free of politics and indoctrination of woke theologies.
Since being elected to the Virginia Senate in 2015, she has been a strong voice and a consistent reliable vote for our conservative values. Her voting record is impeccable receiving lifetime 100% ratings from the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League and A rating from the NRA.
We can trust Amanda. We know she's a proven conservative and has a solid 8 year voting record to back it up. During election season many politicians will say they are a conservative but there's only one running in Senate District 12 that's proven, and that's Senator Amanda Chase. Voting records matter.
---
|
---
|
---
| Senator Chase knows how to get things done. In the Senate, she was the chief patron and champion of legislation that was signed into law and is in effect today, like:

* the Red Tape Regulatory Reform legislation which reduces burdensome red tape for small businesses,
* the Healthcare Transparency Bill, which reduces the cost of healthcare by introducing competition created by allowing the consumer to know the estimated cost of services prior to services being performed,
* the historic coal ash clean up bill, which reduces known carcinogens in our streams and rivers and legislation that would allow our elected school boards, not big business, to determine when our students should return back to school.
* passed a bill that would allow our retired teachers to return to the classroom without losing benefits.
* Hoax Crime legislation to ensure pranksters can be held accountable for harassing victims and wasting precious limited resources paid for by taxpayer dollars.
* She authored and passed one of the largest tax cuts for veterans in Virginia's history, up to $40k.

Senator Chase also co-founded the Transparency Caucus
* which successfully secured online streaming and recording of committee meetings. Previously only floor votes were recorded.
* for 3 1/2 years she hosted a weekly live call-in townhall radio show called "Cut to the Chase with Senator Chase" on WNTW.

And that's just for starters.
---
| Senator Chase has also won many awards:

* 2016 Legislator of the Year Award, Treasurer's Association of VA
* 2016 Patriot's Award, Virginia Assembly of Independent Baptists
* 2017 James River Association River Hero Award
* 2017 Virginia Chamber of Commerce Distinguished Advocate for Business
* 100% Rating with the Family Foundation
* 100% Rating with the Virginia Citizens Defense League
* Highest score in the VA Senate by the Virginia Tea Party
* Conservative Achievement Award by the American Conservative Union, top 3 all 8 years
* Virginia Chamber of Commerce Ratings
* 2016 88 B+ 2020 85 B
* 2017 94 A 2021 90 A-
* 2018 88 B+ 2022 A
* 100% Rating with the National Federal of Independent Businesses

---
|
---

American Conservative Union Chairman, Matt Schlapp, presents Senator Amanda Chase a Conservative Achievement Award in 2019

clean_body: | | | | | | == | She was Born to Serve | | | | | Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. Amanda and her husband Mike have been married over 30 years and have 4 grown children. Amanda and Mike both grew up in Bon Air and have lived most of their lives in Chesterfield County, since 1979. Amanda has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA. She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting innocent life, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans. | MESSAGE FROM SENATOR CHASE | | | | Dear Greetings! Who knew that when I left a career in management at the Federal Reserve Bank in Richmond to come home and raise our 4 kids that I would end up homeschooling for 8 years and coaching our neighborhood swim team? It was during that time that I rose to the occasion and joined my neighbors to save our sleepy little neighborhood. Who knew that that would end up jump starting my political involvement and a run for the Virginia State Senate years later? It was during that season that I was asked to help start the Bayhill Pointe Torpedoes neighborhood swim team and coach about 150 kids, many of whom couldn't swim. I welcomed the challenge. It was while I was coaching that a developer lobbied the Chesterfield Board of Supervisors to repurpose the main thoroughfare through our sleepy little neighborhood and turn it into a main cut through that was not conducive to kids safely riding their bikes to the pool for morning swim team practice. I joined our neighbors of all political persuasions for one purpose; to fight to protect the safety and quality of life of the kids in our community. The case went on for years but ultimately, we won. My desire to protect and defend my neighborhood launched my political activism to make sure we elected the right people who would protect the interests of real people and to protect their quality of life. Little did I know that this would turn into volunteering and working for many Republican candidates and eventually a run for the State Senate in 2015. In a competitive challenging 3 way Republican Primary that included a 27 year incumbent, I was not expected to win. But I did. Now you know the rest of the story. It's been such an honor to serve you in the Virginia Senate for the past 8 years representing Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia. I'm so thankful and humbled that you've entrusted me with the huge responsibility of representing you and being your voice. I've committed myself to representing real people, protecting their quality of life and ensuring that the district I represented would be a great place to live, work and raise a family. I look forward to continuing to be that voice as I seek re-election in Senate District 12, representing most of Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. As many of you know, I am no wall flower or shrinking violet. I made sure your voice was heard through the stealing of an election, through tyrannical Covid mandates and complete shutdowns of businesses, schools and life as we knew it. I was a leader during the Covid crisis advocating that we protect Constitutional rights even during a health crisis. When Governor Northam inconsistently applied the shutdowns, closing down churches and schools yet kept the ABC stores open, I led the effort to push back with Reopen Virginia Rallies at the Capitol. You could actually hear our honking horns during Governor Northam's weekly press conferences. I refused to wear a mask and they built a plexiglass wall around my desk on the floor of the Senate. The following year, I would cosponsor legislation with Senators Dunnavant and Petersen to reopen our schools and pass legislation that respects parental rights, allowing parents not school officials to determine whether their child would wear a mask to school. Children belong to parents and families, not the government. I'm running for re-election in Senate District 12 to represent most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Today, I humbly ask for your support and your vote in the Republican Primary on Tuesday, June 20. Thanks to redistricting, some of you will have the opportunity to vote for me for the first time and I look forward to earning your vote. I'm super excited that I will now have the opportunity to represent Bon Air, where my husband and I grew up. I will also represent the Robious corridor, and much of North Chesterfield which is currently represented by Senator Hashmi, who defeated former state senator Glen Sturtevant in 2019. I look forward to earning your vote. While many of you may have heard about me from the Fake Media over the past 8 years, please allow me the opportunity to tell you why I'm running and what makes me the best candidate to specifically represent Senate District 12. For starters, I've spent almost my entire life living in Senate District 12. You're not just voters, you're my 8th grade government teacher, my neighbor growing up in Bon Air or my friends and neighbors. I care about you. To me, serving is a labor of love and serving others. So here's my story. | About Senator Amanda Chase | | Senator Amanda Chase is not a politician. She's a mom who fights for everyone and has proven she can get things done for the people of Virginia! We can trust Amanda. She's been married to Mike Chase her high school sweetheart for almost 31 years. She's a mother of her 4 now grown children and has served in the Virginia Senate for almost 8 years. She will best represent the people of the new Senate District 12 because she has lived most of her life in the district and knows the people and history of the community. Amanda and her husband Mike both grew up in Bon Air and were active members at Bon Air United Methodist Church. They grew up just blocks from each other in Bon Air, Virginia. They both attended Bon Air Elementary, Robious Middle School and graduated from Monacan High School. They met as teens working at the Chick Fil A at Cloverleaf Mall and spent summers at the Bon Air Community Association. Six years later and after Amanda graduated from Virginia Tech, she married her high school sweetheart at Bon Air United Methodist Church, where both Mike's parents and his grandparents were married. They will celebrate 31 years of marriage this July 11. Amanda graduated from Virginia Tech with a degree in Business, double majoring in Finance and Management in the top of her class. Her dream job was to work in management at the Federal Reserve Bank in Richmond, a dream she fulfilled in her early twenties. Amanda held various management positions in the banking and financial industry to include the Federal Reserve Bank, Signet Bankcard, First North American National Bank and the Virginia Student Assistance Authorities where she received an award in management for turning around a failing department. Amanda and her husband Mike have owned many successful businesses and currently have lawn and landscape business run by two of their grown sons Tim and Joe. When their 4 children were young, Senator Chase homeschooled under religious exemption for 8 years. Later they transitioned to a private Christian school, and then public school for high school because the boys wanted to play varsity football for Manchester High School. All are grown, successful independent children living on their own. Melanie is a Physicians Assistant at Wake Forest Medical Center, Joe and Tim run a thriving lawn care business and Daniel is finishing up at Liberty University with a degree in Financial Planning. School choice has been a priority for Senator Chase. She understands the importance of a good education free of politics and indoctrination of woke theologies. Since being elected to the Virginia Senate in 2015, she has been a strong voice and a consistent reliable vote for our conservative values. Her voting record is impeccable receiving lifetime 100% ratings from the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League and A rating from the NRA. We can trust Amanda. We know she's a proven conservative and has a solid 8 year voting record to back it up. During election season many politicians will say they are a conservative but there's only one running in Senate District 12 that's proven, and that's Senator Amanda Chase. Voting records matter. | | | Senator Chase knows how to get things done. In the Senate, she was the chief patron and champion of legislation that was signed into law and is in effect today, like: the Red Tape Regulatory Reform legislation which reduces burdensome red tape for small businesses, the Healthcare Transparency Bill, which reduces the cost of healthcare by introducing competition created by allowing the consumer to know the estimated cost of services prior to services being performed, the historic coal ash clean up bill, which reduces known carcinogens in our streams and rivers and legislation that would allow our elected school boards, not big business, to determine when our students should return back to school. passed a bill that would allow our retired teachers to return to the classroom without losing benefits. Hoax Crime legislation to ensure pranksters can be held accountable for harassing victims and wasting precious limited resources paid for by taxpayer dollars. She authored and passed one of the largest tax cuts for veterans in Virginia's history, up to $40k. Senator Chase also co-founded the Transparency Caucus which successfully secured online streaming and recording of committee meetings. Previously only floor votes were recorded. for 3 1/2 years she hosted a weekly live call-in townhall radio show called "Cut to the Chase with Senator Chase" on WNTW. And that's just for starters. | Senator Chase has also won many awards: 2016 Legislator of the Year Award, Treasurer's Association of VA 2016 Patriot's Award, Virginia Assembly of Independent Baptists 2017 James River Association River Hero Award 2017 Virginia Chamber of Commerce Distinguished Advocate for Business 100% Rating with the Family Foundation 100% Rating with the Virginia Citizens Defense League Highest score in the VA Senate by the Virginia Tea Party Conservative Achievement Award by the American Conservative Union, top 3 all 8 years Virginia Chamber of Commerce Ratings 2016 88 B+ 2020 85 B 2017 94 A 2021 90 A- 2018 88 B+ 2022 A * 100% Rating with the National Federal of Independent Businesses | American Conservative Union Chairman, Matt Schlapp, presents Senator Amanda Chase a Conservative Achievement Award in 2019 | | == | Congratulations to Senator Amanda Chase! 7th Year in a Row Conservative Achievement Award! CPAC's American Conservative Union Scorecards for 2022 are in! | My 8 Year Conservative Voting Record ON PRO-FAMILY ISSUES 100% pro-life | MY LEGISLATIVE VOTING RECORD | THE FAMILY FOUNDATION SCORECARD | The Family Foundation Action General Assembly Report Card is designed to disclose important legislator votes and present an opportunity for citizens to compare their state legislators' voting records. With this analysis, citizens can make informed decisions at the polls and be well prepared to lobby and work with elected officials. Covering a wide range of issues, this publication helps citizens hold representatives accountable--illustrating their worldview as it pertains to values issues. | CHASE 100% STURTEVANT 76% | 2018-2019 100% CHASE 76% STURTEVANT no record RAMIREZ | | | | == | CHASE 100% STURTEVANT N/A | 2020-2021 100% CHASE voted out STURTEVANT no record RAMIREZ | | | | == | | ENDORSEMENTS | Congressman Bob Good | | | "Amanda is an unapologetic conservative who isn't afraid to take on the tough issues that are most important to the people. She's a solid vote that conservatives can count on and a trusted ally of the people she represents. She's a champion and a leader on so many issues here in Virginia and nationally." -Rep. Bob Good (R-VA05) | Upcoming Events | MARCH 31 | | APRIL 6 BON AIR | | RECONVENE APRIL 12 | | JUNE 20 | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | SESSION NEWSLETTERS | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | HOW DO I VOTE? | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. name: Shift WA
subject: Taxes: repeal or reduce?
body:
Given the most recent revenue forecast shows Washingtonians continue to overpay billions in state taxes, here are a handful of positive actions Democrats could take if they would just cooperate with Republicans. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61618857:Wu7eFdDON:m:1:2610672541:4805C1DD719F39AA35FCE88942F5E660:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Our state's much-anticipated legislative-session revenue forecast was released yesterday. It showed that while the economy is slowing down, revenues are continuing to climb, with the state taking in $194 million more in the current budget cycle (ending June 30) than was projected last November.

That will bring total revenue growth to 20.7% for this two-year budget over the last one - the fifth straight biennial period featuring a double-digit increase in state revenue (thanks to the tax increases which Jay Inslee promised to veto when he first ran for governor in 2012). Though Inslee and his fellow Democrats attempted to downplay the latest revenue increase, by saying that they will now have less money to spend than they had planned - though it's more than they are spending now.

**The reality remains that our state is still collecting a record amount of taxes from hardworking Washingtonians.** The next state budget, which actually starts this July, is still projected to grow by 2.4%, and the one beyond that (for July 2025-27) will be up another 7.1%.

However, the reality is that most economic indicators point to unsettling times. **Recent high inflation on necessary goods means families have tightened their wallets.** If there was any time to reduce taxes and ease cost burdens, it's now.

**Yet the Democrats in charge of our state have proved - time and again - that they are only interested in gaining more power by expanding government. **They refuse to relieve economic pressure on Washington families.

Given the most recent revenue forecast shows Washingtonians continue to overpay billions in state taxes, here are a handful of positive actions Democrats could take if they would just cooperate with Republicans:

* Reduce the state's share of the regressive sales tax
* Ease the burdensome property tax
* Repeal the unconstitutional state income tax capital gains
* Suspend the state's excessive gas tax
* Repeal the oppressive cap-and-trade tax
* Abolish the unjust state death tax
* Reform the destructive business and occupation tax
* Repeal the long-term care payroll tax

**[We want to know- of these taxes - which one would you like to see repealed or reduced most?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61618858:Wu7eFdDON:m:1:2610672541:4805C1DD719F39AA35FCE88942F5E660:r)**

[**Take our poll and let us know today!**
](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61618858:Wu7eFdDON:m:1:2610672541:4805C1DD719F39AA35FCE88942F5E660:r)
Thank you,

The Shift WA Team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61618859:Wu7eFdDON:m:1:2610672541:4805C1DD719F39AA35FCE88942F5E660:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14162791&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWu7eFdDON).

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven't heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You 've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

name: Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC
subject: Saying Anything to get Elected
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC**
body:
I think Joe is willing to say anything to get reelected.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462692:JmHMOnGDN:m:1:3365131770:A2489DB207C4A81E64897481CF98B723:r "Headline") Peter: Now that Joe Biden's War on Cops is backfiring and violent crime is raging, he appears to be changing his tune and shifting the blame. In all the years I've been a part of the law enforcement community, I've only heard Democrats demand we disarm, disband or to defund our local police. I think Joe is willing to say anything to get reelected. **[Will you chip in today and help us expose Biden's attempts to hide his War on Cops from the American people?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462692:JmHMOnGDN:m:1:3365131770:A2489DB207C4A81E64897481CF98B723:r "Will you chip in $50, $100, or $250 today and
help us expose Biden’s attempts to hide his War on Cops from the American people?")** In the Summer of 2020, it took Biden nearly 90 days to condemn Antifa and BLM violence. I've yet to hear him condemn Antifa's recent attacks in Atlanta, the increase in violence against police officers in Atlanta, or on the subways in New York City. In fact, I've yet to hear Biden reprimand any Democrat for their attempts to defund the police, and I've never seen Biden demand that Democrat DAs enforce our laws, revoke cashless bail, or strengthen punishments for violent offenders like he professed to do with his 1994 Crime Bill. **No, all I 've seen Biden do is ignore the crime crisis in America.** The American people may not be paying attention yet, but we're going to make sure they do. **[Help us educate America on how Biden and his allies have caused America's Crime Crisis. Donate TODAY to ensure voters know the truth before Biden attempts to whitewash his record next year.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462692:JmHMOnGDN:m:1:3365131770:A2489DB207C4A81E64897481CF98B723:r "Help us educate America on how Biden and his allies have caused
America’s Crime Crisis. Donate TODAY to ensure voters know the truth before Biden attempts to whitewash his record next year.")** It was just a few weeks ago when Biden was calling on Congress to enact "police reforms." It appears his plan seeks to reduce the spike in "violent crime" but that won't happen if there's no cops to patrol our streets. **Police officers are tired of being treated like punching bags for politicians.** That's why so many are either retiring early, or accepting Governor Ron DeSantis' invitation to continue serving in Florida where leaders have a proven track record for Backing the Blue. Biden can claim the GOP is blocking his attempts to hire and train more police officers, but the facts clearly demonstrate that he and his allies prefer to defund the police. That's why we can't let voters be deceived by the tactics being implored from Biden down to local city council members. We need concerned citizens like you to help us educate the public and expose the politicians who play these games at the expense of our public safety. **[Please join our efforts to keep America safe. Donate ANY AMOUNT TODAY!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462692:JmHMOnGDN:m:1:3365131770:A2489DB207C4A81E64897481CF98B723:r "Please join our efforts to keep America safe. Donate ANY AMOUNT TODAY!")** America has become a pawn in partisan politics and it's time to fix that paradigm and clean up our cities. **[Chip in TODAY and help us prevent Biden from whitewashing the truth.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462692:JmHMOnGDN:m:1:3365131770:A2489DB207C4A81E64897481CF98B723:r "Chip in TODAY and help us prevent
Biden from whitewashing the truth.")** For your safety, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462692:JmHMOnGDN:m:1:3365131770:A2489DB207C4A81E64897481CF98B723:r "Major Sam Peters, USAF \(ret\)") Major Sam Peters, USAF (ret)
Founder
Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC | | [BACK THE BLUE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62462692:JmHMOnGDN:m:1:3365131770:A2489DB207C4A81E64897481CF98B723:r "BACK THE BLUE")

| | Dear Peter, There are just _three easy steps_ to defeating Joe Biden:
---
| |
1. _Draft and support_ Ron DeSantis into the 2024 race.
2. _Nominate_ Ron DeSantis as our official GOP nominee.
3. _Elect_ Ron DeSantis as our 47th

---

We're on a mission to get ONE MILLION signatures in support of Ron DeSantis because that's the size army he'll need to take on and defeat Joe Biden and the Democrat machine that's propping him up. Democrats are using every dirty trick in the book to keep Ron DeSantis on the sidelines and out of the race because they know that if he runs... **they lose**. Your READY FOR RON petition signature will show DeSantis that he has the nationwide, grassroots support he needs to defeat every cheap Democrat attack. ---
| | Sincerely,

Ready for Ron

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Aftermath Of My Phone Call w/President Trump
body:
What Really Happened? Yesterday was a whirlwind... As the Head of Pastor's For Trump, I helped arrange a National Prayer Call for the President with
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19301603.11156.1.a9e374b57175739cc184fc046c4689a6)
---
|
---
## What Really Happened?
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19301603.11157.1.451207f20daa995be962d2b252996157)
---
**Yesterday was a whirlwind...** As the Head of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19301603.11158.1.f521374fc03da9ded8f75ad99ec22bcf), I helped arrange a National Prayer Call for the President with tremendous guests joining live such as **General Michael Flynn** , **Roger Stone** , **Alveda King** and **President Donald Trump** himself. We streamed the National Prayer Call to _Facebook_ , _YouTube_ , _Twitter_ and _Rumble_. As **President Trump** began to share **our viewership peaked at over 115,000 people live** at one time. And then... it _CRASHED_. We then called the President and recorded a phone call with him and I prayed over him. Once we finished our phone call, we uploaded the call with **President Trump** so people could listen in. Everything was great. _But then came the media_. Today, I've been front page news alongside **President Trump** because according to the **Fake News** the National Prayer Call was "_horrible_." I would beg to differ with that! We had 115,000 people live at one time ready to pray. The system crashed because it got overloaded. When the system crashed we recovered and recorded a phone call with **President Trump**. **Last night was NOT horrible, it was an HONOR.** Continue to pray for **President Trump** and pray for our nation just as **President Trump** requested last night. You can view the Livestream with **President Trump** and hear the phone call by visiting: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19301603.11159.1.304a58e5a5d99869dad08adc2a6e4b42) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19301603.11160.1.38009bd7e528c6514d17be97e10bb0d1), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19301603.11161.1.a0602d84840f7dc13b156800cda36a43), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19301603.11162.1.0f41ac8b35ec86ba44a367071cc9dca3), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19301603.11163.1.1a7a7959bc26a8f9344e6c1a189a5b8d), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19301603.11164.1.d9f462f45e647652d460e8759556d3f5) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19301603.11165.1.a90bf72e18ee5e73db42f10d77b62d7c)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19301603.11166.1.4f8b37a22629542cbb7ec702cb1f47c3)
---

We had 115,000 people live at one time ready to pray. The system crashed because it got overloaded. When the system crashed we recovered and recorded a phone call with President Trump. Last night was NOT horrible, it was an HONOR. Continue to pray for President Trump and pray for our nation just as President Trump requested last night. You can view the Livestream with President Trump and hear the phone call by visiting: Thank you, Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on , , , , & ). | | | ©2023 Jackson Lahmeyer | Tulsa, OK 74145 | == "Web Version" == "Preferences" == "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Official Statement released Sunday
body:
(Re: President Trump)

| | | |
---
**\- MARCH 19, 2023 -**
(Original release)
**STATEMENT BY JAMESON ELLIS** Liberty is under attack, and the deep state oligarchs are not backing down in their mission to destroy President Trump.

They continue to make accusations of numerous wrongdoings, yet the truth never changed, not even after two unsuccessful impeachments.

As recently revealed, declassified footage shows what we all suspected - January 6 was a politically maneuvered event - and the Mar-A-Lago raid in August 2022 only proved how far his opponents were willing to go for their own gain.

In 2018, Stormy Daniels accused President Trump of defamation for his comments on Twitter and filed a lawsuit against him but lost. She later lost again in 2020 after she repealed the federal judge's decision.

And on Saturday, March 18, 2023, President Trump released a post on Truth Social stating that he expects to be arrested and has urged his supporters to launch massive protests.

President Trump's impending indictment in New York isn't just a political attack; it's an assault on the rule of law and justice for ALL Americans.

Let us not forget that when trumped-up charges are directed at one, they're leveled against all – undermining our liberty and freedom as citizens of this nation.

I invite everyone to launch massive prayer rallies instead of mere protests because this is spiritual warfare.

What has been transpiring over the years isn't just about President Trump - it's about politicizing "justice" and weaponizing it to suppress the rights and freedoms of
Americans everywhere.
_For Liberty,_
