That might not sound like much. And in Biden’s economy, $1 doesn’t get you very far. But I need you to know that even $1 can make the world of a difference. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=3cdc5162a2da52c9edcbaf7259c6605680a5842d84af22b1087fe9996dbc769cc820c35d04f36d3b89d4c88a6975325464144190f04b17c04ce578eb8013b6e9 The truth is $1, $3, or even $10, or more — every gift no matter the size, is so impactful. That is why I am humbly asking you to donate just $1 or more today. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=3cdc5162a2da52c9edcbaf7259c6605680a5842d84af22b1087fe9996dbc769cc820c35d04f36d3b89d4c88a6975325464144190f04b17c04ce578eb8013b6e9 DONATE $1 I know there are so many people who want to help, but only have a few dollars to spare — and that’s okay. But I don’t want anyone to think that just because their gift is small that it won’t make an impact. This movement – our movement – is not made up of Hollywood elites and liberal billionaires. This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

**The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT:**

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

A Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

---
| Peter, This is nothing but a revenge tour by the Democrats who so desperately want the leader of the America First Movement behind bars.

**FIRST -** They accused Trump of being a "Russian Agent," and sabotaged his entire presidency with lies and impeachment attempts.

**THEN -** Their Deep State henchmen tried to take him out, raiding his personal home in the middle of the night!

**NOW -** They are using a B.S. legal theory to try and _ARREST AND JAIL THE FORMER PRESIDENT WHO DARED TO STAND UP AGAINST THE ESTABLISHMENT!_

This is what you see in third-world banana republics...

**We must recognize this stunt for the partisan pathetic ploy that it is - help me sound the alarm about what they are trying to do to the leader of our movement!**
[_**ACT NOW AND HELP ME DEFEND DONALD J. TRUMP! >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62459657:JwRsRnGNi:m:1:3331421248:C1F4587D16E65B6D9F6A78C1FCED8221:r)

| Make no mistake about what you're seeing play out...

**A Soros-funded, Woketopian District Attorney in New York is using an untested legal theory to try and IMPRISON Donald Trump and DESTROY the entire America First Movement.**

_They see us gaining momentum and are trying to bring that to a screeching halt by any means necessary!_

But President Trump said it himself in the wake of this leaked news:
_**We Must "Take Our Nation Back!"**_

I'm fighting to do exactly that in the halls of Congress. I know that it's time for ACTION to defend Donald J. Trump and his America First Agenda - even if we have to fundamentally change this town to make it happen!

But at a momentous time in history like this one - when our 45th President could literally be **JAILED** by his political enemies at any minute! - I know that it's going to take our entire movement of grassroots patriots to fight back.

name: Jasmyn Jordan
subject: Leftists called me – a black female conservative – a WHITE SUPREMACIST
body:
When I was attacked by my university’s Black Student Union for not buying into their leftist ideology, I thought I was alone.

| |
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk3sejg2qtn39rnu8ek384aghis8u81jd6fqcg5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5i66oj2cdh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m a student at the University of Iowa. My peers in college called me a “white supremacist,” “a token,” “a bigot,” and a “Nazi.”Why?**Because I’m a black conservative female who believes America is not a racist country.** When I was attacked by my university’s Black Student Union for not buying into their leftist ideology, I thought I was alone. **But I found a conservative family at college through Young America’s Foundation (YAF), where I was finally surrounded by like-minded friends who love America, the constitution, and free enterprise.** YAF changed my life. And they need your help today. [**Would you consider giving a $35 or more tax-deductible donation to Young America’s Foundation so they can change the lives of more students like me?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv2upb5hi82jceiviqfoshgb17voc9n9u67dv9f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5i66oj2cdh2bs) My name is Jasmyn Jordan. You may have heard of Young America’s Foundation before as the leading youth outreach organization in America. YAF inspires large student audiences in high schools and colleges with your conservative ideas.I’m proud to be the vice president of my YAF chapter at the University of Iowa. The Left on campus hates that I’m a conservative. But I’m proud to be, and so grateful to be a leader in YAF.YAF provides students with a nationwide campus lecture program, featuring prominent conservative leaders, including **Ben Shapiro** , **Kellyanne Conway** , **Matt Walsh** , **Dinesh D’Souza** , **Larry Elder** , Dr. **Arthur Laffer** , **Katie Pavlich** , Lt. Col. **Allen West** , NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens** , and many others.You may have heard that Young America’s Foundation as the organization that saved President Ronald Reagan’s Ranch in Santa Barbara, California, and the Ronald Reagan Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois for future generations! YAF also provides young people with a “Schoolhouse for Reaganism,” the Reagan Ranch Center, to teach students President Reagan’s ideas and preserve his conservative legacy.In addition, **Young America’s Foundation leads the Conservative Movement teaching your conservative ideas on YouTube** with more than one million subscribers! YouTube is the #1 social media site used by young people. Through YouTube, YAF provides young Americans with full, impactful, feature-length conservative programs. [**Your $35 tax-deductible donation to Young America’s Foundation could help minority students who have been taught to hate America and hate white people to instead embrace traditional American values.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zogpjpeahe9bq4mofr5ndfio520lellvghjmpob8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5i66oj2cdh2bs) Fellow Patriot, your $35 tax-deductible donation will be changing the hearts and minds of students who desperately need an alternative viewpoint to the liberal ideology pushed on them in America’s classrooms. [**Any amount you can give to YAF today -- $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – will inspire young people to love (not hate) America and adopt your conservative viewpoint!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3bop9r80027q0lj66rghgllml62a3838gt1mhmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5i66oj2cdh2bs) It’s terrifying to see how a **hatred for America** has gripped my generation.**But I’m living proof as a black conservative student that you can reach even the most impressionable students with your conservative values. **Young America’s Foundation is changing the tide and growing the Conservative Movement with new, young activists ready to dedicate their lives to freedom’s cause.They need your help with this special mission.Thank you for helping Young America’s Foundation today. And thank you for helping young Americans like me grow firm in our conservative values.
---
Gratefully,
---
Jasmyn JordanSophomore, University of Iowa
---
| |
---
|
---

Deroy Murdock

Fellow Patriot, your $35 tax-deductible donation will be changing the hearts and minds of students who desperately need an alternative viewpoint to the liberal ideology pushed on them in America’s classrooms. It’s terrifying to see how a hatred for America has gripped my generation.But I’m living proof as a black conservative student that you can reach even the most impressionable students with your conservative values. Young America’s Foundation is changing the tide and growing the Conservative Movement with new, young activists ready to dedicate their lives to freedom’s cause.They need your help with this special mission.Thank you for helping Young America’s Foundation today. And thank you for helping young Americans like me grow firm in our conservative values. Gratefully, Jasmyn JordanSophomore, University of Iowa | | | Deroy Murdock 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: DC Statehood Bill introduced with OVERWHELMING SUPPORT from Dem Senators!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly.

| |
---
| | | **Democrats in the Senate have introduced legislation to make Washington DC a state and they 're seeing OVERWHELMING SUPPORT.**

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

**The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT:**

---

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

A Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

**[Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbm5qlg7hn436k9kqphqc5nff2th8d3n4kgilte0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5i6ep34cph2bs "Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?")**

subject: Donald Trump ARRESTED?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60494444/397287269/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzZhOTNkZS1lN2M3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hTPYffdnqZPECRIeopKJ6wwWSACPimN1XeEK6c_MGNY=&emci=42462155-4ec7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c36a93de-e7c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Donald Trump announced last week that he was going to be indicted TODAY – and _CNN_ JUST reported that prosecutors right here in Georgia are considering racketeering and conspiracy charges against him too!

But here’s the thing: _**That won’t stop him!**_

Trump was impeached – _**twice_** – and that didn’t stop him.

It didn’t stop Republicans from supporting him.

subject: 📎 your response needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
---
| | | Peter, I launched my first ever Democratic Priorities Survey since becoming House Democratic Leader – and what I need most right now is your personal feedback to guide our strategy to reclaim the House.

[**_Will you take 10 seconds to complete my survey and share your priorities with me? I need 50 responses from your zip code before midnight to get an accurate sample size. Can I count on your response? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60517222/397357622/-1287788263?source=20230321_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDU5MjhkMS0wOWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-OZw0xUZs-jLUvXYsffJTxn5qDXnhM9zS4sxFN8M7Gw=&emci=3f18a9f6-f3c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f45928d1-09c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21290350)

[**NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60517226/397357627/-1287788263?source=20230321_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDU5MjhkMS0wOWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-OZw0xUZs-jLUvXYsffJTxn5qDXnhM9zS4sxFN8M7Gw=&emci=3f18a9f6-f3c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f45928d1-09c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21290350) ** ** | **[TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60517230/397357631/-1287788263?source=20230321_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDU5MjhkMS0wOWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-OZw0xUZs-jLUvXYsffJTxn5qDXnhM9zS4sxFN8M7Gw=&emci=3f18a9f6-f3c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f45928d1-09c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21290350)**
---
Peter, right now, what I need most is your personal feedback.

I launched my first ever Democratic Priorities Survey as Leader to learn more about the most important issues to you and your family.
[_**It would mean so much to me if you could take 10 seconds to share your feedback with me and help me learn more about what you want me to focus on. Will you take my survey before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60517235/397357635/-1287788263?source=20230321_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDU5MjhkMS0wOWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-OZw0xUZs-jLUvXYsffJTxn5qDXnhM9zS4sxFN8M7Gw=&emci=3f18a9f6-f3c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f45928d1-09c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21290350)
Peter, I refuse to stand by while extreme MAGA Republicans force our country down the wrong path.

– Instead of fighting for everyday Americans, Republicans are fighting each other.

– Instead of putting People Over Politics, Republicans are using Social Security as a bargaining chip.

– Instead of making life better For The People, Republicans are threatening reproductive rights.

Enough is enough.

I need you to know:

My Democratic colleagues and I are listening to you.

We are fighting for you.

And we need to know exactly what’s on your mind as we move forward.
[**I want you to have a seat at the table as we build the grassroots foundation we need to reclaim the House.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60517240/397357640/-1287788263?source=20230321_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDU5MjhkMS0wOWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-OZw0xUZs-jLUvXYsffJTxn5qDXnhM9zS4sxFN8M7Gw=&emci=3f18a9f6-f3c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f45928d1-09c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21290350)
[_**That’s why I launched my very first Democratic Priorities Survey as Leader. I need 50 of my best supporters from your zip code to step forward and share your thoughts with me. It would mean so much to me if you would take my survey and share your perspective >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60517245/397357646/-1287788263?source=20230321_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDU5MjhkMS0wOWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-OZw0xUZs-jLUvXYsffJTxn5qDXnhM9zS4sxFN8M7Gw=&emci=3f18a9f6-f3c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f45928d1-09c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21290350)

name: Great America Update
subject: "The Genesis Story" Online Course Now on DVD
body:
Hillsdale College’s popular online course, “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,” is available on DVD.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78466%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rywmLiA5r9zpDeOV4cXUkg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,

I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College’s popular online course, **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,”** is available on DVD.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78466%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rywmLiA5r9zpDeOV4cXUkg&sysid=1)In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

“The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student’s theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it’s important to both faith and higher education.
Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you’ll receive the DVD as our thank you.**

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78467%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=guRLP26Tw9f%2fTrsBC%2bzDxw&sysid=1)**

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding--even indirectly through student loans and grants. That’s why your support is so crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College’s national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation’s youth. Your gift will also help to:
* Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as “Genesis.”
* Expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Establish and guide classical K-12 schools nationwide and provide, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.
* Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.”**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---

Great American Update
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7638%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=eRPnv6qnMLrtMQFSvCOaSA&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78468%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7BFvsq%2fW52yVLmhtWW0qWQ&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78469%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j0KORyF6Ql%2fODDhpxHOcHg&sysid=1)_

clean_body: | | | Peter, I can’t believe it. Joe Biden and the radical Left have already announced $45 MILLION to defeat our GOP candidates in 2024. Peter, I know this sounds like a lot, but I’m taking it as a sign: they’re absolutely TERRIFIED of us. But that means they’re going to DOUBLE DOWN on their liberal lies. They’ll use this money to mock us, smear us, and tear down the truth. We need to DOUBLE DOWN on our fundraising efforts to catch up, and I’m counting on grassroots conservatives like you. Peter, the Democrats are furious because my story PROVES that the American Dream is still alive. My parents and I came to this great country with little besides the clothes on our backs. But with hard work, faith, and dedication, we were able to make it in America, and I repaid the greatest nation on Earth by fighting in the Navy for 25 years to defend it. And even though my military career may be over, I’m not done doing everything I can to keep the American Dream alive. Now, I just need YOU on my team to help us do it. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | | Address: PO Box 320253, Alexandria, VA 22320 Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Unleash America PAC

name: Bill Spadea
subject: Grab your seat at the table
body:
|
---
| Friends, On January 13th, 2020 the New Jersey Senate tried to take away the religious exemptions protecting parental rights related to medical decisions for children. Thousands of New Jerseyans came together to have their voices heard. The state had gone too far, and many decided to leave the sideline and act. The public pressure led by thousands of moms and dads across the state resulted in the attempt going down in defeat. **From that action, several grassroots leaders got to together to organize an event to provide an opportunity to give stakeholders a “Seat at the Table”.** **The first conference in 2022 was a resounding success, and we are bringing it back to you again on April 27, 2023 by popular demand.**
---

Justin Bieber recently posted a video on Instagram that displayed the status of his partial facial paralysis due to Ramsay Hunt syndrome, a rare disease that affects individuals with the chicken pox/shingles virus. The video shows him looking side-to-side, lifting his eyebrows, and finally grinning, with the caption, “Wait for it”.

body:
| | |
---
**Friend, we're deeply CONCERNED by how radical the Supreme Court is becoming. **

Fortunately, we have progressive leaders like Sonia Sotomayor fighting to protect our rights and freedom. Check out what she has to say:

clean_body: | | | Peter, This is the most heinous political stunt the radical Left has pulled yet. President Trump could be INDICTED by New York radical District Attorney as soon as tomorrow. An unprecedented political hit job! Their agenda is clear: the radical Left wants to influence the 2024 Presidential election, and they’ll do whatever it takes to keep President Trump on the sidelines. Using our justice system as a tool for political persecution is DISGUSTING, I’ve fought and served in third world countries that have a better system of justice than this! Our team is putting together a TRUMP DEFENSE FUND to peacefully show our support and lend our voices for President Trump, and we need every patriot to pitch in ASAP. Even out of the White House, President Trump is a force to be reckoned with. He tells the truth and brings patriots together - and that absolutely terrifies the radical Left. But let me be clear: they’re not just going after President Trump. The radical Left witch-hunt may have started with him, but next, they’re coming for you. name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18912?t=1001&akid=3077%2E346206%2EG46y20 ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230321-3077-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3077_346206_G46y20&akid=3077%2E346206%2EG46y20

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3077%2E346206%2EG46y20

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Friend, Everybody in America should be concerned about the radical weaponization of our judicial system by the Far Left. I’m standing up against it.
---
**_Will you stand with me?_ **
---
Liberal prosecutors in some of our biggest cities seem more focused on going after political opponents instead of holding dangerous criminals accountable.
---
New Yorkers don’t feel it is safe to be on the streets. And by all indications, it seems that their liberal DA is prioritizing political gamesmanship over protecting the citizens of New York City. It's highly concerning.
---
The left continues to use partisan investigations to grind a political axe and abuse our judicial system. We must put a stop to it.
---
We will never yield or bend to the Radical Left, and **I’m fully committed to fighting back against these politically motivated Witch Hunts by Liberal DAs.**
---
I’m calling on YOU to stand with me and condemn these political Witch Hunts.
---
**[Please sign our nationwide petition demanding the Witch Hunts END.](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=4dbedd78517f491a89126e2942be45d8&_e=p9gTJ6_MnIKbWwOcyhQ3bheqAdqTzyLu0_BYgK2dLIdtSlXRUN0uNXPe-oS_t1AM8-f-jjIs8Psmyes8QZig9ikfThq2ymEExMQQZOGO4gLoZ7RiNiUOIv5iLNaqbEqO8w3xXfrE5JYr_oHoHJolianxUU2XBDKJhTFGn5It-ChUSTmNCrsoWfDTmok-TXfnH9Q1WL5OdRcr_Ng0-hqa44kZ9t4iUHX_xFeZt0iMaNBVL2k2FdZjPKXogCJKYM1isi_vbah6RkmCtYnvLo_CcIcRwc3VukjlYDxaMvrzfv5q6Dv-7Ud8bN5TP9GjveRYAn-vUm6l3mGTo5m2EPVJox2CGzuntdUamBVVyO2j4H_KhHt_aaGPyhYhDQHmo_5gF1MddklPhemC4Lc7UP4xb3I4zMtiUB4Qm6qH6VKrSBCdc7a0ecC9cnS9q0z9BBMvj7kAbA_1YHstLMm6pE7VKR94Sn9tNXkNrxj7xKSYNK8%3D)**

clean_body: I need you to stand with me | | Friend, Everybody in America should be concerned about the radical weaponization of our judicial system by the Far Left. I’m standing up against it. Will you stand with me? Liberal prosecutors in some of our biggest cities seem more focused on going after political opponents instead of holding dangerous criminals accountable. New Yorkers don’t feel it is safe to be on the streets. And by all indications, it seems that their liberal DA is prioritizing political gamesmanship over protecting the citizens of New York City. It's highly concerning. The left continues to use partisan investigations to grind a political axe and abuse our judicial system. We must put a stop to it. We will never yield or bend to the Radical Left, and I’m fully committed to fighting back against these politically motivated Witch Hunts by Liberal DAs. I’m calling on YOU to stand with me and condemn these political Witch Hunts. Conservatives cannot be silent – that’s precisely what the Left wants – we must condemn politically motivated abuses of our judicial system to prevent more partisan attacks on Conservatives! Time is short so I’m asking you to please hurry and stand with House Republicans and me. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil Wisconsin’s 1st Congressional District PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

body:
It’s important to protect the rights of every Virginian.

| | | | **COMMONWEALTH ALERT** Fairfax County Public Schools continue to target students based on their race, a direct violation of the Virginia Human Rights Act. **_[TAKE A STAND AGAINST DISCRIMINATION>>](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=71c4c6515bf8f4fb5e1a0b542e1d7e4893963f4eeae4eb3c2ae19d911d022ec472214172bd1b5b53308569c2fd5bf56f0962b312dd53cf62 "TAKE A STAND AGAINST DISCRIMINATION >>")_**
---
Friend, 13 Virginia high schools are accused of withholding information that prevented students from receiving the National Merit Award because of their race. A middle school offered college prep classes to students, but only for those who are African Americans or Hispanic. It's shocking that we continue to find such blatant examples of race and ethnic discrimination in our public school systems. Friend, these woke race-based policies are a _direct violation_ of Virginia's Human Rights Act, which protects Virginians from being discriminated against based on their race or national origin. Every student should be told if they won a National Merit Award, or should be allowed to apply for a college prep program, and have the same opportunities as their peers, regardless of race. **_[I AGREE>>](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=71c4c6515bf8f4fb43fa785684c8ebf7303cac6598e44cae2799d1e8c83425d53df2c249e0dca8ea70b8f9417dad1b6fcb807d60cb6f68b7 "I AGREE >>")_**
---
**[Chip in now to stand with me in upholding the rule of law and protecting Commonwealth students from being discriminated against.>>>](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=71c4c6515bf8f4fb20452c572d2f7f09363455f9879c0e9b66fdab5b3a1dafc3e40a6996b7b0040295a168e7f1129add3b9eedce44cdc054 "Chip in now to stand with me in upholding the rule of law and protecting Commonwealth students from being discriminated against. >>>")** With your help, we can ensure the rights of every student are upheld in the Commonwealth. Thank you,
Jason Miyares

In a time marked by rising costs, bank shutdowns, and high spending, $6.9 trillion is simply something America can't afford. We've worked so hard to claw our way out of Biden's recession, but despite Republicans' progress, Biden's happy to throw us right back into the fire...
He's willing to do whatever it takes to roll out his socialist agenda. Raising taxes, increasing spending, and making hard-working Americans like YOU foot the bill!

name: Mike Peppel
subject: Containment Dam Update
body:
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62461808:6A6sNBGNV:m:1:3331421248:E689ECAD83BF8CD4B4FE2BE5213613D4:r)
---
|
---
Peter, the news crews have left, and now it seems like the country has forgotten about the disaster my neighbors and I in Northeast Ohio lived through just over a month ago. Well, we're still living through it.
Just recently, a containment dam set up to mitigate the impact on the local water supply overflowed and once again spread toxic chemicals. We just can't catch a break.
| [ **SEND HELP** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62461808:6A6sNBGNV:m:1:3331421248:E689ECAD83BF8CD4B4FE2BE5213613D4:r)
---
I'm Mike Peppel, a Columbiana County resident (right near East Palestine), who is taking action to help my friends and neighbors in need. I founded the Ohio Clean Water Project to provide direct aid to the impacted communities.
Right now I'm focused on providing as much clean drinking water as I can to families in need, which is why I'm emailing you today. If you can help out, please click the button below and send a case of water to a family in need.
| [ **SEND A CASE OF WATER** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62461808:6A6sNBGNV:m:1:3331421248:E689ECAD83BF8CD4B4FE2BE5213613D4:r)
---
President Biden and his incompetent Administration could not care less about the people in rural Ohio, and that's why their response has been so lackluster.
That's why I'm asking for your help, because when our government fails us, Americans have a history of helping each other, and we are in need of your help.
[**If you're able, please send a donation and I'll do the rest in getting clean drinking water to the folks in East Palestine.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62461808:6A6sNBGNV:m:1:3331421248:E689ECAD83BF8CD4B4FE2BE5213613D4:r)
Thank you,
Mike Peppel Founder, Ohio Clean Water Fund

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system July 9, 2022.

Every eligible person deserves to vote. When more of us vote, our nation is stronger. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60509479/397330423/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTY1ZWYwZC1mOWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zUB8plhlIyPY-wvZDwB2SinJTBCuMsF5k0yvKb-l0Wg=&emci=e926ae6b-69c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6a65ef0d-f9c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8943725) Peter,

Fifty-eight years ago, Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., John Lewis, and countless other brave men and women put their lives on the line to win the right to vote by marching from Selma, Alabama to the state capital. And later that year, they won passage of the Voting Rights Act of 1965.

But over time, extremists have ramped up an all-out assault on voting rights. In the months after the January 6 insurrection, **Republicans introduced over 400 voter suppression bills in 49 state legislatures, and dark-money groups spent tens of millions of dollars promoting them.**

And they're not being quiet about it. A Republican member of the Wisconsin Election Commission, Robert Spindell, recently bragged about reducing turnout among Black and Hispanic voters in Milwaukee in the 2022 election.

Our democracy is under siege, and it's time to fight back.

[**Bob is asking you to show you're ready to defend our right to vote. Join Bob in defending our democracy today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60509482/397330426/375293715?ms=em23_230321_votrts_adv_gq_act___bcc_ettx&refcode=em23_230321_votrts_adv_gq_act___bcc_ettx&source=em23_230321_votrts_adv_gq_act___bcc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230321_votrts_adv_gq_act___bcc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=jAwnSbRO7KLkPDtAZ1/wb3xaimv1mlIiYgWagU9IhjG+GMNmcaiZkqIkMisNk2CzcF+1FUnkN6Zkt9ECQ873z6ufRby0JPqz8yEHNF3wxHxRT/ePfronIVK519n3vv7zrc8hsxt7j8GZXbXsPCVy9feb6mrQwR04WRkC7lFZEcsh+oc3Pft3roqsxj858wSE&refcode2=6a65ef0d-f9c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTY1ZWYwZC1mOWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zUB8plhlIyPY-wvZDwB2SinJTBCuMsF5k0yvKb-l0Wg=&emci=e926ae6b-69c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6a65ef0d-f9c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8943725) | | [**Add your name**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60509485/397330429/375293715?ms=em23_230321_votrts_adv_gq_act___bcc_ettx&refcode=em23_230321_votrts_adv_gq_act___bcc_ettx&source=em23_230321_votrts_adv_gq_act___bcc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230321_votrts_adv_gq_act___bcc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=jAwnSbRO7KLkPDtAZ1/wb3xaimv1mlIiYgWagU9IhjG+GMNmcaiZkqIkMisNk2CzcF+1FUnkN6Zkt9ECQ873z6ufRby0JPqz8yEHNF3wxHxRT/ePfronIVK519n3vv7zrc8hsxt7j8GZXbXsPCVy9feb6mrQwR04WRkC7lFZEcsh+oc3Pft3roqsxj858wSE&refcode2=6a65ef0d-f9c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTY1ZWYwZC1mOWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zUB8plhlIyPY-wvZDwB2SinJTBCuMsF5k0yvKb-l0Wg=&emci=e926ae6b-69c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6a65ef0d-f9c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8943725)

The right to vote is a fundamental right and central to our entire democratic system. Without free and fair access to the ballot, our democracy is lost.

The Freedom to Vote Act would have defended and expanded voting rights for all Americans, reduced the influence of money in politics, prevented politicians from picking their voters through gerrymandering, and created new ethics rules to hold officeholders to a higher standard. But Republicans blocked this critical bill and others in the last Congress.

Bob will never stop fighting to protect your voting rights and make it easier for every eligible American to cast their ballot.

**[Bob is counting on you to stand with him. Will you join us in demanding Congress defend our voting rights? Add your name now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60509488/397330459/375293715?ms=em23_230321_votrts_adv_gq_act___bcc_ettx&refcode=em23_230321_votrts_adv_gq_act___bcc_ettx&source=em23_230321_votrts_adv_gq_act___bcc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230321_votrts_adv_gq_act___bcc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=jAwnSbRO7KLkPDtAZ1/wb3xaimv1mlIiYgWagU9IhjG+GMNmcaiZkqIkMisNk2CzcF+1FUnkN6Zkt9ECQ873z6ufRby0JPqz8yEHNF3wxHxRT/ePfronIVK519n3vv7zrc8hsxt7j8GZXbXsPCVy9feb6mrQwR04WRkC7lFZEcsh+oc3Pft3roqsxj858wSE&refcode2=6a65ef0d-f9c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTY1ZWYwZC1mOWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zUB8plhlIyPY-wvZDwB2SinJTBCuMsF5k0yvKb-l0Wg=&emci=e926ae6b-69c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6a65ef0d-f9c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8943725)**

clean_body: Every eligible person deserves to vote. When more of us vote, our nation is stronger. Peter, Fifty-eight years ago, Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., John Lewis, and countless other brave men and women put their lives on the line to win the right to vote by marching from Selma, Alabama to the state capital. And later that year, they won passage of the Voting Rights Act of 1965. But over time, extremists have ramped up an all-out assault on voting rights. In the months after the January 6 insurrection, Republicans introduced over 400 voter suppression bills in 49 state legislatures, and dark-money groups spent tens of millions of dollars promoting them. And they're not being quiet about it. A Republican member of the Wisconsin Election Commission, Robert Spindell, recently bragged about reducing turnout among Black and Hispanic voters in Milwaukee in the 2022 election. Our democracy is under siege, and it's time to fight back. | | The right to vote is a fundamental right and central to our entire democratic system. Without free and fair access to the ballot, our democracy is lost. The Freedom to Vote Act would have defended and expanded voting rights for all Americans, reduced the influence of money in politics, prevented politicians from picking their voters through gerrymandering, and created new ethics rules to hold officeholders to a higher standard. But Republicans blocked this critical bill and others in the last Congress. Bob will never stop fighting to protect your voting rights and make it easier for every eligible American to cast their ballot. Thank you for defending our democracy, Team Casey Help Bob Casey defend the Democratic Senate majority. Chip in. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

name: Victor Riches
subject: Nightmare: child forced to transition behind mother's back
body:
I want to challenge your assumptions about public schools.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd06amq7re2jv899itgqfd1ecq97red6h5t2b6u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5h6aoj0cdh2bs)

Friend,

I want to challenge your assumptions about public schools.

It's a different world from when we were kids--when schools were safer and teachers were there to help students learn and better themselves.

We cannot give schools the benefit of the doubt anymore. Even in red states, you have radical gender ideologies and Critical Race Theory in the school curriculum.

[_**The Goldwater Institute is suing schools that violate parental rights. Can you please support our urgent work by donating $10, $35, $100, or more? **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z97nu2uclvs9air03h5qbr23mmvfabav0lrjmqv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5h6aoj0cdh2bs)

Here's one story from a school in Maine:

Last December, Amber Lavigne was in her 13-year-old daughter's room when she found a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Amber was alarmed, and when she started investigating she was shocked to discover that a school social worker, who had been seeing Amber's daughter since October, secretly gave the child the chest binder and advised her about gender transitioning.

**The social worker told Amber 's daughter the school wouldn't inform her parents about any of it and that she shouldn't do so either.**

**Friend, the school violated Amber 's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. **

Now the Goldwater Institute is stepping in to hold the school accountable.

Let me briefly introduce myself and our organization. I am Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation's leading liberty organization. We provide pro-bono legal support for parents like Amber Lavigne.

**I 've set a goal to find 500 new donors to fund our American Freedom Network, which provides pro-bono legal support to protect parental rights and stop schools from indoctrinating children.**

[_**Your generous support makes a huge difference in our fight for parents ' rights. Select any amount below to rush your support.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm1h809qsuu3voro301om1m5uobc1t68j6ri7to8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5h6aoj0cdh2bs)

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zng5hdfhq7u3b31an807jhl8qv4uufl9f7k2lfm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5h6aoj0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztrc1h9v0mao8m2aqb5bd9sjacadso5f2cjacva0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5h6aoj0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0ev6hbpefbqo0998ctr7lqea9hr1en9k5d1q7a0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5h6aoj0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z19ls1f8803k43g2422o2i41pg57mjtprl67qbio_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5h6aoj0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm3franek2059i9esoul3t06713og03bch1p9en8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5h6aoj0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2p3gdcf6lqrv1lf0ue7bm4vdlkh764t5vcoja48_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5h6aoj0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z43fff24eo7332l3ti4575342alsjit6b11g31bo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5h6aoj0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z541sg8v6k7ocshkc4kgcqn5dbte7usdehp1v788_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5h6aoj0cdh2bs)

Amber and her daughter's story doesn't end there, though.

When Amber contacted school officials, the administrators defended the counselor's actions. She also learned that school personnel had already been referring to Amber's daughter with a different name and different pronouns.

_**" This is unacceptable: a school employee secretly encouraged my daughter to change her gender and hide it from me. The school never stopped trying to keep me in the dark at every turn, repeatedly stonewalling me when I tried to find out what was going on. My parental rights aren't up for debate: I deserve to know what's happening to my child in school."**_
-- Amber Lavigne

Now, we're demanding the school board investigate the counselor's actions and force them to accept parental rights as defined by law. **The school 's actions toward Amber and her daughter aren't just wrong -- _they 're unconstitutional_.**

Parents have a fundamental right to control and direct their children's education, upbringing, and healthcare decisions. The Goldwater Institute is leading the effort to protect parental rights in courts and force schools to stop this radical trend in gender ideology.

[_**You can help the Goldwater Institute support the rights of parents today with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or even $100. Friend, please help me support families like Amber and her daughter. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0njmvgm1iv3kc6ios2uvtvoqnmhmdjt71t3tcfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5h6aoj0cdh2bs)

No other organization has done more to defend parental rights than the Goldwater Institute:

* We helped concerned parents get the answers they deserved after school districts charged them thousands of dollars just to find out what was being taught in their kids' schools.

* We're actively dismantling the power of teacher unions by leading the nation in passing school choice legislation so that kids can receive the education that best fits their needs.

* We're defeating Critical Race Theory (CRT) and woke nonsense in the classroom.

* We created the blueprint for conservatives to tie education funding to students instead of sending your tax dollars to radical administrators and school boards.

* We've transformed Arizona into the most pro-school choice state in the country and brought school choice legislation to 22 other states.

As schools try to ramp up woke indoctrination like CRT and gender ideology, _the rights of parents are more important than ever_.

[_**Friend**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu6mcl5923jlbhhhqn41lec7u55void8sgloh320_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5h6aoj0cdh2bs)[ _**, will you help us protect the rights of parents by sending a gift of $10, $35, $100, or any amount today? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2eu8sk3jtg9qr1s8iki1eoas6ncra71fg9n2oug_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5h6aoj0cdh2bs)

Thank you,

Victor Riches
President & CEO
Goldwater Institute

**Here’s everything you need to know about the latest developments in our fight to protect Social Security:**
**_FIRST_** , Republicans across the country began to put Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security on the chopping block.

**_THEN_** , in a heated exchange during the State of the Union, President Biden got Republican lawmakers to agree NOT to touch Social Security benefits in the next round of budget cuts.

**_NOW_** , I’m calling on 5,000 fearless fighters to join me in urging Congress to stay true to their word and protect Social Security.
**I’ll be honest, Peter: I’ve seen Republican lawmakers go back on their word _dozens_ of times. **But, with nearly 3.7 MILLION New Yorkers currently depending on Social Security benefits, we CANNOT let them go back on their word.

**This isn’t about politics. This is about _real people_ who could fall into poverty if Republicans gut Social Security. So I have to ask: [Will you sign my petition now to urge Congress to protect Social Security? Radical liberal Judge Protasiewicz has already spent millions blasting the airwaves with lying attacks against conservative Justice Dan Kelly.
---
She’s trying to hide the truth about her criminals first record from voters to try to sway them before Election Day.
---
Justice Kelly has just placed his first ad buy, fighting back with ads of his own to expose the far-Left agenda of Protasiewicz.
---
_But with Protasiewicz and her millions, we need your help to level the playing field so they don’t completely drown us out on the airwaves._
---

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Will you help me prepare for 2024, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Ohio is already shaping up to be a must-win battleground.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60511345/397337651/-880503781?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230321-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmMWY3NWJiLWZkYzctZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6kZ9cmXtzlHanHXxAqa1TKZfj0Yj67Tk8a7EjZGLYeM=)
---
I’m up for re-election in 2024, Peter, and as one of just three Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. _(There’s already a wealthy Republican state senator considering running against me.)_

NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than this year’s Senate race in Ohio -- and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent.

In fact, 2023 has just begun and already an opponent has jumped into the race and the NRSC is running attack ads against me.

[_**Peter, this is going to be my toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can win in Ohio. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Fight for Progress as we begin the new year?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60511346/397337652/-880503781?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230321-1-EM&amount=26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmMWY3NWJiLWZkYzctZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6kZ9cmXtzlHanHXxAqa1TKZfj0Yj67Tk8a7EjZGLYeM=)

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families.

I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago – a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do.

Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by.

That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about, Peter. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do -- whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips -- your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you.

[_**I need you in this fight, too, Peter. It won’t be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, I know we can do this. Please consider chipping in our average online contribution of $26 -- or whatever amount makes the most sense for you.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60511347/397337653/-880503781?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230321-1-EM&amount=26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmMWY3NWJiLWZkYzctZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6kZ9cmXtzlHanHXxAqa1TKZfj0Yj67Tk8a7EjZGLYeM=)

With gratitude,

Sherrod

* * *

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I could honestly say my life sucked
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
The first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

---
| Peter,

I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that.

Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines and now in Congress.

The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.

As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.

I’m going to need your help because, unless we’re in this together, we’re going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:

[_**Can you please split a $5 contribution between BACKROADS PAC and my United States Senate campaign today? clean_body: The first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left. | Peter, I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left. Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that. Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name just two. Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines and now in Congress. The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals. As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone. I’m going to need your help because, unless we’re in this together, we’re going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please: = | | | = | = | = | = | = The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do yet, either. Time: 1:30 PMAdopt the My Student, My Choice Act LB 177 is the My Student, My Choice Act. The bill creates the Follow the Student Fund to be administered by the State Treasurer. Each year the State Treasurer would transfer 55 percent of the total adjusted per pupil costs for educating students in the State of Nebraska into the fund. Each student would apply for an account with the State Treasurer and the State Treasurer would deposit 55 percent of the per pupil cost into each student's account. Students or their parent(s) would be issued a smartcard whereby they would be able to access the money in their account and use it exclusively for educational purposes, including private school tuition, curriculum and educational supplies. Those attending a public school would be required to use the monies in their account to pay for their tuition at the public school where the student is enrolled.Each school district would be able to levy a tax on properties located within the school district in order
to generate revenues equal to 45 percent of the adjusted per pupil cost for all of the students enrolled in
the school district in order to cover the operational costs of the school district for the ensuing year. This tax would be known as the common school tax. Whenever a school district finds that it needs additional revenues, the school board would hold a public hearing during the month of July, and upon approval by the the school board, the school district would be limited to raising the tax levy by 2.5 percent of the adjusted per pupil cost.The bill also establishes the School Stabilization Fund. Each year the State Treasurer would transfer revenues into the School Stabilization Fund as directed by the Legislature, but the balance of the School Stabilization Fund would not be able to exceed 35 percent of the amount allocated to the Follow the Student Fund. Whenever the balance exceeds 35 percent of the Follow the Student Fund, the State Treasurer would directed to transfer the excess amount into the State's Cash Reserve Fund. Revenues from the School Stabilization Fund would be distributed to school districts according to the Tax Equity and Educational Opportunities Support Act (TEEOSA). clean_body: BIG WEEK AHEAD! For Your Situational Awareness Legislation Happening March 20-25, 2023 TUESDAY 21 MARCH LB177 Erdman Education Location: Roo | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | 108th Legislative Session"2ND HOUSE ALERT/WEEKLY UPDATE"March 21, 2023 | | | | BIG WEEK AHEAD! For Your Situational AwarenessLegislation Happening March 20-25, 2023 TUESDAY 21 MARCH Location: Room 1525 Time: 1:30 PMAdopt the My Student, My Choice Act LB 177 is the My Student, My Choice Act. The bill creates the Follow the Student Fund to be administered by the State Treasurer. Each year the State Treasurer would transfer 55 percent of the total adjusted per pupil costs for educating students in the State of Nebraska into the fund. Each student would apply for an account with the State Treasurer and the State Treasurer would deposit 55 percent of the per pupil cost into each student's account. Students or their parent(s) would be issued a smartcard whereby they would be able to access the money in their account and use it exclusively for educational purposes, including private school tuition, curriculum and educational supplies. Those attending a public school would be required to use the monies in their account to pay for their tuition at the public school where the student is enrolled.Each school district would be able to levy a tax on properties located within the school district in order to generate revenues equal to 45 percent of the adjusted per pupil cost for all of the students enrolled in the school district in order to cover the operational costs of the school district for the ensuing year. This tax would be known as the common school tax. Whenever a school district finds that it needs additional revenues, the school board would hold a public hearing during the month of July, and upon approval by the the school board, the school district would be limited to raising the tax levy by 2.5 percent of the adjusted per pupil cost.The bill also establishes the School Stabilization Fund. Each year the State Treasurer would transfer revenues into the School Stabilization Fund as directed by the Legislature, but the balance of the School Stabilization Fund would not be able to exceed 35 percent of the amount allocated to the Follow the Student Fund. Whenever the balance exceeds 35 percent of the Follow the Student Fund, the State Treasurer would directed to transfer the excess amount into the State's Cash Reserve Fund. Revenues from the School Stabilization Fund would be distributed to school districts according to the Tax Equity and Educational Opportunities Support Act (TEEOSA). WEDNESDAY 22 MARCH ELECTION BILLS!!Government, Military and Veterans Affairs Location: Room 1525 Time: 1:30 PM is a bill to require video surveillance of voting and provide anti-tampering and anti-counterfeiting requirements for paper ballots, vote scanning devices, and vote tabulating equipment. establishes requirements that voting systems in Nebraska be made in the United States of America to ensure election integrity. 808 would permit election commissioners and county clerks to use hand counts or machine counts for elections and recounts. LB808 also allows candidates to require a hand count of ballots of the election results if they fall within the margin authorizing them to request an official recount of the election results. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60511689/397338730/-1486997045?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQ1YjllN2ItZmVjNy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NBa0WI7SDlyAL6uXfuZhIbV_uVTZ6Ye3suBALSS3G0s=) Happy Women’s History Month, Peter! My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip. When I first came to Congress in 2013, there weren’t many women serving alongside me. Multiple times, I was stopped and mistaken for someone’s spouse, and I had a hard time even getting into the Chamber. Thankfully, walking through the halls of Congress in 2023 is much different. **There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 94 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone!** I’ve been adamant about helping elect more women to Congress, because the truth is that for generations, we’ve failed to address the persistent challenges faced by women, especially by women of color. **And with MAGA extremists in the House majority threatening to take us back even further, the stakes of our work couldn’t be higher. ** [_**That’s why I’m writing to you today, Peter. We need strong women in Congress, and I’m asking you to support that effort by splitting a contribution between my campaign and HER Time to elect more women into office.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60511694/397338738/-1486997045?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQ1YjllN2ItZmVjNy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NBa0WI7SDlyAL6uXfuZhIbV_uVTZ6Ye3suBALSS3G0s=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Katherine Clark and HER Time will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60511699/397338743/-1486997045?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQ1YjllN2ItZmVjNy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NBa0WI7SDlyAL6uXfuZhIbV_uVTZ6Ye3suBALSS3G0s=)

Effective leadership isn’t about individual ambition. It’s about our collective good.
Lifting up others is a core value of mine — I strongly believe that when we elect more women to positions of power, we _all_ do better.
**Together, HER Time and I will continue the fight for gender equity and women’s rights, and with your support, elect even more candidates who are committed to building the kind of country and future that our daughters deserve.**
[_**So please, if you can afford to, split a contribution today between my campaign and HER Time and help us fulfill the country’s promise of equality and opportunity for all.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60511726/397338796/-1486997045?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQ1YjllN2ItZmVjNy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NBa0WI7SDlyAL6uXfuZhIbV_uVTZ6Ye3suBALSS3G0s=)
Thank you for your support, Peter! I hope you take some time this month to reflect on our achievements, celebrate the women in your life, and recommit to building a stronger, more inclusive America.
All my best,
— Katherine
Representative Katherine Clark
Massachusetts 5th Congressional District
Democratic Whip

With no “off-years” in state elections and Republicans dumping **six figures** into critical special elections, we need as many grassroots supporters behind us as possible. name: 1776 Project PAC
subject: Elon Musk was right…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Can we count on you to help us pull off a major upset?

| | | This is why Elon Musk is one of the greatest minds today...
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b5f19d5d09fd46b99498fd7ad4bcad57&_e=u_VF5IMLMI9ZvqFEYYbFbsKN6plM-zEFMSEHF_LU9Og6Y8WobRYiU8d3MqlZe3yj9xKI171yOChQAhK2oeUVz_MYXwxmw3QTieXbfvQ7fc8sD4sbfxrXKRwN2P9Rp2baeCetDv_aJGvG7tv05MoepfiRbyRUdoq-xZGV7El6RZFDnyiIp2ziD3YVPbr-MYd1XWkVHrSJzWY1jdNzz0fsD3z7Mi8B_JKz_DB52F2AaCNa5JKow3XIbnA9nJLeOdEJBpwIsH2saM_EGSlXL9Q9hMmxUyVVBNG3kyNnHJeEc0DvnwbZNEWGWtB7RxPTgOX1pvbEgKpR6xoG2KmtWqpcM4cT_Cx4X0BOxUrxjKo9xh5FgL3KjJkYWaAjp669SQFsVVsijWQDAIuSxgjKUVAp2BFlh8vAt9Lb6mlQSG4Q1zHb0kLoVL73Ko7iaaN9CfgNgSNlplLX6Rw1qjCcKVn-ZA%3D%3D)
---
Elon is right - our children are being indoctrinated to hate America and espouse marxist ideas, and most parents don't even know it. But thankfully, we have a plan to put an end to the radical indoctrination in our schools and stand up for parents who are being kept in the dark. You may already know that the 1776 Project PAC was the first PAC of its kind; designed specifically to replace left wing school board members across the country. But what you may not know is that 2023 is the biggest election year for our schools on record. We're endorsing and supporting 250 conservative school board candidates! Friend, this is the largest school board election effort from any conservative organization in American HISTORY! And if we're going to pull this off- we need to know whether or not we can count on your support this year... Can we count on your support in pulling off the largest conservative school board sweep in American History?
---

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: I’d like to know your priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62463012:JudIQBGtN:m:1:3331421248:1F443AC03F89696DEAB80A925949E280:r)

[**2023 SENATE SURVEY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62463012:JudIQBGtN:m:1:3331421248:1F443AC03F89696DEAB80A925949E280:r)

******************************************************[OPEN YOUR SURVEY>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62463012:JudIQBGtN:m:1:3331421248:1F443AC03F89696DEAB80A925949E280:r)******************************************************
Peter,

I know we haven't touched base recently, but I wanted to reach out on behalf of the Senate Republicans because a new year brings new opportunities to get our country back on track.

Despite giving it our all last year, Chuck Schumer and the Democrats still hold the Senate majority. But let me make something abundantly clear - we will NEVER stop fighting for you and the issues that matter to you most.

Which is why I'm reaching out today. **[I want to hear directly from you about what policies you think the Senate needs to focus on first this year.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62463012:JudIQBGtN:m:1:3331421248:1F443AC03F89696DEAB80A925949E280:r)**
**[2023 SENATE SURVEY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62463012:JudIQBGtN:m:1:3331421248:1F443AC03F89696DEAB80A925949E280:r)**
[CAN A REPUBLICAN BEAT PRESIDENT BIDEN NEXT YEAR AND TAKE BACK THE WHITE HOUSE?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62463012:JudIQBGtN:m:1:3331421248:1F443AC03F89696DEAB80A925949E280:r)

******************************************************[YES>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62463012:JudIQBGtN:m:1:3331421248:1F443AC03F89696DEAB80A925949E280:r)******************************************************

******************************************************[NO>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62463012:JudIQBGtN:m:1:3331421248:1F443AC03F89696DEAB80A925949E280:r)******************************************************

******************************************************[OPEN YOUR SURVEY>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62463012:JudIQBGtN:m:1:3331421248:1F443AC03F89696DEAB80A925949E280:r)******************************************************
Patriot, it doesn't take a rocket scientist to know the Democrats liberal agenda is crippling our country. Now more than ever, what Washington needs is problem solvers who are willing to do whatever it takes to get things done for the American people.

I've seen firsthand that my Republican colleagues in the Senate are up for the challenge, but now we need to hear from you.

**[Please, let me know what policies you think the Senate should be focusing on, and I'll make sure we get to work.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62463012:JudIQBGtN:m:1:3331421248:1F443AC03F89696DEAB80A925949E280:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62463012:JudIQBGtN:m:1:3331421248:1F443AC03F89696DEAB80A925949E280:r)
Lindsey Graham
United States Senator from South Carolina

******************************************************[OPEN YOUR SURVEY>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62463012:JudIQBGtN:m:1:3331421248:1F443AC03F89696DEAB80A925949E280:r)******************************************************

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: An idea so big I need your help to get it passed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
body:
Last week, at the end of my statewide tour, I announced an idea so big that it will require Californians to vote on it as a ballot measure in 2024.

Friends —
Last week, at the end of my statewide tour, I announced an idea so big that it will require Californians to vote on it as a ballot measure in 2024.
I’m going to tell you what it is, and then I’m going to ask for your help to get it done. Here it is:
**I announced an initiative that will fundamentally transform the mental health system in this state. It’s a plan to take people with acute mental illness and substance abuse problems out of the shadows, out of encampments and into longer-term housing and treatment facilities they need to get better.**
This plan will create thousands of new beds, build more housing, expand services, and modernize the Mental Health Services Act.
The plan will save people’s lives. It will give peace of mind to their families. It will make our communities safer. No state has ever done anything at the level I am proposing. It is what we need to do to address the magnitude of this crisis statewide.
But I will need your help to get it done. This is a priority for me. I am asking for it to be a priority for you as well.
[**If you agree we need to get people with acute mental illness and substance abuse problems off the streets and into high-quality treatment facilities where they can get the care they need, I am asking you to contribute $3 to my ballot measure committee today to help get it done.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggm-em-march23-mental-health?refcode=em230321-1-t9-non&refcode2=1166_4767699_tYeOJT&akid=1166%2E4767699%2EtYeOJT)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggm-em-march23-mental-health?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em230321-1-t9-non&refcode2=1166_4767699_tYeOJT&akid=1166%2E4767699%2EtYeOJT)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggm-em-march23-mental-health?express_lane=true&refcode=em230321-1-t9-non&refcode2=1166_4767699_tYeOJT&akid=1166%2E4767699%2EtYeOJT)**
---
****
Forget the cynics out there who say we can’t save all these folks. That’s just not true.
We know what it takes to get it done.
You know... this is one of those issues where we are truly all in it together.
There’s not a human being reading this message that can’t lay claim to this issue. Some of us more intimately than others.
But it impacts ALL OF US.
And we’re not going to be able to help fix it without ALL OF US getting involved to make it happen.
So if it seems worth it to you that we do something to address the scale and magnitude of this crisis.
If you believe we can get people the help we need and save lives.
[**Then I am asking you to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today so we can pass this ballot measure and get it done.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggm-em-march23-mental-health?refcode=em230321-1-t9-non&refcode2=1166_4767699_tYeOJT&akid=1166%2E4767699%2EtYeOJT)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggm-em-march23-mental-health?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em230321-1-t9-non&refcode2=1166_4767699_tYeOJT&akid=1166%2E4767699%2EtYeOJT)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggm-em-march23-mental-health?express_lane=true&refcode=em230321-1-t9-non&refcode2=1166_4767699_tYeOJT&akid=1166%2E4767699%2EtYeOJT)**
---
****
The prospect of being able to turn people’s lives around is real. It exists.
Let's get it done.
Gavin

PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1166%2E4767699%2EtYeOJT).

body:
This is the most significant race in the country | | | Hey, Peter. The race for Wisconsin’s State Supreme Court is the most significant in the country. Yes, local elections are taking place across states – and all will have significant policy ramifications. But in Wisconsin, what is now a divided court will sway conservative or liberal depending on the April 4 general election. As the New York Times put it, _this election "will determine the fate of abortion rights, gerrymandered political maps and a range of voting rights issues in the battleground state."_ **These policies won't just affect Wisconsinites.** The state has been a crucial swing state in recent presidential elections – any ruling from the state's Supreme Court on election policy will have national impact. **Peter, Republicans know the significance of this election.** That's why they have poured millions of dollars into backing the conservative Justice Daniel Kelly over liberal Justice Janet Protasiewicz. Individuals, PACs, and other groups involved in **election disinformation** and **attempts to overturn the 2020 election** results have contributed more than $3.9 million toward supporting Justice Kelly's campaign. Justice Kelly himself is [_reported_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDJtWGW1u1NjOC8y8DBdqDob6Vlr7C1pVZxl62Hs_2se99aKCLTpG03wcYSEkh2kbNmkF2CwZxXBwxbGE4L-RoFr9r7ravJ0Kvw58FCE8CI-XhTa8pxNvG8y9YAWAzRJ-_AavHdrGPajBfuwJvSFNOSrF6WFIX-Ndhx7P_VTlUxpevhMxrRdcdAAKKgRgeRdX8sMoN2VPlYOkadp58gySI3r3TyhBw_2GS-PeFOaOYrp42IC1NCdQZSv3qk3pj6PNpAMTrj7mApYFnw_LjK5oqADdvgLMZJ9J2jqYbZKJoQPpcw58DJh1ovrLpEo37gOTXNT0B-mtf49C3OYyfl5xj8QjVWpaJ9LNnj1c5kAHB5v77fJzGuPfKKBTglSdahrYG1KsD469dzyfG5oP0RD-f0w/3uo/SZeajgQhTQutXnADuUHeSA/h0/uulIHXEFEiEx43hAr6II5jJ7lk5mMEj6fYXgo034F-Y) to have advised the Republican Party on "fake electors." **_[We can't afford for the GOP to control the Wisconsin Supreme Court. Election Day is fast approaching, and we need to do all we can to combat the election deniers pouring millions into this race. Will you split a contribution to protect the Wisconsin Supreme Court, abortion rights, and election integrity?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zc44LZV2api6sgGKzUmnD16OEwPgORrghdZPTbVZhQ3GJKLqzbo8jseNR8p3VDyOiV5TeOiONKu6Vj-SX51tBGPwoNbYxhIoahJEIm137CwAsWeKdJYScia3LLIdi9JFZZp2SlLNB0WHeY2kF_4NzsIF3fwVhOjGb4gbCc3MTaRItLMelIIP1sk72Vo3wZfpJ6HAXbz8dNG1y9IsSge5rB0VbgTzcUNDbX3Zkh9sWsG08tgn6MolpA4jXNMtsTSWmj0R3ZtIG4tnpJ25u_M9davO_FMYL7ulF0SDjalUITUbpcdKATfP3aEchu4n4-j7nXRciOA7bGsrnu8-XQJvxN/3uo/SZeajgQhTQutXnADuUHeSA/h1/J_OoRSZg_fhR_8MoEvpZXkx-8RV8nsXeiwIEhXJzFqA)_** **[Contribute](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zc44LZV2api6sgGKzUmnD16OEwPgORrghdZPTbVZhQ3GJKLqzbo8jseNR8p3VDyOgdkJq0OC6jEYX_RuY9zPHXwkmujhRbYLCcIeS20JhHVCpRGmDpP8wLF5VJcKAvOTxaA8_EDltZCb2H4EC91S1Jp1Ig4OXeXRRMpcOwf2HJWp8h6boXCR4flBY4jdAJNdWQSk6LqPOWQQmS0XKPQJ25Usq03bkaDChhG7HisC6OiBsQRTIaS_xcfuzg1yDhn7I-R15tC0daR5KKD7PgnN4oeNJqcxDucLhRkqsnwZTS_M-Lyv9f__NLl-fM6ocsvvWHue9lydgJXVEKaJQ-awj8/3uo/SZeajgQhTQutXnADuUHeSA/h2/HfHpfLJf75LLW7_g-Dnj8GLScr5RGZ7o8bfQwMr1mzE)** Thank you for supporting a just Wisconsin Supreme Court. — The URD Election Watch Team

clean_body: This is the most significant race in the country | | | Hey, Peter. The race for Wisconsin’s State Supreme Court is the most significant in the country. Yes, local elections are taking place across states – and all will have significant policy ramifications. But in Wisconsin, what is now a divided court will sway conservative or liberal depending on the April 4 general election. As the New York Times put it, this election "will determine the fate of abortion rights, gerrymandered political maps and a range of voting rights issues in the battleground state." These policies won't just affect Wisconsinites. The state has been a crucial swing state in recent presidential elections – any ruling from the state's Supreme Court on election policy will have national impact. Peter, Republicans know the significance of this election. That's why they have poured millions of dollars into backing the conservative Justice Daniel Kelly over liberal Justice Janet Protasiewicz. Individuals, PACs, and other groups involved in election disinformation and attempts to overturn the 2020 election results have contributed more than $3.9 million toward supporting Justice Kelly's campaign. Justice Kelly himself is to have advised the Republican Party on "fake electors." Thank you for supporting a just Wisconsin Supreme Court. — The URD Election Watch Team United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?
