| **Fellow Patriot,** **I don't know if you are aware, but we are in fight down in Richmond. A fight against the Leftist Democrats that are doing all they can to prevent strong conservative legislation from being passed in the Senate. My colleagues and I have been fighting tooth and nail to make sure we are standing up for our conservative values and getting legislation passed that represents our strong conservative principles. BUT I NEED YOUR HELP. ** **Even after being ranked _The Most Conservative Senator in all of Virginia by CPAC_ , I still have a progressive republican challenging me in a Republican Firehouse Primary on May 6th. A Progressive Republican opponent who just last night stated that he believes in censuring the first amendment rights of Republican business owners. A constitutional right that our fellow Republicans in the Supreme Court ruled to defend back in 2010. ** **WE MUST TAKE A STAND TO THIS RHETORIC. ** **If you are not already aware, the end of the month is quickly approaching, and that means so is my biggest deadline of the year. ** **My progressive republican opponent has had 2 months to fundraise while I could not. That was because I was in session working for you, and legally could not raise money for my re-election campaign. Now I am behind and _I NEED YOUR HELP!_** **Every dollar we raise is another yard sign we can buy, another voter we can reach. If we are going to take back the Senate Majority in November,_IT IS ESSENTIAL WE WIN ON MAY 6th._ ** **Whatever you can give, whether that is _$5_ , **[**_$28_**](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fdonate/2/0100018704f648c8-c2c0480d-c1d6-458f-9c2d-b56ebb48226c-000000/yULE7sYY7aq5TNIhB35S0fFUy9E=314)**,**[**_$228,_**](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fdonate/3/0100018704f648c8-c2c0480d-c1d6-458f-9c2d-b56ebb48226c-000000/uMb8x7gyyqYOhuYJM2B8xD1tVoU=314)**or**[** _$2,0_**](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fdonate/4/0100018704f648c8-c2c0480d-c1d6-458f-9c2d-b56ebb48226c-000000/fOioHHWMrcsz4KrhCyXhwKcXIHI=314)** _28_ anything will help me in reaching my March goals.** **Thank you to all of the great patriots who have already contributed to our cause! We must do all we can to ensure victory this November!** **I ask that you please keep me in your prayers, and I look forward to having your support for the May 6th Primary. ** **Your Humble Servant,**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Vicious lies on the airwaves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464458:JyUZsBGJN:m:1:3371812801:DFD4F891D9D49CDE6667A572A2599F5A:r)
|

Peter,

The election is almost two years away, but the attack ads against me have already started!

My first question for you is, why would the RADICAL LEFT take this unprecedented action? Something tells me they must be really worried about something we're doing, something we're uncovering.

My next question for you is: Does the left think we're **_not_** going to fight back against their lies? **[Let me know where you stand!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464458:JyUZsBGJN:m:1:3371812801:DFD4F891D9D49CDE6667A572A2599F5A:r) **

[**DEFEND JIM JORDAN
FROM LEFTIST ATTACKS -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464458:JyUZsBGJN:m:1:3371812801:DFD4F891D9D49CDE6667A572A2599F5A:r)
Throughout my life, I've been willing to take on opponents much bigger than me. I've stood up to big government liberals and political bosses **(from both political parties**) in defense of timeless American principles like Freedom, Personal Responsibility, and Accountability.

Another thing I've learned over the years is that **big tech and big business can be just as bad as big government, especially when they use their power to try to rig the system in their favor.**

Our work to expose and hold people accountable for this corruption **is what triggered the attack ads against us in our home district**. It didn't take much research to figure out that the attack ads are sponsored by the well-funded organization of one of Ohio's leading liberal activists.

With the LEFT pulling out all stops to defeat us, there are two things I know for certain:
* These attacks will be relentless, and
* I'm not backing down from them!

[**DEFEND JIM JORDAN
FROM LEFTIST ATTACKS -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464458:JyUZsBGJN:m:1:3371812801:DFD4F891D9D49CDE6667A572A2599F5A:r)
When tech giants collude with big government, **it's dangerous for every American.** We're working day and night to uncover the truth, but they're digging in their claws and trying to make an example of me. I hope you agree that there's a lot at stake for our country, and **[I'm going to need your help in fighting back.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464458:JyUZsBGJN:m:1:3371812801:DFD4F891D9D49CDE6667A572A2599F5A:r)**

It's a great honor to stand in the gap for you and your family! **[Please let me know if you are able to help!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464458:JyUZsBGJN:m:1:3371812801:DFD4F891D9D49CDE6667A572A2599F5A:r) **

God Bless,
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464459:JyUZsBGJN:m:1:3371812801:DFD4F891D9D49CDE6667A572A2599F5A:r)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464458:JyUZsBGJN:m:1:3371812801:DFD4F891D9D49CDE6667A572A2599F5A:r)

---

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

subject: The American response to the Great Reset
body:
This is one of my biggest fights yet.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653705%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g%2fPOgMnZnp9l5d8TNka%2fzg&sysid=1)
---

[_**I just launched a MASSIVE survey to learn what my supporters think about Kevin McCarthy and his new MAGA Majority. And I’ve personally selected you to be one of the FIRST to submit your response, share your insights, and help us make sure this is Republicans’ LAST term in power. Will you take 30 seconds to complete my survey before midnight? I can’t overstate how much I’m relying on your insight to shape our Democratic strategy going forward. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60515090/397351616/-1345058517?source=20230321_em_pet_b1_pelosi_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGVmYWNhMC0wNWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4B0b-jHMlhAkYZVqwfOM1i3H54MsUBhWWBxKoOo-l4=&emci=07bb5358-5dc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f0efaca0-05c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16320219)

So much has happened since Republicans squeaked out their House Majority, so I need to touch base with my best supporters. First, Kevin McCarthy failed 14 times (!!!) to become Speaker and embarrassed us on the world stage. [**Then, McCarthy raised $12.3 MILLION to protect his Majority – right after his MAGA Republicans HECKLED our President at the State of the Union.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60515091/397351617/-1345058517?source=20230321_em_pet_b1_pelosi_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGVmYWNhMC0wNWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4B0b-jHMlhAkYZVqwfOM1i3H54MsUBhWWBxKoOo-l4=&emci=07bb5358-5dc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f0efaca0-05c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16320219) It’s never been more clear: McCarthy isn’t just beholden to extremists. He’s chosen his side, and Democrats need to hold him accountable and make him regret it. [_**I’ve personally selected you to be one of the FIRST to take my survey and help shape Democrats’ path to victory. Can I count on you to submit your feedback before midnight? I need 50,000 of my top supporters to share their insights to help me get an accurate sample size and build an unbeatable Democratic strategy. Your insight in these early days is critical to Democrats' path to take back the House and defend our progress. I’m counting on your feedback more than you know. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60515092/397351618/-1345058517?source=20230321_em_pet_b1_pelosi_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGVmYWNhMC0wNWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4B0b-jHMlhAkYZVqwfOM1i3H54MsUBhWWBxKoOo-l4=&emci=07bb5358-5dc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f0efaca0-05c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16320219) [****NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60515093/397351619/-1345058517?source=20230321_em_pet_b1_pelosi_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGVmYWNhMC0wNWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4B0b-jHMlhAkYZVqwfOM1i3H54MsUBhWWBxKoOo-l4=&emci=07bb5358-5dc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f0efaca0-05c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16320219)
| [**KEVIN McCARTHY & MAGA REPUBLICANS: APPROVAL POLL**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60515094/397351620/-1345058517?source=20230321_em_pet_b1_pelosi_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGVmYWNhMC0wNWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4B0b-jHMlhAkYZVqwfOM1i3H54MsUBhWWBxKoOo-l4=&emci=07bb5358-5dc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f0efaca0-05c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16320219)

I promise to make this quick.
It is absolutely critical to get your feedback on the first couple months of this MAGA Majority – so we can ensure this is their last term in power for DECADES to come.
My team needs to hear what grassroots supporters like you think about Kevin McCarthy and his Republicans so we can devise a strategy to BEAT them.
[_**Which is why I just launched my BIGGEST survey of 2023. I need feedback from 50,000 strong Democrats before midnight tonight to get an accurate sample size, identify Republicans’ weaknesses, and compile the results we need to strengthen our strategy and WIN going forward. It would mean so much if you could take 30 seconds to share your feedback with me before midnight. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60515095/397351621/-1345058517?source=20230321_em_pet_b1_pelosi_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGVmYWNhMC0wNWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4B0b-jHMlhAkYZVqwfOM1i3H54MsUBhWWBxKoOo-l4=&emci=07bb5358-5dc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f0efaca0-05c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16320219)
I’m looking forward to reading your responses!
Nancy

Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Kevin McCarthy. Donald J. Trump March 20th, 2023
**Mar-a-Lago, FL** — President Donald J. Trump announced his plan to end Joe Biden’s war on America’s suburbs in a new Agenda47 video. Biden’s proposed rule that every state, county, and city submit “equity plans” to the federal government will push the American dream out of reach for countless American families.

[ ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9TstuhDAM_Bq4BQXnBYccukW9rNRre02IWdImwBIoar--YVVVsjz22DMa1LVULa8Vl7J0WsBQ09JroMAog7qWvKVNJUUrJDKR2ZoxawpOHabPeXDzZIL72NY9LlU_x3LUtFXQ9ML2YKChlqKlVlDHh565BkGVQY_btqSCPRXwkitrbcBTnZcvcD_0PhNzw8kZrkgGP92I9Q6nRA6zknki24gk7XZfbcqz2ciypxHTgzcRV9-bibgVTSTDXo1bDOWq3XL4EHySKse_RePDI7GJS_DDty7UpQAYvUsZHuHgyi_vr_L6du3I0cGddFLw47zCc-7b94L_r38uFZ6-J6u6X2Pqayg)
[Watch President Trump’s plan to stop Biden’s War on the Suburbs](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9TstuhDAM_Bq4BQXnBYccukW9rNRre02IWdImwBIoar--YVVVsjz22DMa1LVULa8Vl7J0WsBQ09JroMAog7qWvKVNJUUrJDKR2ZoxawpOHabPeXDzZIL72NY9LlU_x3LUtFXQ9ML2YKChlqKlVlDHh565BkGVQY_btqSCPRXwkitrbcBTnZcvcD_0PhNzw8kZrkgGP92I9Q6nRA6zknki24gk7XZfbcqz2ciypxHTgzcRV9-bibgVTSTDXo1bDOWq3XL4EHySKse_RePDI7GJS_DDty7UpQAYvUsZHuHgyi_vr_L6du3I0cGddFLw47zCc-7b94L_r38uFZ6-J6u6X2Pqayg)

“The woke left is waging full scale war on the suburbs, and their Marxist crusade is coming for your neighborhood, your tax dollars, your public safety, and your home,” President Trump said. “When I get back into the Oval Office, one of my first acts will be to repeal Joe Biden's radical left attack on the suburban lifestyle.”

Biden’s extremist agenda to destroy America’s suburbs calls for the federal government to abolish zoning for single family homes, destroy property values by building giant multifamily apartment complexes in the suburbs, and force communities to pay for low-income housing developments.

This Biden power grab will put radical left-wing bureaucrats in charge of [micromanaging Americans’ neighborhoods and communities](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9T8tuxCAM_JrkRsQrZDnk0G3Uy0q9tldYnEBLQgpEaP--ZFVVsix7PB6PYSRikJwMXIjWjD2dCW7dSDFlmFFCBJf40ole9gJYX1HCmFYNxwbSd5hN2JQ3Xzke697dw9rakWjAA0iFBVFUXwxXZGbygumMmdRatn60Oe-pYS8NfatRSukUuC7EpXZhR2BSLbQzsCXkVYaUUbHq_o1URtkCSoc-ok6oOO_R3aptAfQIR0QbuMXqEG0IBs0hPtklxARVsI2j2c8Vl8RQP1hW5fzTtFp37-bH2AzXhlLrzvv06Y_e-PXzXdw-bhMqE_1Bk-h5Oaf0teb82OGf-qfSwal7osP0C6bjbBU) .

**_ PRESIDENT TRUMP WILL STOP BIDEN’S WAR ON THE SUBURBS _ **
** **
** BIDEN’S WAR ON THE SUBURBS: The Biden administration has proposed a new rule that would result in a federal takeover of the suburbs. **

Biden recently proposed a [ rule ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9T8tuhDAM_Bq4gRLnARxy2C3qBanX9polDqQNj4awaP--YbWqZNmeGcseo6KyajituJS5UQIsJblTQIARBpRK3pC6lKIREplILGXspjNODG4_izXLrL35jmGf1rJfpnxUgA2YHoFyomkvode9FnVNbpxbQkWdezXGuG4Zu2TwnuI4jtKiwaB9wMFtEUM5LPekmKXfJ5zjlvrTUSoEztS8iIIQCSIBba0Lk47ujv5R2D3EEYObh8JqF4px2bcE8qDMejjv3Sar9MIwaeefrvW0emcfKquuGcDoTLoIT4PQ8evXh-w-u7Y4WvgtWin4carwlnJ8rPg_-tpS4rn3ZKv2D8x1aO4) that will require every state, county, city, and town to submit a so-called “equity” plan to impose the left’s Marxist housing agenda on your communities.

This Biden power grab will put radical left-wing bureaucrats in charge of [ micromanaging Americans’ neighborhoods and communities ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9T8tuxCAM_JrkRsQrZDnk0G3Uy0q9tldYnEBLQgpEaP--ZFVVsix7PB6PYSRikJwMXIjWjD2dCW7dSDFlmFFCBJf40ole9gJYX1HCmFYNxwbSd5hN2JQ3Xzke697dw9rakWjAA0iFBVFUXwxXZGbygumMmdRatn60Oe-pYS8NfatRSukUuC7EpXZhR2BSLbQzsCXkVYaUUbHq_o1URtkCSoc-ok6oOO_R3aptAfQIR0QbuMXqEG0IBs0hPtklxARVsI2j2c8Vl8RQP1hW5fzTtFp37-bH2AzXhlLrzvv06Y_e-PXzXdw-bhMqE_1Bk-h5Oaf0teb82OGf-qfSwal7osP0C6bjbBU) .

The Biden administration will use the power of the federal government to abolish zoning for single-family homes and destroy property values by building giant multi-family apartment complexes in the suburbs.

Biden’s new rule would allow unelected Washington bureaucrats to [ coerce ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9T8tuxCAM_JrkRsQrZDnk0G3Uy0q9tldYnEBLQgpEaP--ZFVVsix7PB6PYSRikJwMXIjWjD2dCW7dSDFlmFFCBJf40ole9gJYX1HCmFYNxwbSd5hN2JQ3Xzke697dw9rakWjAA0iFBVFUXwxXZGbygumMmdRatn60Oe-pYS8NfatRSukUuC7EpXZhR2BSLbQzsCXkVYaUUbHq_o1URtkCSoc-ok6oOO_R3aptAfQIR0QbuMXqEG0IBs0hPtklxARVsI2j2c8Vl8RQP1hW5fzTtFp37-bH2AzXhlLrzvv06Y_e-PXzXdw-bhMqE_1Bk-h5Oaf0teb82OGf-qfSwal7osP0C6bjbBU) over 1,200 cities and counties into complying with their mandates rather than allowing each community to make decisions based on their individual needs.

Instead of promoting housing fairness, these regulations will push the American dream out of reach for countless minority families.

From 2010-2020, the largest growth in the suburbs came from racial minorities, including Hispanic Americans and Black Americans. A [ majority ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9j7tuwzAMRb_G3mTorWTw0NToEqBru-rlWI1suaJcw39fJSgKECRxSRzc63si1ZkTxaVsXS_oSHAbeoopw4wSIvkZnzopzkJ6JqpKGDO64dh5uKfRpUVH91XyNq-dTXM79SNz1mCt6Ekpc2LWaMGZMYLYkRmOfRv7qZQVGvbS0Lda-753Jqd0D8sNOu-2qmUPXmc71bUkpw9AsJktG0A6ewTHbFIMFqUR6dnnYDWgHKACkAs_PkMoB9KopsDI-gU2QGvKJetQKrHNvVv3EGMAqWqU26xDfLrX8xrDePSNujSUTsFBHU-j9Movn-_y-nEd0D7QbzRIwffHlb7WXo7V_7_-UTr_4D5UNfwCv89wLA) of Black and Hispanic Americans now live in the suburbs.

** DESTROYING COMMUNITIES: Biden has a long history of waging war on homeownership and the suburban way of life. **

The Obama-Biden administration issued the Affirmatively Furthering Fair Housing rule (AFFH), which stripped local communities of their decision-making authority.

Like Biden’s new housing rule, AFFH [ would have destroyed our suburbs ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9js1uwyAQhJ_GvmHxY6A-cEhq9RKp1_aKzTqmwcYFHJQ-fXFUVVrtjmZWnwYUEbJriWyFqI3idCK4topiyjCjhIi2wy-N4B0XwHhxCWODrlpsIN78ZPyqnflKYV-2ZvRLPaup1ZhgwTQnknVadkYIMwx8FIyacSC1U3NKW6zYqaJvZXLOzaqTPVAB7hbyQSrB6MMKoYhFx2jvgK7-DmFdYE3oUAH0OCM_6JIjPU0zCrsD5PeEYtKrgwe67SH9FEIdlNmydc5GIUv766KtexbWy-bs9FCVPFeUztbEcp7d6KU9f76Ly8elR7mn36gXvM1HSl_LTo8N_l__KA0c3MOV_S_BX2vb) by imposing crippling regulations on local governments and communities and allowing the federal government to dictate local zoning decisions.

Biden’s 2021 infrastructure bill included [ plans ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9jstuwyAQRb_G3mHxJl6waGp1E6nbdosDJNNi7AIpSr--OKoqjeY9Z67TRKqRE8Wl7K0W1BPcg6aYMswoIZKP-DBIMQrpmGhdwthsOo6ty5-rt2s0wX6UdFu24bwu_VXPfKaYi5E0xqgoFp4clKTsgL3kSok-6GspW-7YU0dfmtVah2gK7KjkvsHVndQG5zVFl1oyg3UxI4g-mdx-ncstOTRDCMjAklFZkYsWZYiX4JA3C4Q7-lljq9t1n7TdaluGLFVTflkMhIdYs2wB_F136thRegWbW3jooid-fH-Vp7fThOpEv9AkBa_7lD43X-6b-1_9owxu5-5dNf0CYE5ojA) to coerce state and local jurisdictions to eliminate single-family zoning.

We're committed to having a massive year in 2023, and with gun-grabbers in Washington feeling as emboldened as ever, _we will need it._ The fate of the Second Amendment hangs in the balance, and it's up to us to save it.

**We rely heavily on the input of law-abiding gun owners like YOU, so we're asking that you complete our****Official Survey on Gun Verification****IMMEDIATELY.**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464474:JjV5TBGhN:m:1:3365131770:1BD7DC76D17D4D0A7EA76A7AD74B58A5:r)**
It's no secret that these are trying times for our Second Amendment. _The Executive Branch's current occupants are the most anti-firearm group of government officials in American history._ If we're going to defeat their radical gun-grabbing agenda, we must band together.

**This survey will only take a few minutes to complete, but those few minutes will have an immense impact on our fight to save the Second Amendment.****Please complete it NOW while you still can.**

**[Complete the NRA's OFFICIAL SURVEY ON GUN VERIFICATION TODAY to help us move forward with the best possible strategy to SAVE THE SECOND AMENDMENT.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464474:JjV5TBGhN:m:1:3365131770:1BD7DC76D17D4D0A7EA76A7AD74B58A5:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

Peter,

The NRA needs YOU to see this.

As the nation's largest organization dedicated to defending the Second Amendment rights of EVERY American citizen, **we rely heavily on the input of law-abiding firearm owners like YOU.**

We're contacting you today for your input on our **[Official Survey on Gun Verification.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464474:JjV5TBGhN:m:1:3365131770:1BD7DC76D17D4D0A7EA76A7AD74B58A5:r)** _Without your response, our mission to defend your rights from the gun-grabbers will be even more difficult._
**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464474:JjV5TBGhN:m:1:3365131770:1BD7DC76D17D4D0A7EA76A7AD74B58A5:r)**
Our nation has reached a crossroads regarding gun rights; _never before have we seen such brazen attempts to disarm the American People._ If we're going to stop radical anti-gun politicians from DESTROYING the Second Amendment, we MUST have a plan.

Peter, can you step up and help the NRA form a winning strategy to protect YOUR rights?
**[GIVE YOUR INPUT»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464474:JjV5TBGhN:m:1:3365131770:1BD7DC76D17D4D0A7EA76A7AD74B58A5:r)**

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: In honor of Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
For me, honoring Women’s History Month means fighting for women and girls in Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60515592/397353289/574102528?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.21_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMxOWU1My0wOGM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OuvvrDv81XkXit3UPUgW9DmNa2t5hTFpvW8cD9SvCxU=)
---
Hi there, **March is Women’s History Month, a time when we come together to celebrate the contributions women have made to American history and to uplift the women in our lives.** **For me, honoring Women’s History Month means fighting for women and girls in Congress.** It means taking on the national mental health crisis impacting teenage girls, including the 1 in 3 high school girls who have considered suicide. It means pushing back against Republicans’ draconian abortion bans and attacks on our reproductive freedoms. It means advocating for paycheck fairness and closing the wage gap. It means standing up for trans women and trans girls when the radical right attempts to demonize them. I’m proud to have made history as the first Latina to represent Oregon in Congress _because women belong in all places where decisions are being made._ [**If you’re able, please consider chipping into my campaign today so that I can remain in Congress where I am fighting for equality and opportunity for the women and girls across Oregon’s Sixth District.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60515593/397353290/574102528?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.21_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMxOWU1My0wOGM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OuvvrDv81XkXit3UPUgW9DmNa2t5hTFpvW8cD9SvCxU=) Respectfully, _Andrea_
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60515594/397353291/574102528?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.21_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMxOWU1My0wOGM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OuvvrDv81XkXit3UPUgW9DmNa2t5hTFpvW8cD9SvCxU=)

clean_body: For me, honoring Women’s History Month means fighting for women and girls in Congress. = Hi there, March is Women’s History Month, a time when we come together to celebrate the contributions women have made to American history and to uplift the women in our lives. For me, honoring Women’s History Month means fighting for women and girls in Congress. It means taking on the national mental health crisis impacting teenage girls, including the 1 in 3 high school girls who have considered suicide. It means pushing back against Republicans’ draconian abortion bans and attacks on our reproductive freedoms. It means advocating for paycheck fairness and closing the wage gap. It means standing up for trans women and trans girls when the radical right attempts to demonize them. I’m proud to have made history as the first Latina to represent Oregon in Congress because women belong in all places where decisions are being made. = Respectfully, Andrea | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =

**BREAKING NEWS: _Ron DeSantis is neck and neck with Trump in a potential GOP primary match up_**
Friend, Ron DeSantis hasn't even announced his presidential campaign, and he's already polling closely with Trump. This race would be neck and neck.
A DeSantis presidency would be just as disastrous as reelecting Trump – if not even _more_ so. DeSantis has spent his time in power pushing one of the most extreme agendas in the country. He's attacked reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights, voting rights, and more.**We cannot let him take this hateful ideology to the White House.**
**But recent polling shows that DeSantis has a good chance at beating both Trump AND President Biden. **
**It's up to grassroots Democrats to stop DeSantis' momentum before he makes it to Washington. That's why we're calling on 5,000 Democrats to respond to our live poll before midnight tonight – and your response is missing. Please, respond immediately to make sure your voice is heard:**

name: Sarah, Fair Fight Action Volunteer
subject: How you can help fight voter suppression
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Fair Fight Action needs resources to respond whenever and wherever there are attacks on the freedom to vote. Can you chip in? |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60515704/397353857/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230320_f_personalvoices_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDM1ZmVhZS0wOGM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKVqiL05mRhQvJivZR3SCSlIxzzCldKRsRJ_rdO4ET4=&emci=3c4bbfa7-08c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5d35feae-08c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)

| | I’m Sarah, a long-time volunteer with Fair Fight Action. It’s nice to meet you virtually! I’ve been with Fair Fight Action since the beginning, volunteering in all things voter protection in one of the largest counties in Georgia. I do this work because I know how consequential voting is, and because no eligible voter should face any barriers keeping them from the ballot box. **Voter suppression infuriates me, but my passion for change fuels me to continue fighting!** It’s been years since my first time volunteering — years of being a volunteer liaison, mentoring other volunteers, and running dozens of text and phone banks — and my dedication has not changed. Volunteering is my contribution to help protect our freedom to vote, but that doesn’t mean it’s the only way you can be involved. We rely on thousands of donors every year to keep our work going. [_**Will you make a contribution today — even just $5 or $10 — to support Fair Fight Action’s organizing and advocacy?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60515705/397353858/-972217868?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230320_f_personalvoices_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDM1ZmVhZS0wOGM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKVqiL05mRhQvJivZR3SCSlIxzzCldKRsRJ_rdO4ET4=) | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60515706/397353859/-972217868?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230320_f_personalvoices_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDM1ZmVhZS0wOGM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKVqiL05mRhQvJivZR3SCSlIxzzCldKRsRJ_rdO4ET4=)
---
I’ve seen firsthand how Fair Fight Action makes an impact by listening to voters and lifting up their stories. When we make sure elected officials hear real stories from real people about what’s happening on the ground, we can get them to make positive changes in our elections process. And we can ensure more people can make their voices heard. I’m incredibly proud to be a volunteer with this vital organization.
Just in the past few weeks, our team leapt into action to help stop a slew of anti-voter bills in the Georgia state legislature, and Fair Fight Action will keep working alongside partners to protect the freedom to vote even after the end of the legislative session. **Our recent wins against threats to our democracy really reminded me why Fair Fight Action needs to be prepared to respond during critical moments, and a big part of our response comes down to resources.**
[**_Will you chip in a few dollars to help ensure Fair Fight Action can continue to respond whenever and wherever there are attacks on the freedom to vote?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60515707/397353860/-972217868?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230320_f_personalvoices_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDM1ZmVhZS0wOGM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKVqiL05mRhQvJivZR3SCSlIxzzCldKRsRJ_rdO4ET4=)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60515708/397353861/-972217868?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230320_f_personalvoices_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDM1ZmVhZS0wOGM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKVqiL05mRhQvJivZR3SCSlIxzzCldKRsRJ_rdO4ET4=)
---
It’s up to all of us to come together and ensure our democracy survives for our children and grandchildren.
Thanks so much for helping make Fair Fight Action’s work possible,
Sarah
Fair Fight Action Volunteer

clean_body: Fair Fight Action needs resources to respond whenever and wherever there are attacks on the freedom to vote. Can you chip in? | | | I’m Sarah, a long-time volunteer with Fair Fight Action. It’s nice to meet you virtually! I’ve been with Fair Fight Action since the beginning, volunteering in all things voter protection in one of the largest counties in Georgia. I do this work because I know how consequential voting is, and because no eligible voter should face any barriers keeping them from the ballot box. Voter suppression infuriates me, but my passion for change fuels me to continue fighting! It’s been years since my first time volunteering — years of being a volunteer liaison, mentoring other volunteers, and running dozens of text and phone banks — and my dedication has not changed. Volunteering is my contribution to help protect our freedom to vote, but that doesn’t mean it’s the only way you can be involved. We rely on thousands of donors every year to keep our work going. = | = I’ve seen firsthand how Fair Fight Action makes an impact by listening to voters and lifting up their stories. When we make sure elected officials hear real stories from real people about what’s happening on the ground, we can get them to make positive changes in our elections process. And we can ensure more people can make their voices heard. I’m incredibly proud to be a volunteer with this vital organization. Just in the past few weeks, our team leapt into action to help stop a slew of anti-voter bills in the Georgia state legislature, and Fair Fight Action will keep working alongside partners to protect the freedom to vote even after the end of the legislative session. Our recent wins against threats to our democracy really reminded me why Fair Fight Action needs to be prepared to respond during critical moments, and a big part of our response comes down to resources. = = It’s up to all of us to come together and ensure our democracy survives for our children and grandchildren. Thanks so much for helping make Fair Fight Action’s work possible, Sarah Fair Fight Action Volunteer Volunteer's name has been changed to protect her identity. | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02658%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CGtQ7t6EbtbRUAV1xglERQ&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02659%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bEf7q3Ey5F6uiKyzdNq47Q&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02658%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CGtQ7t6EbtbRUAV1xglERQ&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02650%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NVMpnG98wwxsa53pPTCfAw&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02658%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CGtQ7t6EbtbRUAV1xglERQ&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02651%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZU6uE%2b%2felGOTOzZycLKhKA&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02652%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Zzjh%2f3BxxAJjTwIJ89cFSg&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02653%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bYRaz8BqK7pZKA7nhZg7Sw&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

As Republicans plunge further into chaos and confusion at every level, the American people are paying the price. We need to elect Democrats at all levels who will put _People_ Over Politics. We need leaders who will bring our Democratic values to life. **I know that House Democrats will keep standing up against extremism and deliver for the American people. But extreme MAGA Republicans are trying every trick in their partisan playbook to stand in the way of progress, so it’s more important than ever that we elect more Democrats in state legislatures. The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Front Page News: Elissa on gun violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=62%2E135344%2ESsedyy)
Friend —
Unfortunately, Elissa has the distinction of being the only member of the House to have had two school shootings in her district.
After the recent tragedy at MSU, the sad truth is that she and her team knew exactly how the federal government could help in the wake of a shooting – because they had already been through this 15 months earlier with the tragedy at Oxford High School.
But beyond that, it also means Elissa has experienced the shifting sands of public opinion in Michigan — a state where many grow up with guns — firsthand. In her district, after two school shootings, she has heard from all kinds of people, including a ton of gun owners and Second Amendment supporters, that they think we should be able to do something to protect our kids. Among real people – that’s not a controversial stance.
Elissa recently talked to The Detroit News about how this has impacted her thinking – how she approaches politics not with the conventional wisdom that this is a polarizing, lightning rod issue, but instead with the no-brainer belief that most people just want to keep our kids safe. She thinks about this issue a bit differently than most Democrats, because she grew up with guns and carried a Glock and M-4 on her three tours in Iraq. If you’d like to hear more about her approach — and how she thinks that Washington politicians are the last ones to absorb the change taking place on the ground — you can take a closer look at the article by clicking here: [**https://t.co/SRYuYPbwnN**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/309?t=2&akid=62%2E135344%2ESsedyy)
The polarization around gun safety is part and parcel of the broken culture of politics that Elissa is running to change. Washington needs a new generation of leaders that think differently and act on this issue. We know that outside groups and special interests supportive of the gun lobby will spend big against Elissa in her campaign for Senate so we need to have her back as she fights for our safety.
[**For this reason and many others, please consider making a donation to Elissa’s campaign for Senate. Your support today will send a message to the special interests that there is deep support for Elissa and the work she is doing to make our communities safer.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar23.udOA3N&refcode=em230321-1-30&t=3&akid=62%2E135344%2ESsedyy)

name: Greater Georgia
subject: Greater Georgia Newsletter: March 21, 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5WkZOUwVveG7vVAKQqSbdJ8D0N3sXfCnz4IcfsXO3Bjp26K6OUkkKpRbsEoYXxBZ1obrbEteqIYv85EX4wUE4pWHJyxR4A0swlvTn_60Hp6z8sBmcTlcIfcuu6mt-XNSK4X0qZPat18iLHewqpCvZd3oxj2Q1as&c=HxBCiEDhoR8OCbtu90qpK8jmyIpuyw8EFkMEQHAgNKTWekVrcQuQrQ==&ch=hQQtSc3SaQR2ylYRhd7Cv5ugaa3oI62TYiOPgBJkqws1qXpGk3tpng==)
---
| |
---
| The Gold Dome Download Tuesday, March 21, 2023
We're officially counting down to Sine Die, or the the last day of legislative session - which is on Wednesday, March 29th. We are eager to see which bills pass both chambers over the coming days. In this edition of the Gold Dome Download, we're focusing on all things elections-- news, legislation, and Mableton's historic vote!
---
| |
---
| ELECTIONS NEWS
---
| ELECTIONS LEGISLATION: [SB 222](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5WkZOUwVveG7vVAKQqSbdJ8D0N3sXfCnz4IcfsXO3Bjp26K6OUkkEc24m3xDIuj0MqxpbsnCA5wmgPBrGdWTwi9pRxsGtz-sS7McvIB4cLdbA06Y2_m-y3wIbReMdM_hb-bF0PfXSKben5EiERrntQZZWCxfbZRrll5bJw2zlE=&c=HxBCiEDhoR8OCbtu90qpK8jmyIpuyw8EFkMEQHAgNKTWekVrcQuQrQ==&ch=hQQtSc3SaQR2ylYRhd7Cv5ugaa3oI62TYiOPgBJkqws1qXpGk3tpng==) is among the only pieces of elections-related legislation that advanced past Crossover Day this year. The legislation, sponsored by Senator Max Burns (R-Sylvania), would ban outside funding in Georgia elections. It clarifies the language of the Georgia Election Integrity Act, passed in 2021, which sought to ban all outside influence in boards of elections across our state.
This afternoon, the bill passed a House Committee with an amendment that would alter the structure of the State Election Board. Next, the bill will head to a full vote on the House floor - and then it will need to return to the State Senate for final approval. We'll keep you updated as this bill progresses.
GEORGIA'S NEW REGISTRATION SERVER: The Secretary of State has updated the technology used to register voters. The new system is commonly referred to as GARVIS -- which stands for Georgia Registered Voter Information System. To learn more about this update, click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5WkZOUwVveG7vVAKQqSbdJ8D0N3sXfCnz4IcfsXO3Bjp26K6OUkkA2IcR9D-d27Pc1ETHqdq_sh0O_G1fNnLo-JVhUYoRehS5NG806uTt7UN4UoW2Ad6qmMvltk-xhMGAh6SixA5Aug9omHw7QkIP24_73kwf7HEYyXTGjNfkeiv28h7-d89HLQp1ziLcPZWJP8lkaTPVx8G1kzCs14Vcs1w0GK7TF5x0QrUTPTLxHHE9piIY_c4Kvjak8RCVhaCINnAwJlURb9sbU4ibaToDsj8ySYes_s&c=HxBCiEDhoR8OCbtu90qpK8jmyIpuyw8EFkMEQHAgNKTWekVrcQuQrQ==&ch=hQQtSc3SaQR2ylYRhd7Cv5ugaa3oI62TYiOPgBJkqws1qXpGk3tpng==).
CLEAN VOTER ROLLS: Some on the Left have recently raised issue with Georgia's practice of cleaning voter rolls. Currently, individuals are permitted to challenge the eligibility of voters based on evidence that they reside in a different state. A number of groups are now pushing for additional restrictions on the process - to make it harder for citizens to challenge and remove fraudulent voters from the rolls. To learn more about their push, click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5WkZOUwVveG7vVAKQqSbdJ8D0N3sXfCnz4IcfsXO3Bjp26K6OUkkA2IcR9D-d27lGJxNMNE_cncL_V6v6WJ5Am6Ve44X04Oh-DbkFICZuaee2ptOhNs4w67aMeIvxJpg5Er5YyCQZ_qfRWTfOoBcbDp6LANHoc8SaXYGmZdH_D2z4XUyh7rvL-Qi8i4B76vxeqhkwQlbTWsdHRvK7Un8CgN241Jc2t5lYKehdS_2Tr43sNtNVHwN09MwmbhVQQMwK2FLlxArtuCdgeiicQuFq6wBBUqIiIz&c=HxBCiEDhoR8OCbtu90qpK8jmyIpuyw8EFkMEQHAgNKTWekVrcQuQrQ==&ch=hQQtSc3SaQR2ylYRhd7Cv5ugaa3oI62TYiOPgBJkqws1qXpGk3tpng==).

| LATEST LEGISLATION
Over the last week, a handful of bills have seen movement in the Georgia General Assembly - but we expect much more action next week, ahead of Sine Die. Here's the latest movement under the Gold Dome:
$1B TAX REBATE (Signed by Governor) [House Bill 162](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5WkZOUwVveG7vVAKQqSbdJ8D0N3sXfCnz4IcfsXO3Bjp26K6OUkkEc24m3xDIujEKfEtnDV7jZtPROMKJwTqVz4eDrLcIZCb4ogwxlHrPMwzFBvjFMUgVHpImpoGSe4ZT2Xw__W24WDK1kaAgfATePJAx3yAefMQge87kks-iU=&c=HxBCiEDhoR8OCbtu90qpK8jmyIpuyw8EFkMEQHAgNKTWekVrcQuQrQ==&ch=hQQtSc3SaQR2ylYRhd7Cv5ugaa3oI62TYiOPgBJkqws1qXpGk3tpng==)[,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5WkZOUwVveG7vVAKQqSbdJ8D0N3sXfCnz4IcfsXO3Bjp26K6OUkkA2IcR9D-d27jKvfVyWTkXGbR2jcY9cI9uRasc6dU_gIxsJFylcPTwDzlyGqZvxM0s2CN4Ce3h1RDg5fGyJcKxeS-4YuLYozL0RBdyAfsDgOdYVUL7b3tZcRVVImZMSDKarn9Q3IqM7ejUzY0yIdwacr3YOg-v96Mg==&c=HxBCiEDhoR8OCbtu90qpK8jmyIpuyw8EFkMEQHAgNKTWekVrcQuQrQ==&ch=hQQtSc3SaQR2ylYRhd7Cv5ugaa3oI62TYiOPgBJkqws1qXpGk3tpng==) a bill that delivers a $1B state income tax rebate to Georgia taxpayers, received final passage. It has been signed by the Governor.
PROTECTING CHILDREN (Final Passage) [Senate Bill 140](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5WkZOUwVveG7vVAKQqSbdJ8D0N3sXfCnz4IcfsXO3Bjp26K6OUkkEc24m3xDIujt3LHqDkmTeWyi01LkeZalHfHtQVhFTNagfOpLrGNdUbXI6dJN0ybZoPsbe08Xg5CFrFhpmf1OOEZ0_ri0NYySTE6JO_lUqgG0ywb54whI-E=&c=HxBCiEDhoR8OCbtu90qpK8jmyIpuyw8EFkMEQHAgNKTWekVrcQuQrQ==&ch=hQQtSc3SaQR2ylYRhd7Cv5ugaa3oI62TYiOPgBJkqws1qXpGk3tpng==), a bill to ban health care providers from administering hormones or performing surgeries to change the gender of underaged children, received final passage. It now heads to the Governor's desk.
SCHOOL SAFETY (Final Passage) [House Bill 147](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5WkZOUwVveG7vVAKQqSbdJ8D0N3sXfCnz4IcfsXO3Bjp26K6OUkkA2IcR9D-d27z4xPTHuW93MkrREZ3VNun1V-r-IrpKKaFDiYeiiHnqmLjaeX3bIYX38l5BFhxKy39rQ8jfHCtTVBk2eKokbs-Vd-tyqyn4zv-dd0vsvkdwA=&c=HxBCiEDhoR8OCbtu90qpK8jmyIpuyw8EFkMEQHAgNKTWekVrcQuQrQ==&ch=hQQtSc3SaQR2ylYRhd7Cv5ugaa3oI62TYiOPgBJkqws1qXpGk3tpng==), a bill to mandate school safety training, received final passage. It now heads to the Governor's desk.
TIKTOK BAN (Final Passage) [Senate Bill 93,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5WkZOUwVveG7vVAKQqSbdJ8D0N3sXfCnz4IcfsXO3Bjp26K6OUkkA2IcR9D-d27-AjCVuorsxMrVu2GfZkzVzN7E0lkM1afe2_52-7gRfAXaSBl2x1eNKAK3T4xDTSB3SlQs4NUeMJ-mIHpXPz4BYWOiK9mSWeUgYiE54ZSfMI=&c=HxBCiEDhoR8OCbtu90qpK8jmyIpuyw8EFkMEQHAgNKTWekVrcQuQrQ==&ch=hQQtSc3SaQR2ylYRhd7Cv5ugaa3oI62TYiOPgBJkqws1qXpGk3tpng==) a bill to ban TikTok and other foreign-owned technology on state devices, received final passage. It now heads to the Governor's desk.

clean_body: | | | | == | | | The Gold Dome Download Tuesday, March 21, 2023 We're officially counting down to Sine Die, or the the last day of legislative session - which is on Wednesday, March 29th. We are eager to see which bills pass both chambers over the coming days. In this edition of the Gold Dome Download, we're focusing on all things elections-- news, legislation, and Mableton's historic vote! | | | ELECTIONS NEWS | ELECTIONS LEGISLATION: == is among the only pieces of elections-related legislation that advanced past Crossover Day this year. The legislation, sponsored by Senator Max Burns (R-Sylvania), would ban outside funding in Georgia elections. It clarifies the language of the Georgia Election Integrity Act, passed in 2021, which sought to ban all outside influence in boards of elections across our state. This afternoon, the bill passed a House Committee with an amendment that would alter the structure of the State Election Board. Next, the bill will head to a full vote on the House floor - and then it will need to return to the State Senate for final approval. We'll keep you updated as this bill progresses. GEORGIA'S NEW REGISTRATION SERVER: The Secretary of State has updated the technology used to register voters. The new system is commonly referred to as GARVIS -- which stands for Georgia Registered Voter Information System. To learn more about this update, click ==. CLEAN VOTER ROLLS: Some on the Left have recently raised issue with Georgia's practice of cleaning voter rolls. Currently, individuals are permitted to challenge the eligibility of voters based on evidence that they reside in a different state. A number of groups are now pushing for additional restrictions on the process - to make it harder for citizens to challenge and remove fraudulent voters from the rolls. To learn more about their push, click ==. | | | LATEST LEGISLATION Over the last week, a handful of bills have seen movement in the Georgia General Assembly - but we expect much more action next week, ahead of Sine Die. Here's the latest movement under the Gold Dome: $1B TAX REBATE (Signed by Governor) == a bill that delivers a $1B state income tax rebate to Georgia taxpayers, received final passage. It has been signed by the Governor. PROTECTING CHILDREN (Final Passage) ==, a bill to ban health care providers from administering hormones or performing surgeries to change the gender of underaged children, received final passage. It now heads to the Governor's desk. SCHOOL SAFETY (Final Passage) ==, a bill to mandate school safety training, received final passage. It now heads to the Governor's desk. TIKTOK BAN (Final Passage) == a bill to ban TikTok and other foreign-owned technology on state devices, received final passage. It now heads to the Governor's desk. | | | REVIVED LEGISLATION As the old saying goes, it ain't over 'til it's over. Some bills that failed to make it past Crossover Day are now being revived as amendments to other pieces of legislation. Here's what's come back so far: SPORTS BETTING Although an earlier attempt to legalize online sports betting failed, the legislation was revived last week as a new amendment to House Bill 237. Read the bill == | | | KNOW YOUR STATE SENATE & HOUSE MEMBERS | | | | Senate Majority Leader Senator Steve Gooch == represents the 51st Senate District of Georgia which covers Dahlonega. Leader Gooch sits on the following committees: Appropriations, Education and Youth, Finance, Insurance and Labor, Judiciary, Natural Resources and the Environment, Reapportionment and Redistricting, Regulated Industries and Utilities, Rules, Transportation, Veterans, Military and Homeland Security, Assignments, and Administrative Affairs. Two of Leader Gooch's bills have crossed over to the House (== & ==). Click == to visit the Senate website. | | | | House Majority Leader Rep. Chuck Efstration == represents the 104th House District of Georgia, which encompasses Dacula. Leader Efstration sits on the following committees: Code Revision, Ethics, Insurance, Judiciary, Judiciary Non-Civil, Juvenile Justice, Reapportionment and Redistricting, Rules, and Appropriations. Leader Efstration presented 14 resolutions this session, which can be found ==. Click == to visit the House website. | | | ELECTIONS WATCH The City of Mableton has its first ever mayoral election TODAY! If you live in this new town in Cobb County, be sure to get out and vote. To learn if you're eligible to vote, find your polling place, and more, visit: ==. | | | | FOLLOW THE PROCESS Stay up to date on all things under the Gold Dome including committee hearings, track legislation, and more by visiting, ==. You can also follow == and == on Twitter to get legislative updates in real time. Finally, you can search for and contact your state legislators by clicking ==. | | | WHAT WE'RE READING | == - Florida Faces Federal Lawsuit Over Signature Rules for New Voters ==- Athens DA is 'unable and unwilling' to do her job, lawsuit alleges ==\- Georgia has all-time high job availability with low unemployment, ==\- The collapse of Britain's National Health Service, the crown jewel of socialized healthcare == - UBS buys Credit Suisse for $3.2 billion as regulators look to shore up the global banking system == - Hormone therapy for trans kids supported at 'highest levels' of Biden admin: HHS | | GET INVOLVED Greater Georgia's work is critical to defending conservative values, and it is only possible through the hard work and support of strong, grassroots volunteers. name: ShariceForCongress.com
subject: What Sharice has been up to
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Sharice has been working hard in Congress, fighting to deliver for Kansas families.

In the last session of Congress, Sharice led on major issues — from fighting against climate change and improving supply chains to lowering healthcare costs and protecting marriage equality — and worked with members of both parties to achieve results for Kansans.

**As the new Congress picks up, Sharice is fighting to keep getting things done. Check out what Sharice has been working on below!**
|
* Sharice was the only member of the Kansas congressional delegation who voted to cap the cost of insulin at $35 per month for people on Medicare and has called repeatedly for this provision to be extended to all Americans. **Now, the top three largest insulin producers in our country have listened to Sharice and Democrats and are substantially lowering their prices.** This is a major victory in our fight to lower the cost of healthcare and prescription drugs for all.

* Through the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, Sharice secured nearly **$2.5 million** in funding to support youth mental health programs at the University of Kansas Medical Center!

* **Sharice has been making stops throughout the district on her Farm Bill Listening Tour.** Have you run into her? Already, she’s made stops at family-owned farms across Kansas, from Bauman’s Cedar Valley Farm in Anderson County to the KC Farm School in Wyandotte County.

* Sharice is continuing to champion sustainable infrastructure, securing **$4 million** in federal funds to acquire and replace electric buses in the Kansas City area, as well as **$1.28 million** to make roads more friendly to pedestrians and bikers, and nearly **$7 million** for affordable housing.

* Sharice hosted Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg in De Soto to tour the planned Panasonic Energy manufacturing site which will **create 20,000 new jobs and provide sustainable economic opportunities** in our district.

* **Sharice was named to the House Transportation & Infrastructure, Small Business, and Agriculture Committees in the 118th Congress!** All of these committees provide important opportunities for Sharice to bring the voices of Kansans to the table as she works to invest in our infrastructure and support local businesses and agriculture industries.

* Sharice was named to the DCCC Frontline program — a list of the most competitive Democratic seats in 2024 — and is now **officially a top Republican target.** That means National Republicans are getting ready to pour money into Kansas to try and flip Sharice’s seat and expand their slim House majority.

---

This was just some of what’s been going on with Team Sharice.

Everyone who has supported Sharice through volunteering, donating, attending an event, or anything else is the reason she has been able to get so much done.

**Now, as we face our first public FEC fundraising deadline of the year, we need your help to have a strong report.** **[Can you chip in $20 or any amount right now so Shrarice can keep delivering for Kansans in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60518595/397361960/-1334289778?amount=20&contactdata=xTd14RLWmuB1ABMNwhJkRJBELE5bZf7TCcMgoGSPGHyNWV1tlJUg3NpLpQwYjugVCTbOntp2lh5Ak4O4xlTN446XoIS2phbQdPX0dJNCS+rvqijNKPY4jzYcp3LsY9lgqT3EA+L2h6KpoEu6wc6R6A==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230321_AW_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQzZWQxYS0wY2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YZH_07vY6VWMzgCUxiWXwCjUhHEusWwL15XRCHu2J1c=)** | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60518596/397361961/-1334289778?amount=20&contactdata=xTd14RLWmuB1ABMNwhJkRJBELE5bZf7TCcMgoGSPGHyNWV1tlJUg3NpLpQwYjugVCTbOntp2lh5Ak4O4xlTN446XoIS2phbQdPX0dJNCS+rvqijNKPY4jzYcp3LsY9lgqT3EA+L2h6KpoEu6wc6R6A==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230321_AW_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQzZWQxYS0wY2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YZH_07vY6VWMzgCUxiWXwCjUhHEusWwL15XRCHu2J1c=)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Exposing the Great Reset
body:
This is one of my biggest fights yet.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh9u7opjqjonf369j2sfj0j6dhjhismttv6p0hno_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5j62oj2cjh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqlhblu0vdcgl1tuj9p64l2o7lalb36j2n4kr8o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5j62oj2cjh2bs)
---
I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just five dollars!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0de6153rvmk5hhubb59bq7jg1ugk9dn1394kc3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5j62oj2cjh2bs)
---
[Get your book now](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8aueo8v76da94c9lsvgtvq3gm7eq9goratptgsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5j62oj2cjh2bs)
---
I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. **Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset.** [**Because this fight is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book,_The American Response to the Great Reset,_ for a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z14b0rkh704cbqhbqaekjbucbhilqbm2a011es08_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5j62oj2cjh2bs)
---
[Get your book now](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1mdp6aa6f5kg97s8a5c2fvb4dpddhd60onhv2u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5j62oj2cjh2bs)
---
Whether you've heard of the WEF's Great Reset agenda before, or you're just learning of it now ... you must read this book. If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. [**And I want to send you a copy of _The American Response to the Great Reset_ RIGHT AWAY. Please claim your book right now with a gift to Turning Point USA of ANY AMOUNT, even just five dollars.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9us7vrc3o3s3c1pc229noacbsctcon9lqgahc38_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5j62oj2cjh2bs) Thank you for helping Turning Point USA expose and DEFEAT the Great Reset agenda. For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: Quick question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
🥰🥰🥰
#
Hey Derek, quick question — do you get emails from other candidates + causes?
If we had to guess, you probably get a *lot* of political emails in your inbox. And not all of them treat you with respect.
**“Donate $10 and we’ll QUADRUPLE match it!”
“Urgent: Final notice”
“We’re totally screwed”**
^Look familiar? These are just a few of the scammy, + straight up dishonest tactics used by campaigns to squeeze people for ActBlue donations. 🙄
**But NOT us.** We know you’re not an ATM. We know real people are the backbone of our work — teachers, nurses, veterans, single parents, retirees, and grassroots supporters like you, Derek. And we couldn’t be more grateful.
We still have to ask for money, but we’ll do it honestly and humbly: **[John’s work is funded by small online donations. Will you consider making one today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230321-1?refcode=em20230321-1-8298&refcode2=8298_434096_ejVmkj&akid=8298%2E434096%2EejVmkj)**
**[Yes, I'll Chip In »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230321-1?refcode=em20230321-8298&refcode2=8298_434096_ejVmkj&akid=8298%2E434096%2EejVmkj)**
Seriously, John has been crystal-clear from Day One of running for U.S. Senate that we will NOT allow our campaign to lie or use scare tactics in our online fundraising emails.
We’ll never trick you into a recurring donation or act like the sky is falling if you don’t give. In fact, every deadline we share is a real fundraising deadline that is either set by our finance team or by the Federal Election Commission.
**What we *will* do is explain how important your support is + give you the opportunity to chip in when you can.**(If you don’t today, that’s 💯 cool with us.)
After all, $3 might not always feel like much. But the fact is that John would never have defeated Dr. Oz, flipped PA blue, and became a U.S. Senator if it weren’t for many thousands of $3 donations. _That’s how powerful just a few bucks can be._
We have so much work still to do, Derek. We need to take on extreme Republican attacks on basic freedoms, defend our Democratic majority + rally support for popular legislation that actually helps working people. And all of that is going to require serious grassroots resources.
**[So we’ll just ask you without any of that scammy BS: Will you continue the work of our winning campaign + ensure John can have the biggest impact possible in the Senate by making a donation today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230321-1?refcode=em20230321-1-8298&refcode2=8298_434096_ejVmkj&akid=8298%2E434096%2EejVmkj)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230321-1?refcode=em20230321-8298&refcode2=8298_434096_ejVmkj&akid=8298%2E434096%2EejVmkj)**
From the bottom of our hearts, thank you!
💛 Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230321-8298-footer&t=1&refcode2=8298_434096_ejVmkj&akid=8298%2E434096%2EejVmkj)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8298%2E434096%2EejVmkj)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8298%2E434096%2EejVmkj)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Team IDCCA
subject: These next 14 days are crucial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
These extremists will not go down without a fight, but neither will we.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZqLMcj2Vbn-VVGxu6juPM8Zvpm0KpYbiQq0fV6LsxJw=/RFkAisOvOgl0Wf6_DvnfKu3ig_30SKsEBXppmzYkz58=?refcode=EM_FR_230321TwoWeeks_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_B_Logo)
**[Fellow Democrats, in just TWO weeks, voters across the state will be heading to the polls to vote on more than 6,000 offices in Illinois' 2023 Consolidated General Elections. Pitch in any amount today to help us beat back the far right on April 4.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZqLMcj2Vbn-VVGxu6juPM8Zvpm0KpYbiQq0fV6LsxJw=/RFkAisOvOgl0Wf6_DvnfKu3ig_30SKsEBXppmzYkz58=?refcode=EM_FR_230321TwoWeeks_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_B_L1)** [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZqLMcj2Vbn-VVGxu6juPM8Zvpm0KpYbiQq0fV6LsxJw=/RFkAisOvOgl0Wf6_DvnfKu3ig_30SKsEBXppmzYkz58=?refcode=EM_FR_230321TwoWeeks_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_B_B1) The IDCCA has been preparing for this election for months, fellow Democrats. Now that we are officially in the home stretch, we need to work twice as hard to reach and educate voters on the importance of this election. Like you, we are supporting progressive candidates who are just as dedicated as we are to combating extremism in our state.

These next 14 days will be the most important yet, with many voters paying attention for the first time in the election. Extremist candidates on the ballot will be escalating their campaigns of hate, and we need to make sure we fight back against them everywhere. With a significant number of these fringe candidates running, we will be vigilant in watching these races.

These extremists will not go down without a fight, but neither will we. Our team's devotion to keeping our schools, libraries, cities, towns, and children safe from these radical extremists has gotten us this far. As long as we continue working together and keeping our efforts strong, the far right is no match.

**[Time is not on our side, fellow Democrats, but we know you are. Any contribution you send our way goes straight toward giving progressive candidates the support they need to win on Election Day. Will you rush $25, $10, or even $5 right away to help us have a strong base of support heading into Election Day in just two weeks?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZqLMcj2Vbn-VVGxu6juPM8Zvpm0KpYbiQq0fV6LsxJw=/RFkAisOvOgl0Wf6_DvnfKu3ig_30SKsEBXppmzYkz58=?refcode=EM_FR_230321TwoWeeks_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_B_L1)**

name: Giffords
subject: Visa, Mastercard, and American Express must find the courage to act
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If credit card companies stepped up and began tracking suspicious gun and ammunition purchases, it would save lives.
#

Friends -
Last fall, we ran a campaign to put pressure on companies like Visa, Mastercard, and American Express to flag suspicious gun purchases. The campaign worked, and these companies said that they would begin using a new sales code to track suspicious purchases from gun merchants.
But now, they’re backing down on their word due to resistance from extremist politicians peddling the gun lobby’s dangerous agenda.
It’s shameful that these companies are buckling to political intimidation. We need to fight back and put the pressure on these companies once again to do the right thing and track suspicious gun purchases.
[**Will you donate $3 or any amount you can today to help us keep the pressure on credit card companies to track and flag suspicious gun purchases using merchant codes?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230321-1-15&t=1&akid=4447%2E3935704%2EuR3Xhj)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-mar23.bWo1sU&refcode=em230321-1-15&t=20&akid=4447%2E3935704%2EuR3Xhj)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-mar23.rDG5iQ&refcode=em230321-1-15&t=21&akid=4447%2E3935704%2EuR3Xhj)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-mar23.Va9Ph9&refcode=em230321-1-15&t=22&akid=4447%2E3935704%2EuR3Xhj)**
---

---
****

---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-mar23.x28Ypi&refcode=em230321-1-15&t=25&akid=4447%2E3935704%2EuR3Xhj)**
---
****
In 2017, the deadliest mass shooting in modern American history took place in Las Vegas, Nevada. Sixty people were killed, and many others were injured.
What you may not know is that over the course of 12 months prior to the shooting, the perpetrator of the Las Vegas massacre charged $94,000 worth of guns and ammunition used in that mass shooting to his credit cards.
If credit card companies stepped up and began tracking suspicious gun and ammunition purchases, it could truly save lives and prevent the next devastating mass shooting from happening.
[**So please: Chip in $3 today to help us keep advocating for credit card companies to track and flag suspicious gun and ammunition purchases.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230321-1-15&t=26&akid=4447%2E3935704%2EuR3Xhj)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230321-1-15&t=27&akid=4447%2E3935704%2EuR3Xhj)**
Thank you for supporting this important effort,
The Giffords Team

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: National Rifle Association
subject: We need to address the elephant in the room
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Self-defense isn't just a right. It's the most important right. | Self-defense is our most important right. In recent years, instances of law-abiding Americans being punished for protecting...
We are helping NRA fundraise. Questions? 1(800)662-3888

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464912:JPWT6BGNz:m:1:3331421248:E5D9069418F6DC910F672835FA8F3EE4:r)

Peter,

Self-defense is our most important right.

In recent years, instances of law-abiding Americans being punished for protecting themselves have become alarmingly common. Far too often, responsible gun owners are being **reprimanded, chastised, or even imprisoned** for using their legal firearms to defend themselves.

That's insane, and we need to put an end to it. _No one is more committed to protecting the American people's Constitutionally guaranteed right to self-defense than the NRA._
**[PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464912:JPWT6BGNz:m:1:3331421248:E5D9069418F6DC910F672835FA8F3EE4:r)**
**The right to self-defense is the cornerstone of all freedoms. Without it, we cannot be free.** That's why, given the recent deranged attacks on our right to protect ourselves, the NRA's work has never been more important.

We recently set a new fundraising goal to preserve **your right to self-defense** , and we need your immediate support to reach it. _**Peter, can you step up?**_

**[Contribute any amount TODAY to help the NRA CRUSH its Self-Defense Preservation Fundraising Goal.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464912:JPWT6BGNz:m:1:3331421248:E5D9069418F6DC910F672835FA8F3EE4:r)**

**[DONOR FILE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464912:JPWT6BGNz:m:1:3331421248:E5D9069418F6DC910F672835FA8F3EE4:r)**
**SUPPORTER: Peter
DONATION STATUS: Awaiting contribution
PURPOSE: PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS**

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464912:JPWT6BGNz:m:1:3331421248:E5D9069418F6DC910F672835FA8F3EE4:r)**

Cases of Americans being taken to court for defending themselves have been making headlines all over the country. Meanwhile, violent crime has been rampant, threatening law-abiding citizens' livelihoods everywhere. _This cannot continue to happen._

The NRA will ALWAYS work to protect your right to self-defense. _We'll fight back against ANY action taken by activist politicians that restricts your liberty or threatens your freedom, and crushing this Self-Defense Preservation Fundraising Goal will be a huge step in the right direction._

**[Please donate to the NRA TODAY so we can continue to work to protect your right to self-defense.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464912:JPWT6BGNz:m:1:3331421248:E5D9069418F6DC910F672835FA8F3EE4:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

name: FINAL NOTICE
subject: It's Over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need to hear from you!

|
---
| | | |
---

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven’t heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02670%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kf6ipWUl9B2mK8xdLLSxrQ&sysid=1)
---

Renewing your membership is of critical importance to the future of the Republican party.

**Here’s why renewing your membership for 2023 is so important:**
1. You will be supporting conservatives across the country as they go on offense and bring the fight to the Radical Democrats.
2. You will be supporting our efforts to hold Joe Biden and the Radical Left accountable for their corruption and failures.
3. You will be an essential part of defending our majority and fighting for conservative values.

**[We can’t do it without you. Renew your membership before it’s too late](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02671%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=99g1HHia4AG4S5xP3GPKww&sysid=1 "We can’t do it without
you. Renew your membership before it’s too late")**

subject: BREAKING: DOJ to prosecute up to 1,200 more peaceful protesters
body:
Joe Biden's lawless Department of Justice plans to prosecute up to 1,200 more innocent January 6 patriots. | | | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464618:JXOi6BG8N:m:1:3391001263:8B2EA4CA6F205272759EF04B3A4FD813:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464618:JXOi6BG8N:m:1:3391001263:8B2EA4CA6F205272759EF04B3A4FD813:r)Dear Peter,

[ **Please give a crucial donation IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464618:JXOi6BG8N:m:1:3391001263:8B2EA4CA6F205272759EF04B3A4FD813:r)

I had to share this breaking news with you right away:

**Joe Biden 's lawless Department of Justice plans to prosecute up to 1,200 more innocent January 6 patriots. **

The Bloomberg news article opens with this headline:

** "DOJ Told Court to Expect a Deluge of New Jan. 6 Prosecutions" **

And it only gets worse from there:

** "The Oct. 28 letter from US Attorney Matthew Graves to Chief Judge Beryl Howell, which came as the department neared its 900th arrest, estimated an additional 700 to 1,200 defendants. That could roughly double the number of cases filed so far - with this month marking the 1,000th arrest, ** [ **according to statistics** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464617:JXOi6BG8N:m:1:3391001263:8B2EA4CA6F205272759EF04B3A4FD813:r "Click to view webpage.") **from the US attorney 's office."**

Judge Howell also steps down this week.

**His replacement for chief judge will be the total hack, Obama appointee Judge James E. Boasberg ...the judge who just forced retired NYPD officer and peaceful protester Sara Carpenter to go to court without evidence that could've cleared her of all charges. **

As I told you earlier this week, Sara was just found guilty on seven counts, and gets sentenced in July.

These new developments are deeply alarming.

**Because the DOJ is doubling down on railroading innocent Americans even though they KNOW that the "deadly insurrection" narrative is a LIE. **

The DOJ KNOWS:

✓ The protester known as Q Shaman was not only not violent, he was escorted peacefully by U.S. Capitol Police throughout the Capitol building,

✓ US Capitol Police officer Brain Sicknick was alive and on the job after he had been allegedly murdered by protesters with a fire extinguisher,

✓ Someone doctored video footage of the protest, and added in yells and screams to make the event seem scarier.

**Our beautiful country is in deep, deep trouble ...so are each of the January 6 peaceful ** **protesters I 'm fighting for, peacefully and legally.**

I beg you to keep standing with me and Freedom Watch during these critical fights.

[**Please continue your vital support with your best gift now.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62464618:JXOi6BG8N:m:1:3391001263:8B2EA4CA6F205272759EF04B3A4FD813:r)

Everything is on the line.

[**Please give what you can right away.**]()

Thank you for your prayers and financial support.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. the DOJ is doubling down on bullying innocent Americans.** And the incoming chief judge just forced a peaceful, retired police officer to go to court without vital evidence that could've cleared her of all charges - so now she's headed to prison.

**[Please help me fight tooth and nail, peacefully and legally, for January 6 peaceful protesters with your very best gift now.]()**

* * *
| Freedom Watch
2020 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Ste 345
Washington, DC 20006
