name: Sen. Jacky Rosen
subject: Let me explain my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Do you know how I got my start in politics?
| | |
---
Friend, did you know I decided to run for Congress while serving as the president of my synagogue?

Looking back on it now, it's fitting that leading Nevada’s largest synagogue was how I got into public service. To this day, **my work in the Senate is guided by the timeless and powerful Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to repair and improve the world.**
I firmly believe that if everybody does their part to help better this world, we can move mountains to make positive change happen. **And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on abortion rights, there's never been a more crucial time for us to come together, roll up our sleeves, and make a difference.**
**But that's why this is so concerning:** With _FiveThirtyEight_ predicting that Nevada will once again decide Senate control, experts at _The Washington Post_ are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a top target for defeat.
**The only way I can fight back against the GOP's attacks, defend this must-win seat, and continue working to make this nation better for ourselves and for future generations is with your immediate grassroots support. So please, friend, I'm asking you directly:**
**[_If my story resonates with you and you want to help me make real progress for our country in the Senate, will you give $5 or more today to help me keep both Nevada and the Senate blue?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60537621/397403870/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2398-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBkMTIxZC0zNWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yMrBMpgQg1DR6dEt9FqAPNl63EPHRZJoC4lkuii00U8=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60537623/397403872/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2398-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBkMTIxZC0zNWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yMrBMpgQg1DR6dEt9FqAPNl63EPHRZJoC4lkuii00U8=)

Jacky

In a clip that has now gone viral, legislators in Oklahoma debated a bill that would guarantee paid maternity leave to state employees when one extremist state official belittled this critical time off for new parents as a “six weeks paid vacation.” | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60526056/397371591/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY2YWFjZi0xNWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pgklBZy1UxP_l_3BOOg9dBqCSCgyBjB8dgzMINsScfc=&emci=d0fc9626-fcc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=44f6aacf-15c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) | Friends — If you needed any more proof to understand why we need ballot measures now more than ever, _take a look at this:_ **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60526057/397371592/-412119992?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY2YWFjZi0xNWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pgklBZy1UxP_l_3BOOg9dBqCSCgyBjB8dgzMINsScfc=&emci=d0fc9626-fcc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=44f6aacf-15c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582)** In a clip that has now gone viral, legislators in Oklahoma debated a bill that would guarantee paid maternity leave to state employees when one extremist state official belittled this critical time off for new parents as a “six weeks paid vacation.” Team, when out-of-touch politicians like this are the ones deciding which policies get passed and which ones don’t, it’s no wonder why more and more Americans are using ballot measures to bring about the changes they want to see in their communities. If you agree, join us in calling for a national paid leave policy by signing on to this petition!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60526058/397371593/-412119992?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY2YWFjZi0xNWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pgklBZy1UxP_l_3BOOg9dBqCSCgyBjB8dgzMINsScfc=&emci=d0fc9626-fcc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=44f6aacf-15c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) [SIGN ON!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60526059/397371594/-412119992?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY2YWFjZi0xNWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pgklBZy1UxP_l_3BOOg9dBqCSCgyBjB8dgzMINsScfc=&emci=d0fc9626-fcc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=44f6aacf-15c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) Fairness Project has helped win ballot measure campaigns that delivered paid family and medical leave to workers in Arizona, Colorado, Michigan, and Washington. I had to share this breaking news with you right away:

**Joe Biden 's lawless Department of Justice plans to prosecute up to 1,200 more innocent January 6 patriots. **

The Bloomberg news article opens with this headline:

** "DOJ Told Court to Expect a Deluge of New Jan. 6 Prosecutions" **

And it only gets worse from there:

** "The Oct. 28 letter from US Attorney Matthew Graves to Chief Judge Beryl Howell, which came as the department neared its 900th arrest, estimated an additional 700 to 1,200 defendants. That could roughly double the number of cases filed so far - with this month marking the 1,000th arrest, ** [ **according to statistics** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62465098:JymJLBG-N:m:1:3331421248:2B5A3984395A9CFFAEB355BC90A10BAA:r "Click to view webpage.") **from the US attorney 's office."**

Judge Howell also steps down this week.

**His replacement for chief judge will be the total hack, Obama appointee Judge James E. Boasberg ...the judge who just forced retired NYPD officer and peaceful protester Sara Carpenter to go to court without evidence that could've cleared her of all charges. **

As I told you earlier this week, Sara was just found guilty on seven counts, and gets sentenced in July.

These new developments are deeply alarming.

**Because the DOJ is doubling down on railroading innocent Americans even though they KNOW that the "deadly insurrection" narrative is a LIE. **

The DOJ KNOWS:

✓ The protester known as Q Shaman was not only not violent, he was escorted peacefully by U.S. Capitol Police throughout the Capitol building,

✓ US Capitol Police officer Brain Sicknick was alive and on the job after he had been allegedly murdered by protesters with a fire extinguisher,

✓ Someone doctored video footage of the protest, and added in yells and screams to make the event seem scarier.

**Our beautiful country is in deep, deep trouble ...so are each of the January 6 peaceful ** **protesters I 'm fighting for, peacefully and legally.**

I beg you to keep standing with me and Freedom Watch during these critical fights.

[**Please continue your vital support with your best gift now.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62465099:JymJLBG-N:m:1:3331421248:2B5A3984395A9CFFAEB355BC90A10BAA:r)

Everything is on the line.

[**Please give what you can right away.**]()

Thank you for your prayers and financial support.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. the DOJ is doubling down on bullying innocent Americans.** And the incoming chief judge just forced a peaceful, retired police officer to go to court without vital evidence that could've cleared her of all charges - so now she's headed to prison.

**[Please help me fight tooth and nail, peacefully and legally, for January 6 peaceful protesters with your very best gift now.]()**

body:
Seth is running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=Pdt6iFFUBMskqiiID6w1Zy8MByHcu8NYhwBCpGLzUzVsI%2F2pOxIWDwq9EwZ8TyYzrB%2BwQd7%2FyrPRglY7wkaAXoUZTCl3C5lFW2oQmK8rw9zkYc78D90S6THTbSsANKKSNJ3rdWI9Tm%2BmuwZ%2FfFMglDEQIbhePLH2gpZwIzyPxNQtT5Z%2BCSbTq5IE%2BGgBvmGvSVa7%2F4d%2FQVI1ejBszkxzQ1lKmjLRdUI%2FYRjcZfQpBCJcJgXGm0WUATBfdikgQfYw4ezZxefJB8gaVSxyiZuP1IZr9vBci7ZxkFFPR9wMhkZFE8SBWUp6VO0CLHv3fwfVzdZQvcUTwoB8EFhSe5RA48YFwMT98qtShL%2Bw9yHmNu9gPEVnFmOFk6VtW0QJ%2BpIExU8tPPTF5gy%2FLqQVnkOGO5mHCBge785bR4ZUPc6bvoYlgduqCU0476iwPssYfSy6)

---
Hi Peter,

It’s Seth Magaziner. I’m a few months into my first term representing Rhode Island’s 2nd district in Congress and I wanted to check in and share some updates with you.

I’ve been named to the House Natural Resources and Homeland Security Committees.

**On the Natural Resources Committee, my work will focus on how affordable clean energy will impact the economy in Rhode Island.** I’m looking forward to working with my colleagues to invest in Rhode Island’s Blue Economy and the transition to affordable clean energy.

**And on the Homeland Security Committee, I will work tirelessly to defend our democracy and combat violent domestic extremism.** Ensuring the safety and security of our nation and every American is central to my work, and I take the responsibility I’ve been given seriously as I begin my work on this critical committee, including in my role as Ranking Member on the Counterterrorism and Intelligence Subcommittee.

**I’m excited to bring the voices of Rhode Islanders to these two very important committees and will be sure to keep you updated on my work.**

Along with serving on these committees, my team and I have hit the ground running, focusing on strengthening our economy, lowering costs for working people, expanding access to healthcare, and making Rhode Island communities safer. I’ve already co-sponsored a national ban on assault weapons and bipartisan legislation that would ban Members of Congress from trading stocks.

**During my first remarks on the House floor, I made clear my commitment to delivering for Rhode Island’s working people.** I’m focused on fighting for all Rhode Islanders to have access to a middle-class life, the security of a dignified retirement plan, and the promise of a better future for the next generation. That’s what I want for my young son, Max, and what I’m fighting for every day in Congress.

**[These are my priorities, and now I want to hear what you are thinking about. Peter, can you take two minutes to share your thoughts on the most pressing issues facing Rhode Island’s families? Your input is critical to my work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60529718/397373828/1212879991?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230321_SV_priorities.1.1_0_6MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODg1NjU4ZC0xOGM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4SguuoeTg-ZuYU6H-XmntrOaLGZKsR4QQc2Jig6kOuk=&emci=1185658d-18c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1885658d-18c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15384964)**

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Where I come from
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
It’s time everyday Missourians, like the ones who took care of me and my family growing up, called the shots in our country. Please let me explain.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce. I wanted to take some time today to tell you a little bit about where I come from and what got me into this race. **Please let me explain.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29705?refcode=em20230321-2872&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2872%2E614464%2EQJlSrg)
As a kid from a working-class neighborhood in the heart of Central Missouri, I never expected to run for U.S. Senate.
Like so many Americans, my parents lived paycheck-to-paycheck — and when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher.
**But we weren’t alone — our community took care of us.**
When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes. And when we couldn’t afford groceries, they brought more casserole and lasagna by the house than we could ever hope to eat. **That’s the Missouri I grew up in.**
Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up.
When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts — the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. **Here’s all that’s left of it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29705?refcode=em20230321-2872&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2872%2E614464%2EQJlSrg)
While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts — like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil — and then told us they can’t figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people.
**I’m running for U.S. Senate because it’s time everyday Missourians — people who know how to take care of each other — called the shots in our country.[And today, I’m asking for your support to make it happen.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29705?refcode=em20230321-2872&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2872%2E614464%2EQJlSrg)**

clean_body: It’s time everyday Missourians, like the ones who took care of me and my family growing up, called the shots in our country. Please let me explain. Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce. I wanted to take some time today to tell you a little bit about where I come from and what got me into this race. Please let me explain. As a kid from a working-class neighborhood in the heart of Central Missouri, I never expected to run for U.S. Senate. Like so many Americans, my parents lived paycheck-to-paycheck — and when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher. But we weren’t alone — our community took care of us. When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes. And when we couldn’t afford groceries, they brought more casserole and lasagna by the house than we could ever hope to eat. That’s the Missouri I grew up in. Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up. When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts — the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. Here’s all that’s left of it: While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts — like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil — and then told us they can’t figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people. I’m running for U.S. Senate because it’s time everyday Missourians — people who know how to take care of each other — called the shots in our country. If you’re ready to take back power from the massive corporations and corrupt, career politicians who’ve torn up our country, I need you on this team. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you for everything, Peter. Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

clean_body: While I have been in Washington starting work in this new term, National Republicans are already considering my seat as vulnerable to flipping red in 2024. | | Team, Supporters like you put us in a strong position before our first end-of-quarter deadline back in 2022. But I need to stress the importance of our deadline coming up on March 31st. Once we file our reports with the FEC, dark money groups and opponents will tear through these numbers and decide if they should get involved. This will be the first quarterly FEC goal since I’ve been announced one of the top Democrats to defend in 2024. Our goal is to scare off GOP dark money with a strong showing for Q1 so we can prevent extremist PACs from pouring resources into CT-05 with baseless attacks on my record and my character. = | = While I have been in Washington starting work in this new term, National Republicans are already considering my seat as vulnerable to flipping red in 2024. I prevailed over a late influx of Super PAC money in 2020 and 2022 because of all the support from donors like you, and I WILL do it again next cycle – but only if we are able to build our grassroots donor base NOW so we can make critical early investments in my next re-election campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Let’s finish what we started, Jahana | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. subject: ALERT: Inslee for a 4th Term??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Governor Jay Inslee is privately considering an unprecedented FOURTH term in office...

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party

name: 2A Task Force
subject: The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 2nd Amendment Task Force [2ataskforce
body:
| |
---
|
---
| | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.
---

This is why 2A Task Force was created, to protect our constitutional rights and to stop the Democrats that are hell-bent on taking away our freedoms. The Second Amendment ensures that we can keep our communities and the ones we love safe from harm, but also protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. Friend,
Not a day goes by where I’m not asked how I put up with the vicious attacks, the smears, and the endless witch hunts.
_And now, with leaks threatening that Soros’s hand-picked Manhattan prosecutor may very well**ARREST** me at any moment for committing NO CRIME, I think you should know exactly why I will NEVER stop fighting for YOU._
When I first ran for president, I made a promise to the forgotten men and women of this country that I would ALWAYS put them FIRST.
Today, I keep fighting the good fight because this is what it takes to save our country. America needs a fighter – someone who will stand tall, take every last punch, and never falter.
_So, when I’m asked if it’s “worth the sacrifice,” the answer will always be:**YES – our great country is worth saving!**_

Featured Article:

** AJC Study of U.S. Latino Millennial and GenZ Leaders’ Attitudes Toward Jews, Antisemitism, Israel Reveals Gaps Between Two Minority Communities (https://www.ajc.org/news/ajc-study-of-us-latino-millennial-and-genz-leaders-attitudes-toward-jews-antisemitism-israel)

A project led by AJC's Belfer Institute for Latino and Latin American Affairs (BILLA) in collaboration with AJC’s Alexander Young Leadership Department

March 20, 2023 - A new American Jewish Committee (AJC)** study of Latino Millennial and Gen Z leaders (https://www.ajc.org/media/ajc-study-of-millenniai-and-gen-z-latino-leaders-views-on-antisemitism-israel-and-us-jewry)
in the United States reveals a troubling disconnect between this growing segment of the American population and the Jewish community.

Despite the growing number of antisemitic incidents over the past several years, 52% of Latinos, ages 18-40, say they perceive that Jews, in comparison to other minority groups, are facing the least amount of discrimination. 34% said the Jewish community is experiencing significant levels of discrimination, and 54% disagreed.

Moreover, 42% of young Latinos say the Jewish community is well-positioned to fend for itself, while 39% say Jews need the support and collaboration of the Hispanic community.

“Amidst rising levels of antisemitism, including violent attacks on Jews across the United States, the misperceptions among younger Latino adults of the threats American Jews are facing are disconcerting,” said Dina Siegel Vann, Director of ** AJC’s Belfer Institute for Latino and Latin American Affairs (https://www.ajc.org/latino)
(AJC BILLA). “The Latino and Jewish communities must bridge these gaps, especially when both minorities are targets of hate. We need to stand together as one against bigotry and violence in America.”

Discussion of the study will be the focus of the National Conversation of the State of Latino-Jewish Relations that AJC BILLA will convene with leaders of both communities on April 27 in Washington, D.C.

Through BILLA, founded in 2005, AJC, the global advocacy organization for the Jewish people, has prioritized building alliances between U.S. Latinos and Jews based on shared agendas. National highlights include the ** establishment (https://www.ajc.org/news/latino-jewish-congressional-caucus-relaunches-at-ajc-event-on-capitol-hill)
of the AJC-inspired Latino Jewish Congressional Caucus in 2011, the ** Latino Jewish Leadership Council (https://www.ajc.org/news/ajc-launches-latino-jewish-leadership-council)
in 2017, and a myriad of advocacy initiatives throughout the country. Focusing on Latino Millennial and Gen Z leaders in recent years, AJC partnered with the Congressional Hispanic Caucus Institute and ** signed (https://www.ajc.org/news/american-jewish-committee-congressional-hispanic-leadership-institute-sign-mou-to-expand)
an MOU with the Congressional Hispanic Leadership Institute last month to bring collaboration to new levels.

Latinos are the fastest-growing ethnic minority in the U.S. The Hispanic population has grown 23% since 2010, totaling more than 62.1 million people in 2020. 85% of the AJC study participants were born in the U.S.

AJC’s Belfer Institute, in partnership with AJC’s Alexander Young Leadership Department , commissioned the** study of Latino Millennial and GenZ leaders in the U.S. (https://www.ajc.org/media/ajc-study-of-millenniai-and-gen-z-latino-leaders-views-on-antisemitism-israel-and-us-jewry)
to gauge their views of discrimination and antisemitism in America as well as perceptions of U.S. Jewry and the State of Israel. The study, comprised of 125 in-depth phone interviews with emerging Latino political, business, media, and academic leaders in Chicago, Houston, Los Angeles, Miami, and New York was conducted in July and August 2022 by a bipartisan team of researchers at Bendixen and Amandi International, together with GrassrootsLab.

In general, 52% of young Latinos say they have a positive association with Jews, 15% say they have a negative association, and 32% are neutral. 47% believe there is a natural connection between Jews and Hispanics, while 33% say there is no connection, with 20% choosing to not answer.

** To Continue Reading This Featured Article Click Here. (https://www.ajc.org/news/ajc-study-of-us-latino-millennial-and-genz-leaders-attitudes-toward-jews-antisemitism-israel)

Thank You

anytime.

---
Peter, I wanted you to be among the first to know that I've started a new role as a political analyst for NBC News and MSNBC. I'm grateful for this opportunity and intend to use my experience to offer hope and try to make sense of what's happening in America and across the world right now. Our nation remains deeply divided, and much of the reason is because too many of our leaders are more focused on self interest and getting attention on social media than they are in doing the hard work of governing. There was a time not long ago when serving in elected office was seen as a temporary opportunity to do some good and give back to the community. Nowadays for many, it's simply a stepping stone to celebrity status and self enrichment. That needs to change in America in order for us to tackle the many challenges we face and restore some sanity to our political discourse. I started my new role this week with an interview with MSNBC's Ari Melber. You can watch the interview here.

## "Is a Democrat really the favorite in the Kentucky governor race?"
---
Peter — We can answer that: **YES!**

It's not surprising that Andy is the frontrunner. He's made tremendous progress for Kentucky — creating tens of thousands of jobs, spurring economic growth across the state, investing in crucial infrastructure like clean water and high-speed internet, and expanding access to affordable health care.

Recent polling shows that Andy has a **job approval rating of 61%** among Kentucky voters. That's because Kentuckians know good leadership when they see it. [**If you're with us, donate to Andy's re-election campaign today and help him keep making progress for our Commonwealth. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60532486/397384190/1737192232?refcode=em23_230321_politi_fndd_gq_act_fav_TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230321_politi_fndd_gq_act_fav_TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=37473cf7-22c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzQ3M2NmNy0yMmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qO_dnIzj1Z9WryRfgD6RkHF9woAyGQ70qJNqFY3xCsg=)

Andy has been there for Kentuckians through **thick and thin:** holding regular Team Kentucky updates through the worst of the pandemic and being attentive and responsive during the devastating natural disasters of the last three years.

Still, we can't let our optimism get in the way of reality. Andy won this race in 2019 by just over 5,000 votes and **he is up against 12 Republican opponents this election.** Two of them have the support of large outside spending groups, and they're already spending BIG to defeat Andy.

**Andy is relying heavily on his grassroots supporters to propel him forward, and your support is essential to the success of his campaign. As we near our first quarterly filing deadline of 2023,[will you donate to Andy's re-election campaign today and help him keep making progress for Kentucky?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60532489/397384198/1737192232?refcode=em23_230321_politi_fndd_gq_act_fav_TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230321_politi_fndd_gq_act_fav_TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=37473cf7-22c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzQ3M2NmNy0yMmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qO_dnIzj1Z9WryRfgD6RkHF9woAyGQ70qJNqFY3xCsg=)**

| | Wyoming Speaker Albert Sommers is single-handedly preventing a major school choice bill from going to a vote.

Here are the facts about support for the bill:
**→ It has a majority of Wyoming House members as cosponsors
→ It has the votes to pass.
→ It already passed the Senate. **

But one politician is standing in the way and denying students and families education freedom. **That is wrong. _[I AGREE>>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=af0efeedf596480ea937704d0652c0d3&_e=a1ou5AY0NTil5S6TjO-Z29hBilVf6MlVeo6wn6LPmPRHPR6AUDIZntjfRhVidrEjRP4hQzlaphcmE0du7UBJn7H3ouyPfSNSCxajtwdSQFFoJ7KEZk7IRirKFHlY1iRxwTCMcijhjtlPRgQA4CeYSuUwM6YbSZ40Irh7xkVLrajlHzlPWEqrRfRxccrBELza2JPWrTzxTOo-7S5Udj7iD069nYnW30uF6syMGi2xjsEPMM6CEjR_E0avN-wIX9wviQ2x6TuGofIt98rwZZPEPRSnQuYF6jNpQ-r5Gam4znPBL5HjdAV3jgmXVAQsqfwAZYWtvVKASiBnViwG7fglyScpN2GB1AyqfoJYNiflIMv54FhZTsaVrCm3LI2oDngoPkXGGEqhd79tI0blJca-FDZD3nyQzm7qBWoH73SvvyOV53PugZisyJl64qs5jmN3dst8VJ4Rx2Q7Tn0O1f5LZbbtavabqY0cjLiMw8vuxQU%3D "I AGREE>>>")_**

The American Federation for Children is working hard to get this school choice bill through and bring much-deserved education freedom to Wyoming families.

But our grassroots efforts only go as far as the support from dedicated and passionate people like you.

_**[Don’t let Wyoming students and parents miss out on the school choice revolution because of one politician – make a donation to support our grassroots fight>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=af0efeedf596480ea937704d0652c0d3&_e=a1ou5AY0NTil5S6TjO-Z29hBilVf6MlVeo6wn6LPmPRHPR6AUDIZntjfRhVidrEjRP4hQzlaphcmE0du7UBJn7H3ouyPfSNSCxajtwdSQFFoJ7KEZk7IRirKFHlY1iRxwTCMcijhjtlPRgQA4CeYSuUwM6YbSZ40Irh7xkVLrajlHzlPWEqrRfRxccrBELza2JPWrTzxTOo-7S5Udj7iD069nYnW30uF6syMGi2xjsEPMM6CEjR_E0avN-wIX9wviQ2x6TuGofIt98rwZZPEPRSnQuYF6jNpQ-r5Gam4znPBL5HjdAV3jgmXVAQsqfwAjDd_00AZlOgwSCu4EFceKxKpaCnWMZSF8Zd0V9Ya4DSusLDCMoVJd2Ln6nYnuuw0acX6COR_P9-0e8jLjj5rti0PtKR5uvl6vuIg0AZLhcbhgLiEEh2NXSdtbcINOuCeQ3wAhpvxxDNbvJimD5A_Nj-6QpLyXz3Q51IPBU5U5Do%3D "Don’t let Wyoming students and parents miss out on the school choice revolution because of one politician – make a donation to support our grassroots fight>>")**_

body:
People lie a lot.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230321-4027-header&t=1&akid=4027%2E2526796%2ExtOekz)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230321.k1EQn5&refcode=em20230321-4027-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4027%2E2526796%2ExtOekz)
If this is what makes us “extreme,” then we wear that label proudly.
We’ve built a movement fighting for each and every one of these issues — from Medicare for All to democratizing fundraising power in politics.
[Can you please donate $3 or anything you can afford right now to keep our movement strong? Your donation sustains Alexandria’s campaign and keeps our team of dedicated organizers doing their work for a dignified wage.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230321.k1EQn5&refcode=em20230321-4027-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4027%2E2526796%2ExtOekz)
We really rely on your support. It makes all the difference.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

Helen’s 30-year record of delivering solutions proves she has what it takes to lead and unify this city. She’s the candidate who restored nurses and counselors to our schools, created an eviction diversion program that kept thousands of people in their homes, and helped launch our city’s first mental health mobile crisis response unit.
Our grassroots strength is unmatched — a testament that Philadelphians are ready to support a leader like Helen that will restore their faith in city government. This campaign is backed by teachers, service workers, municipal employees, and working people in every corner of the city. Now, we have to make sure we have the resources to take us through Election Day – especially when we’re up against opponents who are already spending boatloads of cash on TV ads.
After the primary, your weekly contributions will automatically be turned off. So for just the next eight weeks, I’m asking:
[**Will you pitch in $15 **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60534132/397390090/1688789995?recurring=yes&refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2Q1MDMyNy0yNmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5loV5X2UVmlUbMB5IaQzsYbrXRNb-ws3QEtHSV-aV_k=)**[or any amount that works for your budget over the next eight weeks until the primary election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60534135/397390093/1688789995?recurring=yes&refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2Q1MDMyNy0yNmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5loV5X2UVmlUbMB5IaQzsYbrXRNb-ws3QEtHSV-aV_k=) Your weekly support will help us strengthen our coalition in every neighborhood, mobilizing this city around a vision of safe neighborhoods, modern schools, and a Philly that loves us back.**
[BECOME A WEEKLY RECURRING DONOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60534137/397390097/1688789995?recurring=yes&refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2Q1MDMyNy0yNmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5loV5X2UVmlUbMB5IaQzsYbrXRNb-ws3QEtHSV-aV_k=)

Really can’t thank you enough. Let’s make this happen together.
— Morghan
Finance Director, Team Helen

P.S. If now isn’t the best time to become a weekly recurring donor, we understand and appreciate your support at whatever level you’re able to give. [**Click here if you’d like to make a one-time donation today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60534138/397390103/1688789995?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2Q1MDMyNy0yNmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5loV5X2UVmlUbMB5IaQzsYbrXRNb-ws3QEtHSV-aV_k=)
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. name: Katie Porter
subject: Bring your ideas, not your checkbook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
If lobbyists want to meet with me, they better bring their good ideas, not their checkbooks.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19779%2E3422442%2EdrOOZy)
**Derek, I’m the only Democrat in this race who has never taken a dime of corporate PAC money and doesn’t take contributions from lobbyists**. Here’s the story behind it.
A few years ago I attended a reception for newly elected Members in DC. A lobbyist came up to me and said “Well, I guess you’re one of the new Members we’ll never see.” I asked him why. He said it was because I didn’t take corporate PAC money.
Since that day, I’ve said clearly—**if lobbyists want to meet with me, they better bring their good ideas, not their checkbooks.** There are lobbyists for organizations like Planned Parenthood who I’m happy to work with and learn from. But no matter who you are lobbying for, I’m proud to prove that I won’t be swayed by your check.
As Members of the House, we are one vote of 435. That often means only a fraction of the bills we want to pass will ever become law. But we all have a choice to make when it comes to corporate PAC money. **As Members of Congress, we’re privileged to be in positions of power, and we should use our power to stand up to the status quo and corporate special interests.**
Californians deserve to know that their Senator works for them. Whether it’s using my whiteboard to hold Wall Street CEOs accountable or passing legislation to prevent Big Pharma from raising prices, I’m proud to fight for working people.
Our campaign is funded by real, working people, and our average contribution this week is $31. I rely on supporters like you chipping in to keep our campaign afloat. **[Can you make a donation today to show we don’t need corporate PAC and lobbyist money to run a winning campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230321-2?refcode=em20230321-2&refcode2=19779_3422442_drOOZy&akid=19779%2E3422442%2EdrOOZy)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230321-2?amount=5&refcode=EMAF21_2_WAL_20230321_V1_F&refcode2=19779_3422442_drOOZy&akid=19779%2E3422442%2EdrOOZy)**
—Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF21_2_WAL_20230321_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=19779_3422442_drOOZy&akid=19779%2E3422442%2EdrOOZy)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=19779%2E3422442%2EdrOOZy)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=19779%2E3422442%2EdrOOZy)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: The EMILYs List Campaigns Team
subject: 1️⃣ supreme court justice + 1️⃣ state senator + 1️⃣ mayor = a battle for abortion rights in Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | ELECTION COUNTDOWN: 14 DAYS !!️ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60534473/397391523/402280152?sourceid=1048796&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2MyOWU4ZS0yN2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HA5Um8sJmdc8m4y_YScNjgs0qrym5T_xlwMkUzBqgJk=&emci=4649c473-24c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d3c29e8e-27c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) _**Peter, here's what you need to know about Wisconsin:**_

Aggressive redistricting efforts have made Wisconsin into one of the most gerrymandered states in the country. This has had devastating effects on the Badger State's voting rights and, more recently, its reproductive rights. After _Roe v. Wade_ fell, Wisconsin banned abortion outright.

So here's the good news: **In just two weeks, on April 4, there are three pro-choice women on the ballot who can change the balance of power in Wisconsin for years to come.**

[**Are you ready to fight hard for democracy and reproductive freedom in swing states like Wisconsin? Donate right now to help pro-choice champions WIN up and down the ballot as soon as next month**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60534480/397391530/402280152?sourceid=1048796&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2MyOWU4ZS0yN2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HA5Um8sJmdc8m4y_YScNjgs0qrym5T_xlwMkUzBqgJk=&emci=4649c473-24c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d3c29e8e-27c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)[**.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60534481/397391531/402280152?sourceid=1048796&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2MyOWU4ZS0yN2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HA5Um8sJmdc8m4y_YScNjgs0qrym5T_xlwMkUzBqgJk=&emci=4649c473-24c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d3c29e8e-27c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) After the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ last year, an 1849 abortion ban became the new law of the land in Wisconsin. That's right — Wisconsinites are having their bodily autonomy determined by a law that _predates the Civil War_. The legality of this ban is about to come up before the state Supreme Court, where we have proudly endorsed Judge **Janet Protasiewicz** to fill a vacant seat. Her victory, and her pro-choice vote on the Court, could end the 1849 ban and restore abortion rights to millions in Wisconsin. It's that simple.

We also have the chance to make a change at the state legislative level, where pro-choice champion **Jodi** **Habush Sinykin (SD-08)** is running to FLIP a state Senate seat. Voting and reproductive rights in Wisconsin depend on more voices like Jodi's in the legislature, so this is a must-win!

And of course, you can't make progress without protecting progress. At the city level, we have endorsed Mayor **Satya Rhodes-Conway** of Madison, WI for reelection. Mayor Rhodes-Conway has passed a resolution to protect abortion care providers despite the state's ban, and strong voices like hers are _essential_ in the fight to protect the fundamental rights of millions.

All three of these pro-choice women are on the ballot in Wisconsin on April 4 (_just two weeks away!_) and they all need our help to win, Peter.

**Wisconsin is on the frontlines of this battle for reproductive justice, and races like these will be a key predictor of the fight ahead, Peter. Donate now to support these fearless pro-choice women & more like them across the country:**

clean_body: | | | ELECTION COUNTDOWN: 14 DAYS !!️ Peter, here's what you need to know about Wisconsin: Aggressive redistricting efforts have made Wisconsin into one of the most gerrymandered states in the country. This has had devastating effects on the Badger State's voting rights and, more recently, its reproductive rights. After Roe v. Wade fell, Wisconsin banned abortion outright. So here's the good news: In just two weeks, on April 4, there are three pro-choice women on the ballot who can change the balance of power in Wisconsin for years to come. After the fall of Roe v. Wade last year, an 1849 abortion ban became the new law of the land in Wisconsin. That's right — Wisconsinites are having their bodily autonomy determined by a law that predates the Civil War. The legality of this ban is about to come up before the state Supreme Court, where we have proudly endorsed Judge Janet Protasiewicz to fill a vacant seat. Her victory, and her pro-choice vote on the Court, could end the 1849 ban and restore abortion rights to millions in Wisconsin. It's that simple. We also have the chance to make a change at the state legislative level, where pro-choice champion Jodi Habush Sinykin (SD-08) is running to FLIP a state Senate seat. Voting and reproductive rights in Wisconsin depend on more voices like Jodi's in the legislature, so this is a must-win! And of course, you can't make progress without protecting progress. At the city level, we have endorsed Mayor Satya Rhodes-Conway of Madison, WI for reelection. Mayor Rhodes-Conway has passed a resolution to protect abortion care providers despite the state's ban, and strong voices like hers are essential in the fight to protect the fundamental rights of millions. All three of these pro-choice women are on the ballot in Wisconsin on April 4 (just two weeks away!) and they all need our help to win, Peter. Wisconsin is on the frontlines of this battle for reproductive justice, and races like these will be a key predictor of the fight ahead, Peter. Donate now to support these fearless pro-choice women & more like them across the country: Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Robert Garcia
subject: 3 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60534590/397391814/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDVlMTJkNi0yN2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLf5JNHv4BFj8KAhk6Pdw1W4FCB4eTYNhwPh9bW0Bxk=)
Friend,
About three years ago, our country faced the beginning of an unprecedented catastrophe that we thought was impossible in this day and age, one that continues its impact today — COVID-19.
Together, our country lost over a million lives, something that we will always remember.
So when Long Beach ended up being known nationwide for becoming the first city in California to vaccinate educators and the first city to vaccinate 99% of its senior population, I knew that our work mattered.
Now as a congressman, when I sit on a House Oversight Committee hearing on the origins of COVID-19 and hear extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene spew tin foil hat conspiracy theories about the pandemic that cost America over a million lives, it becomes personal.
Right-wing conspiracy theorists have continuously dismissed this deadly pandemic, but I will not let them continue to spew lies. I will fight to ensure that our government leads by the facts and data because that is the best way to prevent another pandemic from devastating our country.
[**So if you are with me, can you contribute to my campaign to help me continue to make an impact in Congress and fight for truth and safety? I rely on the support of grassroots donors and supporters like you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60534591/397391815/60992958?refcode2=c05e12d6-27c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230321-1-t1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDVlMTJkNi0yN2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLf5JNHv4BFj8KAhk6Pdw1W4FCB4eTYNhwPh9bW0Bxk=)
With you by my side, I know we can continue to fight for a safer country. Thank you for being a part of this team.
Robert
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60534592/397391816/60992958?refcode2=c05e12d6-27c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230321-1-t1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDVlMTJkNi0yN2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLf5JNHv4BFj8KAhk6Pdw1W4FCB4eTYNhwPh9bW0Bxk=)**

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Will you sign on to support the Equality Act?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
We need to push back against the rise of anti-LGBTQ+ rhetoric that Fox News and the GOP have platformed.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60534606/397391836/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230321EA_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjVlMTJkNi0yN2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MDbeSLGxxqUWqKtqeTYyIaCbeKiCCwvZA4vQhO7k5IQ=)
---
Friend,

I've written to you recently about the alarming rise of anti-LGBTQ+ rhetoric that we're witnessing — particularly the demonization of trans people that's been platformed by Fox News and countless Republican politicians. It's important that we speak out and show that hate cannot and will not win.

One of the most effective ways to do that is by demonstrating the broad support that exists for policies that _expand_ LGBTQ+ rights. So I am renewing my call for Congress to pass the Equality Act, which would ensure that sexual orientation and gender identity are covered under federal civil rights laws.

**I was proud to co-sponsor this bill before, and I will not rest until it becomes law — no matter how long that takes.** [**Will you add your name and help me get 7,500 citizen co-signers in support of the Equality Act? Together, we can send a powerful message that a strong majority in this country stands with the LGBTQ+ community and wants active measures taken to protect their rights and respect their dignity.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60534607/397391837/301660749?ms=EM_PET_230321EA_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230321EA_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjVlMTJkNi0yN2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MDbeSLGxxqUWqKtqeTYyIaCbeKiCCwvZA4vQhO7k5IQ=&emci=61fbfa5d-09c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c25e12d6-27c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60534608/397391838/301660749?ms=EM_PET_230321EA_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230321EA_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjVlMTJkNi0yN2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MDbeSLGxxqUWqKtqeTYyIaCbeKiCCwvZA4vQhO7k5IQ=&emci=61fbfa5d-09c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c25e12d6-27c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120) We've made a lot of progress this past decade for LGBTQ+ equality (which is why we're seeing such fierce pushback now from the far right), but we still have a long way to go.

**Right now, Americans in a majority of states can be fired from their jobs, denied credit, or evicted from their homes just because of who they are and who they love.**

Passing the Equality Act will advance fairness and justice, and it will improve the lives of millions of Americans. I'm under no illusions about the obstacles we face, but we have a moral imperative to keep the pressure on. **The message we send now matters down the line — whether in two months or two years.**

[**I'm proud to fight for my family and friends in the LGBTQ+ community. Please join me and sign on to support the Equality Act →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60534609/397391839/301660749?ms=EM_PET_230321EA_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230321EA_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjVlMTJkNi0yN2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MDbeSLGxxqUWqKtqeTYyIaCbeKiCCwvZA4vQhO7k5IQ=&emci=61fbfa5d-09c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c25e12d6-27c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60534610/397391840/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230321EA_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjVlMTJkNi0yN2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MDbeSLGxxqUWqKtqeTYyIaCbeKiCCwvZA4vQhO7k5IQ=)****
---

\- March 21, 2023 -
The Truth About the Manhattan DA Witch-Hunt
**THE FACTS:**
* **This is a Witch-Hunt** \- President Trump is completely innocent.
* **This is election interference** \- Radical Left Democrats and the New York District Attorney’s office are politicizing our justice system to influence the 2024 Presidential race.
* **This is unprecedented** \- never before has a former President been charged.

**WITCH-HUNT:**
* This isn’t a prosecution, it’s a persecution.
* Since before President Trump was sworn in, Radical Left Democrats have attacked him with Russia, Russia, Russia; the Mueller Hoax; Ukraine, Ukraine, Ukraine; Impeachment Hoax 1; Impeachment Hoax 2; the illegal and unconstitutional Mar-a-Lago raid; and now this.
* The New York DA’s office chose their target first and have been hunting for a crime ever since.
* For the past three years, the New York DA’s office has scoured every aspect of President Trump's personal life and business affairs, going back decades, in the hopes of finding some legal basis - however far-fetched - to prosecute him. And they’ve found _nothing_.
* These actions constitute prosecutorial misconduct and are un-American.

**ELECTION INTERFERENCE:**
* Radical Left Democrat New York DA Alvin Bragg is leading a blatant and unconstitutional attempt to interfere with a Federal election by attempting to prosecute President Trump.
* Bragg is so radical – and so partisan – he received $1M from George Soros in his run for DA.
* Bragg is even a donor to Radical Left Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock.
* Bragg, who has been described in the media as “woke,” has faced intense criticism for his soft on crime agenda since the moment he took office.
* Overall major crime in New York is up by a whopping 22% from the year prior – punctuated by sharp increases in robbery, burglary and grand larceny.
* Bragg has been routinely criticized for failing to prosecute many of these incidents, choosing to spend his time instead going after President Trump.
* Congress should investigate this patently political prosecution.

**UNPRECEDENTED:**
* To go after a former President – for the first time ever - sets a terrible precedent and is not what our justice system is about.
* This will set off an irreversible chain of legal events that will tear apart our justice system. If a Democrat DA can target a political foe, so can a Republican DA.
* Legal scholars from both sides agree almost universally that payments of this nature are not in violation of Federal campaign laws.
* When these payments were made, President Trump was a candidate for Federal office. However, the New York DA does not have jurisdiction to prosecute alleged Federal campaign finance violations.
* The allegations in question are almost seven years old. The New York DA’s office is relying on a loophole to get around the statute of limitations in their unprecedented attack.
* To prosecute this case, the New York DA would have to rely on the testimony of Michael Cohen, who plead guilty to bank fraud and lying to Congress, and who has made a career of bashing President Trump in books, on network news, on podcasts, and even by selling t-shirts.
* President Trump was the victim of an extortion plot, yet he is the one being prosecuted.

body:
Our budget shortfall is a big problem with a crucial PA Supreme Court election on the ballot this year.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60534877/397392884/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230321SCShortfall_N_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3OWJmYmNlLTI5YzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iP1IDyhWlSNyEjGAMP4huRO5tOoPaAkF06AM1JDicOk=)
| **[Fellow activist, this year’s election for a justice of the Supreme Court of Pennsylvania will likely determine crucial rulings on Pennsylvanians’ freedom to vote and many other rights for years to come. Can you chip in $10 today to help us cut down on our critical fundraising shortfall and expand the electorate for this crucial election?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60534878/397392885/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230321SCShortfall_N_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3OWJmYmNlLTI5YzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iP1IDyhWlSNyEjGAMP4huRO5tOoPaAkF06AM1JDicOk=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60534879/397392886/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230321SCShortfall_N_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_B_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3OWJmYmNlLTI5YzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iP1IDyhWlSNyEjGAMP4huRO5tOoPaAkF06AM1JDicOk=) Last year’s disastrous ruling on mail ballots that disproportionately disenfranchised Democratic and historically neglected voters was **decided by the Supreme Court of Pennsylvania in a split 4-4 vote** , due to a vacant seat to be filled in the upcoming election.

With one more progressive justice, thousands of voters would not have been disenfranchised over meaningless nuisance requirements.

In a close 2024 presidential election, that and other rulings like it could mean the difference between electing a president who stands up for democracy and one who wants to destroy it.

With turnout expected to be dangerously low in the upcoming local, municipal, and judicial elections that include this and many other important races, our work to ensure Pennsylvanians receive the representation they deserve is as important as ever. **[Unfortunately, the funding we’re receiving does not reflect this urgency. So far this year, we have raised less than one-sixth as much as we had by this point last year — and that’s going to cause serious problems if we can’t get back on the right track. Will you donate $10 right now to help us continue expanding the electorate, defending voting rights, and standing up for name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We could again lose a winnable contest that may not seem like a big deal, but will have ENORMOUS CONSEQUENCES--horrifying ones--for our democracy.
body:
Barely 2 weeks to Election Day!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc4750adb-2e84-42cd-9aac-452bbbbc081e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _**In barely two weeks, on Tuesday, April 4th, a Supreme Court race will occur that'll not only determine whether millions of women have access to abortion rights, but may determine the future of our democracy.**_ _We've written about the race before, but we're now basically in the final two week stretch. What I said above is not hyperbole._ **_This one race is easily the most important of the year and could determine whether we remain a democracy._** **The Washington Post summed it up:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T097c27ef-2fae-43b4-9e88-8f7bea07ba54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_The last 30 years we've seen Republicans prioritize these less glamorous races, for offices filled with power, from courts to state Attorneys General and Secretary of State offices. It has allowed them to steal more elections through voter suppression and manipulation than any of us can count._** [**_There is a last minute effort by the Kochs to dump in millions and steal the race (what's new?). Will you join us in defeating this effort by giving Janet Protasiewicz $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T55d3737b-54dd-4d49-9a64-f9ecc027891d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26d38a5d-1a4e-4b25-9567-346f186086f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _These Republicans fully understand the stakes of this race. I hope we do, or we'll again lose a winnable contest that may not seem like a big deal, but will have ENORMOUS CONSEQUENCES--horrifying ones--for our democracy._ **More from The Washington Post:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1dfdc8bd-c3dd-4133-940a-929285a45495/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This one election on April 4th will determine whether there's a MAGA Republican or progressive Democratic majority on this court._ **_It all comes down to this race._** **_Our candidate, Janet Protasiewicz, is ahead in polling, but it's too close to call. She'll legalize abortion for millions of WI women & protect the state from any attempt by Trump, DeSantis, Pence or any other right-wing autocrat to overturn our democracy for their Christian Nationalist beliefs._** [**_Will you stand with us to counter the last minute effort by the Kochs to dump in millions and steal the race? Will you join us in defeating their effort by giving Janet Protasiewicz $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17c6afb5-187a-4876-b6b8-8dd784ca5677/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for defending democracy from this right-wing onslaught._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4957296-1d89-4c26-a125-c4a5e9e573e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: DC Statehood Bill introduced with OVERWHELMING SUPPORT from Dem Senators!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly.

| |
---
| | | **Democrats in the Senate have introduced legislation to make Washington DC a state and they 're seeing OVERWHELMING SUPPORT.**

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

**The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT:**

---
| | | _Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.)
Tom Carper (D-Del.)
Chris Van Hollen (D-Md.)

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

A Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

**[Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1f76d8b82b254e86a87de58ee52139f3&_e=FEaQUoMnZuTEeLUmvuny8Dk86RUIEnb-zgy_Q4h9OX6dsIiLXAjyca2ldLj_Z8GzClEkwrLwHLKQe7xYdGEfenSIkR_-Ke0YWb3JoEP6AGhO3P-yR8XfoI5loaKojGxh0rtEfCebKzkaJ35tqLu58q90wWuHVAM7zdmqBXELs7xVYQrRfgLIKMyEDcebC6NwUFVPHaZIsFl8mNoTvEJByibwcC5mYyEm7ustZ5g6mp8qv1Sxbn6m4S8VhAXTnWzcAyNoBiUZjVQpaGcLiKA1-zMQMeJs_vaCKIbX18J-477zZQvBuA0NLNnTolEAd9FrC14NFNXkSBLfz3bs2dqhZ_Eq8w4dlGMaUnSbzeGNTtB0rKNY4IrEyeFobK8ary-9x5HI1TYTQHxLEr4UeQFdhd4uwLUovZwU08XVZbf7pRuY1Eze5lVicoI95ONZQThEPccdYyYurhJDL5z0VAhwSA%3D%3D "Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power? name: Andrew - Team Grothman
subject: Biden's Border Blunder.
body:
Thousands tried to cross our border at once| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=79f7656b3ab7480bb1aa2060f2ca7ced&_e=l8Olux_ZTXj6otniTw762y_IcspMiDT7SEbG1iogIwvttvExIO7c79oWf2BpuoGcKM4HNcS2cRX1ILhXuOTbdXbei-hjz4aJO5JPvohZgq2f7aso3UQNfR4YBVG9km7eYZbzfnEL76rbJ1Lo1g6UPgRfYJIsLFymG09laWWFnwj9eC01e_FDpy25SPanNLhEVaqmDIa5jS3TFtRNIe3ZeTUA9apmI6oDNlM8Ds2ZVT97damCKGdYAySKRuARMLRQ)
---
|
---
They say everything is bigger in Texas, my friend. **_Apparently, that includes Biden's border crisis!_** More than 1,000 immigrants recently stormed a border checkpoint in El Paso. If you haven't seen the footage of this incident yet, **[_you have to see it to believe it:_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=79f7656b3ab7480bb1aa2060f2ca7ced&_e=l8Olux_ZTXj6otniTw762y_IcspMiDT7SEbG1iogIwvttvExIO7c79oWf2BpuoGcKM4HNcS2cRX1ILhXuOTbdVB_w1rJ4GflDgfaZrYrjj_gr1k_TtFoUGPXTKDLRYsEMaO-7mUTGHILvE-JwFZBIFd4_ivKRDjmYTnv22WGuq8rOPPVXdvNTndq-Udpi_ggUh0-RCB3k5_vgLVBWn_VsNSLycmBnuLKCFwBuukFvmIz7zVoeA9tZzYiE72L1Fz-)**

Hey, Fellow American it’s Nancy Mace – the Congressman who dropped out of high school at age 17, worked at Waffle House to put food on the table and ended up being the first female to graduate from the Corps of Cadets program at the Citadel. [**I need a moment of your time.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c3d23bf3a6fc4e45a5bf0c36ac9cb08e&_e=eBB-Qvk8LWYBITQDWT-R3OHJWGMyt2k0EacYK5qHoUi4Qed7LlhyLbCslJIGckoyxdo-kM9CKs-BmWPBMzCFmSYEW6v9zXoCshTZQC0DtzTIlP-3s88J0adWp1nO8rwC-RBZnebsrqyAE1bF7ZmMjl2KiYmMgCqPIwA8ueOuxTUe0GAvQfWOdbXuIOZqJU6d7B7bPXJjgJPRSmAOO4iBIXUFmKruS3EcAdbEBl7ezyUcL-pJbGZ9ch41CGMwSYO5CD5nPvM5viDkp22DPkSl2AFDy6wOG7eMKJ1Zvtr8jScFy99784tGNGI3QtVvOx7ZxKQ-EzoawzYvuFToWF9aB5zyu9kfwTMEwisPMOC4gDrf56Fa_TmN7YjTib8Ww_iIjIKeFmx5JqjpyoIq0pM9BVuucnz_dvWELGS0QwJRF7M%3D)

**_The short version:_**
I’m up against my first quarterly goal of the cycle and I’m short of my fundraising goal. [**I’m desperate and need to know if I can count on you before the hour is up.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c3d23bf3a6fc4e45a5bf0c36ac9cb08e&_e=eBB-Qvk8LWYBITQDWT-R3OHJWGMyt2k0EacYK5qHoUi4Qed7LlhyLbCslJIGckoyxdo-kM9CKs-BmWPBMzCFmSYEW6v9zXoCshTZQC0DtzTIlP-3s88J0adWp1nO8rwC-RBZnebsrqyAE1bF7ZmMjl2KiYmMgCqPIwA8ueOuxTUe0GAvQfWOdbXuIOZqJU6d7B7bPXJjgJPRSmAOO4iBIXUFmKruS3EcAdbEBl7ezyUcL-pJbGZ9ch41CGMwSYO5CD5nPvM5viDkp22DPkSl2O3vpa6YGiEojmQXt4Moh5y0GoakvKwYZwnvbhtUtWx-u9ivNQD-VLfEMmRYi0alucub1z7EvR0WLw9DdKADByZF57X30ytTUJ7vLNbRRCxpdJsdwB6pmzGwex9TaMD7QaE97eU6zci4FHgBW78iGy4%3D)

**_The long version:_**
This is what I didn’t want to have to share with you, but I have nowhere else to turn. My team just let me know we are still more than 37% short of our first publicly accessible fundraising deadline, and if we don’t meet it, we will be in a _very_ vulnerable position.

Keep in mind this seat was held by a Democrat in 2020, and they’ve been gunning to flip it back since then. **But I’m a fighter and I won’t go down without a battle.**

You know how bad things are now... _but imagine how much worse they’ll get if Democrats flip every purple seat like mine._

What's happening in America right now is _horrifying._ Kids are being used as political pawns, radical liberal ideas are becoming mainstream, the woke media is prioritizing clicks and view over the truth, and our so-called 'leaders' have sold themselves out for fame and fortune.

As Americans, we deserve __so much better than this.__ It's time to restore our economy, secure the southern border, put parents back in charge, support our military, and reestablish pride in our country.

So now you see why I **had** to reach out to you today and ask for your immediate help. [**Can I rely on you to make a secure donation today and help me keep this seat Republican?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c3d23bf3a6fc4e45a5bf0c36ac9cb08e&_e=eBB-Qvk8LWYBITQDWT-R3OHJWGMyt2k0EacYK5qHoUi4Qed7LlhyLbCslJIGckoyxdo-kM9CKs-BmWPBMzCFmSYEW6v9zXoCshTZQC0DtzTIlP-3s88J0adWp1nO8rwC-RBZnebsrqyAE1bF7ZmMjl2KiYmMgCqPIwA8ueOuxTUe0GAvQfWOdbXuIOZqJU6d7B7bPXJjgJPRSmAOO4iBIXUFmKruS3EcAdbEBl7ezyUcL-pJbGZ9ch41CGMwSYO5CD5nPvM5viDkp22DPkSl2Aq5pV3yavj9Aa0sdAzWWi1B-fsybuu5U56roHVGk_pSgcznnpmpymN3ZDFRBB4ntgpeBV6vndMksGbOX6beYvmVRV4d9vXe2XZJumQc67sR9PzUxM19pBrzHiq71Pm6D4sV6vMWg0WUWi83SfPQxpo%3D)

| [**_SECURE DONATE HERE_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c3d23bf3a6fc4e45a5bf0c36ac9cb08e&_e=eBB-Qvk8LWYBITQDWT-R3OHJWGMyt2k0EacYK5qHoUi4Qed7LlhyLbCslJIGckoyxdo-kM9CKs-BmWPBMzCFmSYEW6v9zXoCshTZQC0DtzTIlP-3s88J0adWp1nO8rwC-RBZnebsrqyAE1bF7ZmMjl2KiYmMgCqPIwA8ueOuxTUe0GAvQfWOdbXuIOZqJU6d7B7bPXJjgJPRSmAOO4iBIXUFmKruS3EcAdbEBl7ezyUcL-pJbGZ9ch41CGMwSYO5CD5nPvM5viDkp22DPkSl2LBEhZOFDLCeb5tYNLEzNoSauksMyDZSErIfSWpsVz55NzMoeA2k77K7_flKaE5td4SYae-7mJF-E8HIHErGnAv0EiUe7eM4GiuWa6AUreEgWXXmBFpIbhOcp7lpLcQLUb8FJyftH3orpdpJk6EQYeU%3D)
---

This race is shaping up to be _one of the most competitive seats next cycle,_ and we can’t take any chances. Democrats are all in to take this back - we can’t afford to fall short of any goals.

[**It's time to stand up and say enough is enough! I'm running for re-election because I believe I'm the woman who can help save our country.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c3d23bf3a6fc4e45a5bf0c36ac9cb08e&_e=eBB-Qvk8LWYBITQDWT-R3OHJWGMyt2k0EacYK5qHoUi4Qed7LlhyLbCslJIGckoyxdo-kM9CKs-BmWPBMzCFmSYEW6v9zXoCshTZQC0DtzTIlP-3s88J0adWp1nO8rwC-RBZnebsrqyAE1bF7ZmMjl2KiYmMgCqPIwA8ueOuxTUe0GAvQfWOdbXuIOZqJU6d7B7bPXJjgJPRSmAOO4iBIXUFmKruS3EcAdbEBl7ezyUcL-pJbGZ9ch41CGMwSYO5CD5nPvM5viDkp22DPkSl2F-JmTfAk3siEg34vaZS_R5QTqweJJICZOle4YgDfm9CZS-OW7-pkjInRbNqfFhRBx35Cd7iNL-yR0htZorqgVgYzWyAzSWnJIWf3MRKQcR3X4fl1JpxkWtv1cq1T_DtYzaq8_a1hrLTj6v3C9d5tdM%3D) I'm in Washington week in and week out, fighting for you and your family – I have a 100% record of voting to lower taxes and a 100% lifetime rating with Conservation Voters of South Carolina!

[**I need to know if you’ll have my back in this critical moment.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c3d23bf3a6fc4e45a5bf0c36ac9cb08e&_e=eBB-Qvk8LWYBITQDWT-R3OHJWGMyt2k0EacYK5qHoUi4Qed7LlhyLbCslJIGckoyxdo-kM9CKs-BmWPBMzCFmSYEW6v9zXoCshTZQC0DtzTIlP-3s88J0adWp1nO8rwC-RBZnebsrqyAE1bF7ZmMjl2KiYmMgCqPIwA8ueOuxTUe0GAvQfWOdbXuIOZqJU6d7B7bPXJjgJPRSmAOO4iBIXUFmKruS3EcAdbEBl7ezyUcL-pJbGZ9ch41CGMwSYO5CD5nPvM5viDkp22DPkSl2O32i4B_xHo_8XzGW-Z9YtP12zWEyoDaPR2JxgOjSZ_F-bsf7mijgG3Ggj5g42aFk-jU3Fxfd39UOZStnZzNifFgV3L_o2hPfd9aAk6lT8tCO2cJfvBfZAfuv2shfQyh2fp81LayoilEcimzwzLplE4%3D)

For the First,

Nancy Mace
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c3d23bf3a6fc4e45a5bf0c36ac9cb08e&_e=eBB-Qvk8LWYBITQDWT-R3OHJWGMyt2k0EacYK5qHoUi4Qed7LlhyLbCslJIGckoyxdo-kM9CKs-BmWPBMzCFmSYEW6v9zXoCshTZQC0DtzTIlP-3s88J0adWp1nO8rwC-RBZnebsrqyAE1bF7ZmMjl2KiYmMgCqPIwA8ueOuxTUe0GAvQfWOdbXuIOZqJU6d7B7bPXJjgJPRSmAOO4iBIXUFmKruS3EcAdbEBl7ezyUcL-pJbGZ9ch41CGMwSYO5CD5nPvM5viDkp22DPkSl2N0JhHg6D8ZchMw6Vz1Cu4VaMkmpZtLIwB634wQzkPjOj3-pPN1HerpOuwdVKFSBfF3R4E20p3A4kzg3ciiQvWPTTw3dLIUCEXKJHiwOP4EK61yb4Yxhl0z9tSCgcUIOS9xXlWSji6DFHMDdhcs57Lk%3D)

# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel’s Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

Peter,

In just 10 days, our campaign will face its first FEC fundraising deadline of the year.

Make no mistake, national Republican and outside spending groups will be keeping a close eye on our fundraising totals through the first quarter, so we need to do everything we can now to ensure we post a strong number. [_**Will you invest in our campaign ahead of this month’s FEC fundraising deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60535750/397396478/1394218500?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230321-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDk0OWMwNzYtMmNjOC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ohi6WyvTabaf1xdgUBNwrmDhYITlgoZEsPp-asTCzW8=)
