name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: VICTORY: President Biden just declared Avi Kwa Ame and Castner Range two new national monuments, thanks to advocates like you.
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9317493&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDU1NDIwMwS2&spReportId=MTcwMDU1NDIwMwS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9317493&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDU1NDIwMwS2&spReportId=MTcwMDU1NDIwMwS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-0KGWtW/Q1IrcHFXc3lUNDl1dEdlS3ZjdGRsWjMvVVI1UnZmMHFrQTE5b0xaR3R2WThWdFJNS3lVVUZuaHFLSXF2Rm11YWpjY01RWkFWY204QlRTbjhOSm85WlJlaUJ5K1hkWVZ5KzZnNXh0YWxOMlk9S0/

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: It’s going to take all of us.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

First, in 2018, the DCCC blacklisted us for daring to challenge their
authority on behalf of the people they’re supposed to represent.

Then, in 2022, far-right groups like AIPAC drowned our candidates in
millions for daring to speak up for Palestinian human rights.

Now, the Moderate PAC is planning to raise and spend $20 million to try
and stop our work of electing more progressive primary challengers like
AOC and Jamaal Bowman.

It’s fair to say that we’ve made a few enemies across the political
establishment because we’re fighting to upend the status quo. So we need
you with us in order to continue this work,
Peter.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131929?refcode=em20230321-28097&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28097%2E1203867%2EHxy5Cb ]Ahead of our end-of-quarter deadline, will you contribute
$3 so we can recruit the next slate of progressive primary
challengers?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131929?refcode=em20230321-28097&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28097%2E1203867%2EHxy5Cb ]Contribute $3

We run on a shoe-string budget compared to most other political groups.
Your contribution of $3 today would make a real difference
for us, because when hundreds of people donate what they can afford it
really adds up.

Our work is only possible because of grassroots supporters like you.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131929?refcode=em20230321-28097&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=28097%2E1203867%2EHxy5Cb ]Please make your best gift now to ensure that we have the resources to
support more primary campaigns this year.

We are in a battle for the soul of the Democratic Party and we cannot
afford another fundraising slowdown.

Thank you,

Team Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=28097%2E1203867%2EHxy5Cb ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=28097%2E1203867%2EHxy5Cb ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230321-28097-footer&t=1024&refcode2=28097_1203867_Hxy5Cb&akid=28097%2E1203867%2EHxy5Cb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=28097%2E1203867%2EHxy5Cb

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Hey team, The Moore-Miller administration has been in office for two months, and we haven’t wasted a moment. [**Here’s an update on what we accomplished in just the last week together →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60536333/397398608/-1462031120?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTIwYWM5OC0yZmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fEIJzLDAPgH7DMJc48O_LSSp858xaTC16h42Lfp5G5o=&emci=12425992-2fc8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d920ac98-2fc8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60536334/397398614/-1462031120?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTIwYWM5OC0yZmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fEIJzLDAPgH7DMJc48O_LSSp858xaTC16h42Lfp5G5o=&emci=12425992-2fc8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d920ac98-2fc8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
---
**I’m thrilled that our first bill, the Family Prosperity Act, passed the House.** It will make the earned income tax credit for 400,000 Marylanders permanent and expand the child tax credit to over 40,000 Marylanders, bringing us closer to ending child poverty in the state of Maryland.
**I also announced action to accelerate our state’s transition to clean cars by 2035.** Car exhaust is the largest source of greenhouse gas emissions in Maryland, and we can cut drastically that by ramping up our move to electric vehicles by making them cheaper and building more charging stations across the state.
We’re moving fast to act on climate, end poverty, and create opportunities for work, wages, and wealth for every Marylander — and we ain’t slowing down!
Of course, none of this would be possible without your support. Thank you, Maryland, and let’s keep it up.
Elevate,
Wes

Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense.

clean_body: | Hey team, The Moore-Miller administration has been in office for two months, and we haven’t wasted a moment. | I’m thrilled that our first bill, the Family Prosperity Act, passed the House. It will make the earned income tax credit for 400,000 Marylanders permanent and expand the child tax credit to over 40,000 Marylanders, bringing us closer to ending child poverty in the state of Maryland. I also announced action to accelerate our state’s transition to clean cars by 2035. Car exhaust is the largest source of greenhouse gas emissions in Maryland, and we can cut drastically that by ramping up our move to electric vehicles by making them cheaper and building more charging stations across the state. We’re moving fast to act on climate, end poverty, and create opportunities for work, wages, and wealth for every Marylander — and we ain’t slowing down! Of course, none of this would be possible without your support. Thank you, Maryland, and let’s keep it up. Elevate, Wes Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Greg Casar
subject: No more kids in cages.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60536867/397400850/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGFiOTc3YS0zMmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MuBjN5CLOVSK_iA9-Paf2vJKFrw5lAwBBuDyGAn8pvI=&emci=92ab977a-32c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=94ab977a-32c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6830379)
Peter,

As the proud son of immigrants, I’ve fought to keep immigrant families together and build an immigration system we can be proud of.

**Unfortunately, many of Trump’s anti-immigrant policies remain today. And now, right-wing Texas officials have filed the most dangerous anti-immigrant policies I’ve ever seen.**

Team Casar is fighting back. I’m going to explain how in just a second. **[But first, can you chip in $20, or whatever you can, to help Team Casar fight for a more fair, humane, and strong immigration system?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60536871/397400854/223999970?refcode=em20230321&refcode2=94ab977a-32c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGFiOTc3YS0zMmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MuBjN5CLOVSK_iA9-Paf2vJKFrw5lAwBBuDyGAn8pvI=)**

****[Chip In »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60536875/397400856/223999970?refcode=em20230321&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGFiOTc3YS0zMmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MuBjN5CLOVSK_iA9-Paf2vJKFrw5lAwBBuDyGAn8pvI=)****
---

This month, Texas Republican legislators introduced a bill to create a new vigilante force (armed with immunity from prosecution) that will supposedly be tasked with hunting down immigrants. This same bill includes new penalties against asylum seekers: including life in prison sentences for some immigrant families. This is unacceptable and we’ll do everything we can to fight back.
We know history is on the side of human rights. I’ll continue to advocate for an efficient and just immigration system that upholds our values as Americans. I would love to have your help in that fight.
Peter, for far too long, politicians have used immigrants and asylum seekers as pawns in a political game. They’ve put in place cruel policies and targeted families seeking a better life—and done nothing to fix the underlying problem for decades.
**[Can you chip in $20, or whatever you can afford, to help Team Casar fight for a better and more humane immigration system?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60536877/397400862/223999970?refcode=em20230321&refcode2=94ab977a-32c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGFiOTc3YS0zMmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MuBjN5CLOVSK_iA9-Paf2vJKFrw5lAwBBuDyGAn8pvI=)**

Thank you,

Greg

_Congressman Greg Casar
Texas Congressional District 35_

clean_body: Peter, As the proud son of immigrants, I’ve fought to keep immigrant families together and build an immigration system we can be proud of. Unfortunately, many of Trump’s anti-immigrant policies remain today. And now, right-wing Texas officials have filed the most dangerous anti-immigrant policies I’ve ever seen. Team Casar is fighting back. I’m going to explain how in just a second. = **= This month, Texas Republican legislators introduced a bill to create a new vigilante force (armed with immunity from prosecution) that will supposedly be tasked with hunting down immigrants. This same bill includes new penalties against asylum seekers: including life in prison sentences for some immigrant families. This is unacceptable and we’ll do everything we can to fight back. We know history is on the side of human rights. I’ll continue to advocate for an efficient and just immigration system that upholds our values as Americans. I would love to have your help in that fight. Peter, for far too long, politicians have used immigrants and asylum seekers as pawns in a political game. They’ve put in place cruel policies and targeted families seeking a better life—and done nothing to fix the underlying problem for decades. = Thank you, Greg Congressman Greg Casar Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

Good news today, Peter.
Thanks to Emerge supporters like you, we’ve trained more than 5,500 bold Democratic women to run for office and **right now,** **more than 1,200 Emerge women are serving in office.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60536931/397401086/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1152-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkMGMzMjA3LTMzYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-77QQBDHxxiucZ1gm18Fsbc6B-QNZggdDJ1TFDEliWo=)
**Here’s why that matters:** Across the country, we’re seeing an avalanche of hateful and dangerous legislation aimed at attacking our essential rights, our democratic norms, and our most vulnerable populations. And every single level of government has a role to play in fighting back.
**[That means our work to empower MORE Democratic women to lead – from school boards to the U.S. Congress – grows more urgent by the day. And we need you with us, Peter. Can we count on you to chip in $5 or more to Emerge now to help power our movement forward?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60536932/397401087/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1152-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkMGMzMjA3LTMzYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-77QQBDHxxiucZ1gm18Fsbc6B-QNZggdDJ1TFDEliWo=)**
**Any donation you can give will go directly toward recruiting and training Democratic women of the New American Majority to run for office.** These leaders will then go on to put people first in our city budgets, ensure that every vote in every election gets fairly counted, block right-wing attacks on essential health care, and take charge of the direction of our country.
We’ve made incredible progress, but we can’t stop now, Peter. **With your help, we can provide the strategy and training needed to shatter the highest glass ceilings in our country and achieve the policies and change we ALL want to see. So please: **
**[Will you donate $5 or more now to help Emerge empower MORE Democratic women to lead at every level of office in every state?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60536933/397401088/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1152-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkMGMzMjA3LTMzYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-77QQBDHxxiucZ1gm18Fsbc6B-QNZggdDJ1TFDEliWo=)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Judge Janet Protasiewicz is running for election on April 4 in what could be the most consequential election for our democracy this year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1982%2E5257348%2EczdbiM ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, while other candidates may be focused solely on their own
race, I need to talk to you today about another important contest.

In two weeks, there is a critical election that could hold dire
consequences for abortion rights and fair election maps: The election of a
seventh justice to Wisconsin’s deadlocked 3-3 Supreme Court will set an
important precedent in that state and around the country.

Let me explain:

Judge Janet Protasiewicz is the Democratic Party’s endorsed nominee in
Wisconsin’s Supreme Court election on Tuesday, April 4 — just 14 days
away.

This election is for a 10-year term. Remember how Wisconsin’s Supreme
Court barely accepted the results of the 2020 election? Can you image in
2024 if Janet’s far right opponent Dan Kelly was on the bench? As the
deciding vote in a 4-3 ruling, the fate of our democracy would be in his
hands, and we’d be facing repeated bogus claims of election fraud in 2024.

That’s not all, Dan Kelly is endorsed by a trifecta of anti-abortion
groups. Ones that support criminalizing abortion and ripping away
reproductive freedoms.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=mar2023_abs_em_scowis._r5Yyd&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1982%2E5257348%2EczdbiM ]Will you help protect abortion and democracy in Wisconsin and across
the country by splitting an urgent $10 donation between Judge Janet’s
campaign and ours today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Janet Protasiewicz and Adam Schiff will go through
immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=mar2023_abs_em_scowis.B5hgSj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1982%2E5257348%2EczdbiM ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=mar2023_abs_em_scowis.wi2pbe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=1982%2E5257348%2EczdbiM ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=mar2023_abs_em_scowis.DcoRQA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=1982%2E5257348%2EczdbiM ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=mar2023_abs_em_scowis.Frgqqw&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=1982%2E5257348%2EczdbiM ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=mar2023_abs_em_scowis.FgOPWX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=1982%2E5257348%2EczdbiM ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em_scowis.ngWN9w&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=1982%2E5257348%2EczdbiM ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Let me tell you something about Judge Janet’s far-right opponent:

After losing his last election to the Wisconsin Supreme Court, the state
Republican Party and Republican National Committee paid him $120,000 to
provide legal counsel as part of the “Stop the Steal” movement to send
fake electors that would overturn the 2020 election.

He is a far-right extremist, full stop, endorsed by anti-abortion zealots
and backed by some of the biggest money in Republican politics.

If we’re going to protect abortion rights in Wisconsin, defend our
democracy, and ensure Republicans can’t steal the 2024 presidential
election, we need Judge Janet to prevail on Tuesday, April 4.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=mar2023_abs_em_scowis._r5Yyd&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=1982%2E5257348%2EczdbiM ]So Derek, split $10 between Judge Janet’s campaign for the
Wisconsin Supreme Court and ours. Let’s go win this thing.

This may end up being the most important election for the future of our
democracy in 2023. Thanks for adding your critical support in the
homestretch of this race.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em_scowis.ngWN9w&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=1982%2E5257348%2EczdbiM ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=mar2023_abs_em_scowis._Kck1K&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230321_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=1982%2E5257348%2EczdbiM ]DONATE MONTHLY

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

---
**President Trump is no fool. He knows as well as we do who is to blame: George Soros and his hand-picked prosecutors.**
---
[**REMOVE SOROS PROSECUTORS**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fad021ad77f14c16bfc5d1a8999ee6c1&_e=z-FFtg0lT2kdTQggjTpvUZGfLKW698qsNe5CWFRkboyvbPyU8Atjfw90p_C0VR00l5qc4S1QR2023h5qToincaeqVJJshejtDd8tuAN5Opq4MxgQ-SgG4xc4wiCQSoSNUdIfvRthFcen7PXEskusFQIAHw7SDXxQ_-2xApPGeGD1rVDGGGPR2Cn8r2TSKaqQfNjGaTARf2YK5rqYGk6Diyor7JyEvEGeW8uz4x1_3fy-gulrRtW5bsHEIJ9Gpzv8xkcFnz2Gr2BkWurV-ivZuWwqQvr94ABCuVlJsZ7Lij3r0WSQPUUPjP0FG80WtQoXEiNYZ07b03nISOuHp88iYc7lQOGYPJD-w7IO7mJ3xixKnwj6HEuXU71BMozk8SrmKG5CPP1fh13tDYQxBcCOYg%3D%3D)
---
Soros has spent over **$40 MILLION** getting more than 70 radical, politically-charged prosecutors elected nationwide. They have one goal: getting their political opponents out of the way so they can force their agenda on us all. But we will NOT let this happen. Fair Courts America is pushing back against the liberal dark money machine funded by billionaires like George Soros.
---
[**JOIN US IN STOPPING THEM**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fad021ad77f14c16bfc5d1a8999ee6c1&_e=z-FFtg0lT2kdTQggjTpvUZGfLKW698qsNe5CWFRkboyvbPyU8Atjfw90p_C0VR00l5qc4S1QR2023h5qToincaeqVJJshejtDd8tuAN5Opq4MxgQ-SgG4xc4wiCQSoSNUdIfvRthFcen7PXEskusFQIAHw7SDXxQ_-2xApPGeGD1rVDGGGPR2Cn8r2TSKaqQfNjGaTARf2YK5rqYGk6Diyor7JyEvEGeW8uz4x1_3fy-gulrRtW5bsHEIJ9Gpzv880ON-zWTb9gA6tc3hie4OO76TJ1ALwYDpLpyOelF3KNemB9cj_jrNNUVqPsjnLJ2c50D2HpZAZadp-oUQVguTdsZhIFN-WKscFbjj9gIwR0QCaaHelVaMwQCBASZSBQUqdkKXEvSpfF7HYr3gJTUMA%3D%3D)

**America's judiciary should be fair and free of political bias, and we won't stop until it happens.** But we need your help to win this fight. You can’t make this up –

Mike Pence was just in New Hampshire where he was asked what he thought about South Carolina’s legislation that would make women who defy the state's abortion ban eligible for the death penalty.

His response? “...I don't have a way of responding to that or confirming it...”

subject: Two of the most important races of 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, **We’re now just two weeks away from one of the most important Election Days of this year, when voters will elect a Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice and the next Mayor of Chicago.** Whoever wins these closely fought races will have a massive impact on the lives of working people. clean_body: | | | Peter, We’re now just two weeks away from one of the most important Election Days of this year, when voters will elect a Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice and the next Mayor of Chicago. Whoever wins these closely fought races will have a massive impact on the lives of working people. And with early voting kicking off this week, we need to do all we can to reach as many voters as possible. In Wisconsin, WFP-endorsed Janet Protasiewicz is facing off against Dan Kelly, a staunchly anti-abortion election denier who would protect the conservative majority on the state’s highest court. If Kelly were to win, there would be disastrous consequences for Wisconsinites on issues of abortion access, gerrymandering, voting rights, and more — and potentially disastrous consequences for the entire country if he were to put a free and fair presidential race in 2024 in jeopardy. Meanwhile in Chicago, WFP-endorsed Brandon Johnson — a former public school teacher and union organizer — is facing off against Paul Vallas, a Republican in disguise with a history of undermining public schools in New Orleans, Philadelphia, and Connecticut. Vallas wants to do the same in Chicago — as well as dangerously expand the powers of the police, loosening regulations that protect our communities and revamping the background check process to let in prospective officers previously deemed unfit. It’s no surprise that dark big money is showing up in both of these races. Already this month, a MAGA-aligned super PAC dropped $3.2 million on TV advertisements to prop up Daniel Kelly in Wisconsin, and a new PAC was just created for the purposes of boosting Paul Vallas’s campaign in Chicago. We can beat Daniel Kelly, Paul Vallas, and the dark money bolstering their campaigns. But with voting already underway, we’re running out of time to reach voters about what’s at stake in these elections, and how they can make their voices heard. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . As the son of a pastor, and one of ten children, I am grateful to my parents for teaching us to work together, to sacrifice, and most important, to serve.

They taught me to abide by the golden rule: treating others the way you want to be treated.

Our commitment to one another is essential to building a stronger Chicago, Peter. And it will take all of us — from working families, to immigrant families, to our LGBTQ siblings and people in all corners of our city — to work as partners for the change we all need. That’s why I’m reaching out today.

[If you can spare a few bucks today, please split a donation between my campaign and The Collective PAC by clicking here. We all know Chicagoans deserve better.

My wife and I are raising our three children on the West Side of Chicago, so our family experiences firsthand the effects of generational disinvestment. Hunger, homelessness and unemployment are right outside our front door. Gun violence is not only on the news; it traumatizes our neighborhood.

As a teacher, I also experienced the painful impact of disinvestment on my students and their families.

**We cannot make Chicago whole until all of us are whole.** _That’s why we’re going to invest in people._

Safe and vibrant neighborhoods, affordable housing, health care for all, fully-funded schools — the life I want for my family and my neighbors is the same life I want for all Chicagoans. That’s why I’m in this race.

[But I can’t win this fight alone, so please, Peter: will you split a donation between our campaign and The Collective PAC today? Whether you chip in $5 or $50 or $500, you’re making a huge difference in a mayoral race that could come down to just a few thousand votes.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yscVJVvN-r4bukDGstILwIHi4J0_IHAsfJTkrbuQGEqJB3T2yTqm4zV-AeeS4G84T1CZXlI-I3zPJoi-gldKmsPl4J38Lc-9o41Pprl5Q3bjRz0jKCPRwTenmqxzz7uG_sb1Y7Jke5bcooZcRbmEM_MjvQhbV9aidP77QR3xmf4VbO_LITvXn6n-QtoZekPdKVgex5ZhM8E3EWDZEM-oLdzNzTBpVMorDUge0BlHhE7Wq7B_K9eFhPAXqNcHH77M76BKbzLI7eEE-Ycd9CL_fzFJuF1kzapuweEtws-A_Ic_mXh0leZElftenRImCrPqvm_OuoT4QZTm9ST6ko8s1OYcEabyKhtXfG7x2CI4BjQQGT99T_UB82Nz6TaTVh2b0gnGN1IkYSac5LNH2vp9t8n4bbllBDpK_T0UFVnIGERg/3uo/Ykr_sn_4Rnu2EqjSiPsPFQ/h11/DDlsZFNGAUJp79hWEP2PgvG-nRYt_f3JoW1fZujwm2s)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, Because of supporters like you, we’re going to an April 4th runoff in the race to become Chicago’s next mayor — and now I’m counting on your help to win. | | As the son of a pastor, and one of ten children, I am grateful to my parents for teaching us to work together, to sacrifice, and most important, to serve. They taught me to abide by the golden rule: treating others the way you want to be treated. Our commitment to one another is essential to building a stronger Chicago, Peter. And it will take all of us — from working families, to immigrant families, to our LGBTQ siblings and people in all corners of our city — to work as partners for the change we all need. That’s why I’m reaching out today. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Brandon Johnson and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | We all know Chicagoans deserve better. My wife and I are raising our three children on the West Side of Chicago, so our family experiences firsthand the effects of generational disinvestment. Hunger, homelessness and unemployment are right outside our front door. Gun violence is not only on the news; it traumatizes our neighborhood. As a teacher, I also experienced the painful impact of disinvestment on my students and their families. We cannot make Chicago whole until all of us are whole. That’s why we’re going to invest in people. Safe and vibrant neighborhoods, affordable housing, health care for all, fully-funded schools — the life I want for my family and my neighbors is the same life I want for all Chicagoans. That’s why I’m in this race. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Brandon Johnson and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | I know a better Chicago is possible. Together, anything is. Onward, Brandon The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . On top of that, our first end-of-quarter FEC deadline is in 10 days. This will be the first time our fundraising numbers will go public since announcing my official reelection campaign.

name: Team Crow
subject: Republicans just elected an election denier
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Folks — Colorado Republicans just gathered to choose a leader for the 2024 elections. Their new chairman is as extreme as it gets. He claims thousands of dead people voted in the 2020 election and that Donald Trump won. He wants to abolish our state’s vote-by-mail system. He opposes all types of commonsense gun reform. He even went so far as to sue the Secretary of State for not allowing him to put his name as _“Let’s Go Brandon”_ on last year’s ballot. Seriously. The Republican Party had a chance to course correct after Donald Trump lost. Instead, they’re doubling down and embracing conspiracy theories — starting right here in Colorado. **Americans want commonsense leaders. Not election deniers and conspiracy theorists. clean_body: | Folks — Colorado Republicans just gathered to choose a leader for the 2024 elections. Their new chairman is as extreme as it gets. He claims thousands of dead people voted in the 2020 election and that Donald Trump won. He wants to abolish our state’s vote-by-mail system. He opposes all types of commonsense gun reform. He even went so far as to sue the Secretary of State for not allowing him to put his name as “Let’s Go Brandon” on last year’s ballot. Seriously. The Republican Party had a chance to course correct after Donald Trump lost. Instead, they’re doubling down and embracing conspiracy theories — starting right here in Colorado. Americans want commonsense leaders. Not election deniers and conspiracy theorists. Let’s make sure MAGA Republicans (and their new chairman) hear us loud and clear. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, — Team Crow | Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. subject: Sign on in support of equal justice for all of us

body:
Defending communities from discrimination and expanding our civil rights laws. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvcXxTCJO98si_JS4jU47QaxozZbzxm4KYgf-6IGBLXeUxGdS-b2Nkx0Gzz_vwz5yuzxXpd33yLWWYpvLQvHvQ-I_UsCc6vCe0tn8I3rKACvTQ6pMKFm2aqaaYsDsnGrMeh2_ZIlXXCg2Afu_e_O-MXrDsd7DkMfcbyd8GD9Ei2XPnz3qtal5UGxJDPgNxRaafj-ekDG8mfFTC0oJElzmdwg/3uo/wC7hqgOZQAG_LhtXD1tmGg/h0/FW1QuR0XBOiFOc0LhvcLyVVJm1SnXTFTy-YYHfWfhLM)
---
Friend, No one should ever get denied access to the courts for protections. But our federal courts have been stacked with conservative justices who have watered down our country’s core civil rights acts. **Extremist right-wing judges, including on the Supreme Court, are trying to take away our rights.** So I re-introduced the _Justice For All Act_ to restore and expand protections of bills such as the _Civil Rights Act of 1964_ , the _Fair Housing Act of 1968_ , the _Age Discrimination Act of 1975_ , the _Rehabilitation Act of 1973_ , and Title IX of the _Education Act of 1972_. We need the legal tools that will allow us to fight discrimination in court. Escalating attacks on our trans neighbors across the country make this legislation even more urgent. The bill’s protections include clarifying the definition of "sex" in Title IX to include sexual orientation and gender identity. [**Will you join me and original co-sponsors Reps. Cori Bush and Summer Lee by signing on in support of the**** _Justice For All Act_****?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnBkCvBzmfhJhusTxRCyXifG4jv9MqnMOvsEfo1M1XN2TItOcT3XSZoZVhPFDNeE0U2A7oJERR4AXUDQV9MNeScDv9CuZpmkdJlbjqtemv9_YTNTW7mY26bEZmTQtvfEnC3LWXP9Kh1f2ExwxQ0TbYtUMZbiSRkZ2h8Wg_hAJ7Ti0iolbQnGvk61oSbF7N6QOXy5p2HLHWazCxdb1eaLFUR42mmuSQilvya2BPDgoPWZN020HH1jvGTgtp8mv9ESoZ0OxQXJehHxjK3anGccEu46oaE3khwIs7x_DfJ96jH-A0xhZbkk_DrwdWYdChGi5nhqft0j2onWru1rAXjagQ7izc3TPKuLXUp6OURT44FMD25ohba401Rh7XYVitlKm4jFhxUBydZ_51FVYuUuti74r_mKTfUB5R8Da_Mrh4TBDpwvz11K0HdfhqkmN6B_6Nu8RR8YOnJ4XxDyt2Roj_x/3uo/wC7hqgOZQAG_LhtXD1tmGg/h1/i-y-SmWlwd295kOASyEI7LGORBKBlbpkyZJC6Hgb5oc) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnBkCvBzmfhJhusTxRCyXifG4jv9MqnMOvsEfo1M1XN2TItOcT3XSZoZVhPFDNeE0U2A7oJERR4AXUDQV9MNeScDv9CuZpmkdJlbjqtemv9_YTNTW7mY26bEZmTQtvfEnC3LWXP9Kh1f2ExwxQ0TbYtUMZbiSRkZ2h8Wg_hAJ7Ti0iolbQnGvk61oSbF7N6QOXy5p2HLHWazCxdb1eaLFUR42mmuSQilvya2BPDgoPWZKiz9CrhNeD3YFEWlA6GwAIoKkGuLKz-2hh5zANqGhAmzF6H9OU2uBzLvr6RF7Z1359tWRuJPK30W364gbb0Oqg2zMqLw_NcYYLHarwoSxZO7XNfHqmL2ADSEOZjBU2fzLd67ttWgfPLiARqek9sYwkk7wfeyqIYLGcHEASbmadu_JlsGvStkzGo0mkduFkAqHSFZyy__ostCYwQGABo-8jgNur9dFtbtVOsc_oJwVuM/3uo/wC7hqgOZQAG_LhtXD1tmGg/h2/38yp6qwUiXHmU7ExvciloTa1-fsPd0rMETyO0DWZ2M8)
---
Passing the _Justice For All Act_ would help us defend our communities, including elders, disabled people, Black and brown people, trans and queer people, and everyone who deserves equal justice under the law.
For example, Michigan’s racist emergency manager law led to the poisoning of children and families living in Flint. Some people even died because of the lead exposure. That racist law could have been challenged under the _Civil Rights Act_ , but conservative case law decisions prevented true justice for the impacted communities.
If passed, the _Justice For All Act_ would support victims of discriminatory impact (regardless of intent) by ensuring they receive the compensation they deserve and the attorney’s fees necessary to allow civil rights lawyers to take up their cases.
The bill would also end qualified immunity for government employees, including police officers. **And it would prohibit racial and gender profiling in police investigations and activity.**
Additionally, the bill would protect people in the courts by eliminating court-created defenses that allow employers to escape liability for creating hostile work environments, and by prohibiting compelled arbitration clauses, which are frequently used to extinguish consumer and employee rights.
We need to demonstrate that the bill has a ton of public support behind it, which is why I’m writing you today.
[**Will you join me and Reps. Cori Bush and Summer Lee now by adding your name in support of the**** _Justice For All Act_****?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnBkCvBzmfhJhusTxRCyXifG4jv9MqnMOvsEfo1M1XN2TItOcT3XSZoZVhPFDNeE0U2A7oJERR4AXUDQV9MNeScDv9CuZpmkdJlbjqtemv9_YTNTW7mY26bEZmTQtvfEnC3LWXP9Kh1f2ExwxQ0TbYtUMZbiSRkZ2h8Wg_hAJ7Ti0iolbQnGvk61oSbF7N6QOXy5p2HLHWazCxdb1eaLFUR42mmuSQilvya2BPDgoPWZNqaamazTwZr4ARk6AgeVkgw5gJnM14fpEa_qfpdSujM2PmkXGZ49h_1PSM7iZFm8tADVTg6J4uzqUUcKuuiil6wujweLn46n9yolXetPTFaONPC-fKkCFzxED0nelbVDKeKkqa5-syZuMZya2SwdsKPebSYN30H_wkDBUTUgGsT_sNdfbQg3AUgEaIdt6pXXZZ3sY6UYfNeQfLhRmwi0BPDvLiEXW19xNi6quqMWFnb/3uo/wC7hqgOZQAG_LhtXD1tmGg/h3/g6PqmReSvMD7ao0GvN5QCb4RFOeEK2zIAByG7lmFWCo)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnBkCvBzmfhJhusTxRCyXifG4jv9MqnMOvsEfo1M1XN2TItOcT3XSZoZVhPFDNeE0U2A7oJERR4AXUDQV9MNeScDv9CuZpmkdJlbjqtemv9_YTNTW7mY26bEZmTQtvfEnC3LWXP9Kh1f2ExwxQ0TbYtUMZbiSRkZ2h8Wg_hAJ7Ti0iolbQnGvk61oSbF7N6QOXy5p2HLHWazCxdb1eaLFUR42mmuSQilvya2BPDgoPWZIZkIKFdvGqKL367ox9dJ8FSTIrakJcl6ijhoJ_91LAH76CqIWNWi6_aQ9z-3EE67gNPhjpOPRuNppelUE3i3yKeXFZtyjHh9HaD2jcjZZVAHoSpccptmt1TvqiZC1Btab3kWsu5CVyAP0CjOSceihEdsgtDwM5BFE984-vSfHuJ7AQZgWO3FtSPqPZP4k3eCYRb2yNhCsS4xRSlxBwW_25UquPtq4urdP28SfGc6IBc/3uo/wC7hqgOZQAG_LhtXD1tmGg/h4/Dq_YTCPBs8If-oysFBOZqj01Iq6dch1UH5x_hS0goi4)

Thank you. Together, we’re fighting for equal justice for all of us.
In solidarity,
Rashida

name: Adam Frisch
subject: I am humbly asking you to make a donation to my campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60538148/397405999/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzI0MjIyZC0zOWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hviAiwbhdtgo8PtMRD8LSy-A1i60OERvIUjKKsZiRJU=&emci=02786c1f-62c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=3324222d-39c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

Adam Frisch here, humbly asking if you can make a donation to my campaign for Congress against Lauren Boebert.

Last month, I announced that I am once again running to defeat Boebert. In 2022, the race between us went to a recount, but ultimately, after all of the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short.

It was the closest race in the entire country.

I know we can win this time, but I am counting on your support from day one to be able to build a campaign strong enough to win.

[**_So please, click here and split a donation between the Democratic Party of Georgia and my campaign now to become a Founding Donor of our campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert. When we kick Boebert out of Congress once and for all, you’ll be able to say you were a part of it from the start._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60538150/397406001/729998634?refcode=20230321.3_AF_3AQ_ND&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzI0MjIyZC0zOWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hviAiwbhdtgo8PtMRD8LSy-A1i60OERvIUjKKsZiRJU=)

Despite our close race last time, it’s clear that Lauren Boebert hasn’t learned her lesson. The only way to stop her from continuing to fuel the angertainment machine is to defeat her at the ballot box.

Thank you for having my back from the start.

With gratitude -
Adam
---

Friend, we're so grateful to have Sherrod fighting for our shared values in the U.S. Senate – from protecting reproductive rights to championing the Dignity of Work.

But here's the truth: Sherrod is in the fight of his life for reelection – and CNN just ranked this seat as one of the _most likely_ to flip red. **If we're going to prove the pundits wrong and win this race, we need every single member of this grassroots team behind us.**
**That's why we're calling on 5,000 supporters to officially endorse our reelection campaign by midnight tonight – including you, friend. [If you're committed to defending Ohio's Democratic seat and our Senate majority, will you personally endorse Sherrod Brown now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60538305/397406646/-752478304?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fbrown-endorsement&code=jtk39-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2UyMTZiNi0zYWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LaLN9eb-u-w2PgCWo1Nog16lF5NdrIjdRb1ZmZiheEg=&emci=5f23ea05-02c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7ce216b6-3ac8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)**

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Biden's First Veto
body:
Happy Birthday, GOP! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Tuesday! **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-y/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-j/) **Biden's First Veto** **[Biden vetoed a bill for the first time in his presidency](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-t/), **arguing that the legislation was overly influenced by "MAGA Republicans." **Xi Arrives in Moscow** Vladimir [**Putin is accusing the West of trying to hold back Moscow and Beijing 's "development"**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-i/) as Chinese leader Xi Jinping landed Monday for a three-day visit to the Kremlin. **Double Standard** Sen. Scott said **[there is a double standard in American politics today](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-d/)** : one in which the House Oversight Committee can show Biden took money from the CCP and another in which former President Trump can face an indictment over alleged hush-money payments to an adult film star. **More Deals to Investigate** James Comer revealed Sunday that [**the Biden family may have made as many as 11 additional business deals with China**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-h/) on top of the $3 million wire transfer. **Hugs Not Drugs**
## Mexican President Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador**[blames America's rampant fentanyl crisis on a "lack of love."](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-k/)**
**Government Overreach Blocked** A federal judge**[blocked the Biden administration from implementing environmental regulations redefining how water sources are protected](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-u/), **which opponents argued was an example of overreach. **Happy Birthday, GOP!** The **[Republican Party was founded in Ripon, Wisconsin, to oppose the expansion of slavery](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-o/)** into the American west in 1854.

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-x/)!**
* He should **[be in the home](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-m/)**.
* How do you **[decide?](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-c/)**
* The First **[Liberals](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-q/).**
* No one is**[above the law](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-a/).**

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-f/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-z/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-e/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
800 Washington Ave Ste C
Golden, CO 80401 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-qkdhiz-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-g) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-qkdhiz-trhiujldw-w/)

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Action Alert: Tomorrow, Toxic Free Kids Modernization Bill Headed to a Vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60538391/397407110/-984961006?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNDIyYTA3LTNjYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2AO49HM6vKHzTi59uPTROjgmXq_yo_JnTEe-vH0rcOE=&emci=a4ea2de2-33c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4f422a07-3cc8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) | | | Hi Peter, One of our priorities for the year, the Toxic Free Kids Modernization Bill (HB 3043), is scheduled for a final vote by the House tomorrow. This bill would expand on the Toxic Free Kids Act from 2015 and reduce exposure to toxic chemicals in children’s products. **[Will you write to your representative today urging them to vote yes on this bill?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60538392/397407111/-984961006?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNDIyYTA3LTNjYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2AO49HM6vKHzTi59uPTROjgmXq_yo_JnTEe-vH0rcOE=&emci=a4ea2de2-33c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4f422a07-3cc8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)** With so many new chemicals being introduced constantly, we need stronger protections for our kids. Our state is part of a growing movement across our nation to pass laws protecting our future generations from toxics often found in products they interact with every day. Fortunately, many of our lawmakers agree with us on the necessity of the Toxic Free Kids Modernization Bill, but **[we need to make sure HB 3043 passes tomorrow!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60538393/397407112/-984961006?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNDIyYTA3LTNjYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2AO49HM6vKHzTi59uPTROjgmXq_yo_JnTEe-vH0rcOE=&emci=a4ea2de2-33c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4f422a07-3cc8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)** We do not want our kids to be exposed to toxics that can cause developmental issues and weakened immune systems via products that they use every day. A modernized Toxic Free Kids Act would allow our health authorities to regulate classes of harmful chemicals and limit exemptions granted to manufacturers to three years. It would also require manufacturers to include brand name and model when reporting products with toxics, making it easier for consumers to avoid them. **[Please do your part to protect our kids from harmful chemicals and take action now!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60538394/397407113/-984961006?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNDIyYTA3LTNjYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2AO49HM6vKHzTi59uPTROjgmXq_yo_JnTEe-vH0rcOE=&emci=a4ea2de2-33c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4f422a07-3cc8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)** Thank you for your continued support. Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Bracket busted?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
March madness is upon us, but we’re not just talking about basketball... At least _five_ Republicans have been rumored to be running for Tammy’s Senate seat next year —**including Paul Ryan, David Clarke, Rebecca Kleefisch, and not just one, but _two_ multi-millionaires with the war chests to self-finance their own campaigns.** With so many Republicans eyeing Tammy’s Senate seat, we could probably make our own bracket at this point. name: Right Wing Watch (via the NDRC)
subject: what MSNBC said about Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
they hit the nail on the head
|

**Team, MSNBC called Ron DeSantis “a far more dangerous politician than Donald Trump.” It’s not hard to see why.**

His takeover of Florida’s redistricting process was unprecedented and ruthless – his map eliminated two districts that sent Black representatives to Congress and all but guaranteed a Republican House majority.

His attacks on LGBTQ youth, women, and Black Americans have been beyond the pale.

**Ron DeSantis has made it clear that when it comes to using any means necessary to advance his far-right agenda,_he’s just getting started:_** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60538975/397409327/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230321_FR_3K_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYTgwZTMzLTNlYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cJ-3q6rmae8P8Ep66bKhD5_GdIEFWUAKxKZ1orbQn-0=)

Thanks in large part to years of GOP gerrymandering, Republicans hold a _supermajority_ in the Florida legislature. Now, they plan to use their power to implement every right-wing priority on Ron DeSantis’ wish list, including:
❌ Banning abortion statewide
❌ Eliminating gun restrictions
❌ Expanding “Don’t Say Gay” and “Don’t Say They” legislation in schools
❌ Outlawing healthcare for transgender youth

...and more.
**Here’s the worst part: According to recent reports, Ron DeSantis has already told his closest confidants that he plans to run for president – and he’s leading in polls.**
[**_Ron DeSantis and politicians like him must be held accountable _now_. That’s why the NDRC is working across the country to defeat gerrymandering Republicans and replace them with Democrats who will defend our democracy. clean_body: they hit the nail on the head | Team, MSNBC called Ron DeSantis “a far more dangerous politician than Donald Trump.” It’s not hard to see why. His takeover of Florida’s redistricting process was unprecedented and ruthless – his map eliminated two districts that sent Black representatives to Congress and all but guaranteed a Republican House majority. His attacks on LGBTQ youth, women, and Black Americans have been beyond the pale. Ron DeSantis has made it clear that when it comes to using any means necessary to advance his far-right agenda,he’s just getting started: | = = Thanks in large part to years of GOP gerrymandering, Republicans hold a supermajority in the Florida legislature. Now, they plan to use their power to implement every right-wing priority on Ron DeSantis’ wish list, including: ❌ Banning abortion statewide ❌ Eliminating gun restrictions ❌ Expanding “Don’t Say Gay” and “Don’t Say They” legislation in schools ❌ Outlawing healthcare for transgender youth ...and more. Here’s the worst part: According to recent reports, Ron DeSantis has already told his closest confidants that he plans to run for president – and he’s leading in polls. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Politicians like Ron DeSantis are a danger to our democracy, team. name: Chair Jaime Harrison
subject: A party’s budget says a lot about its values.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
You can tell a lot about a party’s values by looking at its budget, and when I look at the MAGA House Republican proposal, I’m seeing a five-alarm fire for families like yours. | |
---
Derek, you can tell a lot about a party’s values by looking at its budget,**and when I look at the MAGA House Republican proposal, I’m seeing a five-alarm fire for families like yours.** The House Freedom Caucus’ budget proposal makes their priorities clear: they want to impose devastating cuts to public safety and raise costs for working and middle-class families, all to protect and extend tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy and big corporations. **Their budget would be a disaster for folks like you, Derek.** Now, let’s compare the House Freedom Caucus’ plan to President Biden’s plan. President Biden’s budget would:
* **Cut the deficit by nearly $3 trillion.** On the other hand, the MAGA Republicans’ plan could *add* nearly $3 trillion to the deficit.
* **Bring down health care costs for working families.** Recently, three major insulin manufacturers followed President Biden’s lead and capped the cost of their product at $35/month. President Biden wants to make sure we have insulin capped for everyone -- including Americans on private insurance.
* **Protect and strengthen Medicare and Social Security.** President Biden’s plan would secure Medicare for another generation, while Republicans continue to propose cuts to Social Security and Medicare.
* **Invest in America by investing in families, workers, seniors, and veterans.** President Biden’s plan puts the American people first -- including key investments in community colleges and veterans’ services.

Now, President Biden’s budget is great. But to make progress like this possible, we need more Democrats in Congress -- and that won’t happen without committed grassroots supporters showing up. Will you chip in $7 to the DNC today to help elect more Democrats who can help make President Biden’s budget a reality?

clean_body: You can tell a lot about a party’s values by looking at its budget, and when I look at the MAGA House Republican proposal, I’m seeing a five-alarm fire for families like yours. | | Derek, you can tell a lot about a party’s values by looking at its budget,and when I look at the MAGA House Republican proposal, I’m seeing a five-alarm fire for families like yours. The House Freedom Caucus’ budget proposal makes their priorities clear: they want to impose devastating cuts to public safety and raise costs for working and middle-class families, all to protect and extend tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy and big corporations. Their budget would be a disaster for folks like you, Derek. Now, let’s compare the House Freedom Caucus’ plan to President Biden’s plan. President Biden’s budget would: Cut the deficit by nearly $3 trillion. On the other hand, the MAGA Republicans’ plan could add nearly $3 trillion to the deficit. Bring down health care costs for working families. Recently, three major insulin manufacturers followed President Biden’s lead and capped the cost of their product at $35/month. President Biden wants to make sure we have insulin capped for everyone -- including Americans on private insurance. Protect and strengthen Medicare and Social Security. President Biden’s plan would secure Medicare for another generation, while Republicans continue to propose cuts to Social Security and Medicare. Invest in America by investing in families, workers, seniors, and veterans. President Biden’s plan puts the American people first -- including key investments in community colleges and veterans’ services. Now, President Biden’s budget is great. But to make progress like this possible, we need more Democrats in Congress -- and that won’t happen without committed grassroots supporters showing up. Will you chip in $7 to the DNC today to help elect more Democrats who can help make President Biden’s budget a reality? As the President said himself, “Don’t tell me what you value -- show me your budget, and I’ll tell you what you value.” And President Biden’s budget is all about values. But it’s going to take Democratic supporters like you to elect more Democrats nationwide that will help make that budget a reality. That’s all from me today, Derek. Just remember: there’s only one major party in this country with a plan to support working and middle-class families. And it’s not the GOP. Talk soon, Jaime Jaime Harrison Chair Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. body:
Did you catch this email from Ed Markey?

| | Hi Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw this email from my dear friend Ed Markey. I am so honored to have his support, and know that when our states’ delegations work together, we can achieve great things. Ed’s right – there are so many forces working against us as we fight to pass progressive legislation in Congress. But like he said, I’ve never shied away from a challenge before, and I’m fighting like hell for a better, brighter future for all Vermonters and all Americans. When it comes to fighting the good fight and sticking up for workers, seniors, LGBTQ+ Americans, immigrants, and everyone else who has been long overlooked in Washington, **I know I can count on Becca Balint to get it done.** As a former public school teacher and President Pro Tem of Vermont’s state Senate, Becca is well versed in hard work and public service. And as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to represent Vermont in Congress, her historic victory brought long overdue representation to my neighboring state. Becca’s in the thick of the fight to win Medicare for All, tackle the climate crisis, invest in affordable housing, protect our democracy, and rebuild America’s middle class. As an original co-author of the Green New Deal, I couldn’t be more grateful to have a fighter like Becca on the House side who understands that future generations are depending on us to pass a New Green Deal _now._
There are so many forces against us in the fight to pass progressive policies in Congress — but Becca has never shied away from a challenge before, and isn’t backing down now. [_**If you’re with her, click here to donate whatever you can to Becca’s campaign for Congress.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60539025/397409435/510315814?refcode=E20671-20230321-MarkeyFwd-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjc1NWFlNy0zZWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w0FYLWmPcC67E3Fjfkf-CzatSxg-MXnCFaScmgLg5YM=)
